learnBookmarkEmpty: Babu alamar shafi tukuna. Yi alama akan batun don ci gaba daga baya.
learnInAppSubtitle: Duk abin da ke ƙasa ana amfani da shi kai tsaye a cikin app ba tare da buɗe hanyoyin haɗin waje ba.
learnExplainSchool: yana nufin koyan ainihin ra'ayi ɗaya lokaci guda, sannan amfani da misalai masu sauƙi don aiwatar da shi.
learnExplainUni: yana nufin fahimtar babban ra'ayi, dalilin da ya sa yake da mahimmanci, da kuma inda ake amfani da shi a cikin nazari ko aiki.
learnStep2: Rubuta mahimman ra'ayi a cikin kalmomin ku.
learnStep3: Magance ƙaramin ɗawainiya ɗaya kuma bincika kurakurai.
learnMiniTaskAbout: Ka ba da misali ɗaya don
learnMiniTaskAndWhy: da kuma bayyana dalilin da ya sa ya dace.
learnHintSimple: Tukwici: Idan yana jin wuya, raba batun zuwa ƙananan sassa kuma maimaita tare da misali ɗaya kowanne.
learnExamBasicsHint: Yanayin mai da hankali: ƙaƙƙarfan tushe na farko, sannan ƙaramin saiti.
learnExamBalancedHint: Yanayin mayar da hankali: daidaitaccen fahimta, aiki, da bita.
learnExamHardHint: Yanayin mai da hankali: ayyuka irin na jarrabawa tare da matsin lokaci da saurin amsawa.
demoModeEnabled: An kunna yanayin demo. Ana ƙetare tabbaci don gwaji.

learnTopicSources: Algebra || Algebra yana amfani da haruffa da alamomi don wakiltar lambobi da bayyana alaƙa. Shine kashin bayan duk wani ci-gaban lissafi. Kuna koya don warware ma'auni, aiki tare da masu canji, kuma ku sami ƙimar da ba a sani ba ta matakai masu ma'ana.

dashNoHomeschool: Sanya tsarin yau da kullun a Koyi don samun jagora anan.

emptyMessagesDesc: Fara sabon tattaunawa don haɗawa da wasu.

settingsAccountSub: Bayanan martaba da bayanan asusun ku.

settingsDataLocal: Duk bayanan da aka adana a gida
teacherToolsSubtitle: Sarrafa damar shiga aji, kulle yanayin ɗalibi da rarraba abun ciki na karatu ba tare da baiwa ɗalibai haƙƙoƙin malami ba.
teacherClassControlDesc: Kulle ɗalibin da ke canzawa tsakanin makaranta da yanayin jami'a kuma sanya ajin ya mai da hankali kan tsarin karatu na yanzu.
teacherLockSuccess: Yanayin aji an kulle don ɗalibai.
teacherShareMaterialDesc: Buga ɗawainiya ko bayanin kula da sauri don ajin ku.
teacherShareSuccess: An raba kayan karatu tare da aji.
navCatAdmin: Maɓalli (kamar x ko y) yana nufin lambar da ba a sani ba.
settingsCountrySub: Yana daidaita ma'auni, matakan makaranta, da tsarin lamba ga tsarin ilimin ku.
learnSch_mathematics_title: Ma'auni yana nuna cewa kalmomi biyu daidai suke (misali 2x + 3 = 7).
learnSch_mathematics_f0_name: Don warware ma'auni, yi aiki iri ɗaya a ɓangarorin biyu don keɓe mai canzawa.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_desc: Ayyuka suna taswirar kowane shigarwa zuwa daidaitaccen fitarwa ɗaya: f(x) = 2x yana nufin ninka shigarwar.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_task: Abubuwan da aka fi sani da yawa maganganu ne tare da kalmomi masu yawa: 3x² + 2x - 1.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp0: A variable (like x or y) stands for an unknown number.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp1: An equation shows that two expressions are equal (e.g. 2x + 3 = 7).
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp2: To solve an equation, do the same operation on both sides to isolate the variable.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp3: Functions map every input to exactly one output: f(x) = 2x means double the input.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp4: Polynomials are expressions with multiple terms: 3x² + 2x − 1.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_name: Geometry yana nazarin siffofi, kusurwoyi, da alaƙar sararin samaniya. Yana koya muku yin tunani a hankali da tabbatar da maganganu ta amfani da ma'anoni da ka'idoji. Geometry yana bayyana a cikin gine-gine, fasaha, injiniyanci, da rayuwar yau da kullum.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_desc: A kusurwar dama yana da ƙafafu na 3 cm da 4 cm. Yi lissafin hypotenuse ta amfani da a² + b² = c².
learnSch_mathematics_f1_task: Wani batu ba shi da girma; layi yana shimfida mara iyaka a bangarorin biyu.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp0: Ana auna kusurwa a cikin digiri: kusurwar dama = 90 °, madaidaicin kwana = 180 °.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp1: Jimlar kusurwoyi a cikin kowane triangle koyaushe yana 180°.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp2: Ka'idar Pythagorean: a cikin madaidaicin triangle, a² + b² = c² (c shine hypotenuse).
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp3: Siffofin da suka dace daidai da girman da siffa; siffofi iri ɗaya suna da kusurwoyi ɗaya amma girma dabam.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_name: Ƙididdiga yana taimaka muku tattarawa, tsarawa, da fassara bayanai don yanke hukunci. Yiwuwar tana auna yadda yuwuwar aukuwa. Tare suna da mahimmanci a kimiyya, tattalin arziki, da yanke shawara na yau da kullun.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_desc: Mirgine mutuwa: menene yuwuwar samun madaidaicin lamba? Nuna lissafin.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_task: Ma'ana = jimlar duk ƙimar ÷ adadin ƙimar.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp0: Matsakaici = ƙimar tsakiya lokacin da aka jera bayanai.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp1: Yiwuwar aukuwa = (sakamako masu kyau) ÷ ( jimlar sakamako).
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp2: Probability of an event = (favorable outcomes) ÷ (total outcomes).
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp3: Histogram yana nuna yawan rarraba bayanai.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp4: Daidaitawa yana nuna ko masu canji guda biyu suna tafiya tare - amma ba dalili ba.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_name: Trigonometry || Trigonometry yana nazarin alaƙa tsakanin kusurwoyi da tsayin gefe a cikin alwatika. Ana amfani dashi a cikin ilimin lissafi, injiniyanci, kewayawa, da kiɗa. Babban ayyuka guda uku - sine, cosine, da tangent - haɗa kusurwoyi zuwa ma'auni na bangarori.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_desc: Tsani mai tsayin mita 5 yana jingina da bango a 60°. Yaya girmansa ya kai? Yi amfani da zunubi(60°) = √3/2.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_task: A cikin madaidaicin alwatika: zunubi (θ) = kishiyar/hypotenuse, cos(θ) = kusa/hypotenuse, tan(θ) = kishiya/masu kusa.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_kp1: Da'irar naúrar tana faɗaɗa trig zuwa duk kusurwoyi sama da 90°.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_kp2: Sine da cosine na lokaci-lokaci: suna maimaita kowane 360° (2π radians).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_name: Ka'idar lamba tana nazarin kaddarorin lambobi - musamman manyan lambobi, rarrabuwa, da ƙima. Yana ɗaya daga cikin tsofaffin rassan lissafin lissafi kuma yana ƙarƙashin cryptography na zamani.
learnSch_mathematics_f4_desc: Nemo GCD(48, 18) ta amfani da Euclidean algorithm. Sannan nemo LCM(48, 18).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_task: Babban lamba yana da daidai abubuwa guda biyu: 1 da kanta (misali 2, 3, 5, 7, 11).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp0: A prime number has exactly two factors: 1 and itself (e.g. 2, 3, 5, 7, 11).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp1: Ana iya rubuta kowace lamba> 1 azaman samfuri na musamman na ƙayyadaddun ƙididdiga (tushen ka'idar lissafi).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp2: Dokokin rarrabuwa: ana raba lamba da 3 idan jimillar lambobinsa aka raba ta 3.
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp3: GCD (mafi girma na gama gari): mafi girman lamba yana rarraba duka biyun. Yi amfani da Euclidean algorithm: GCD(a, b) = GCD(b, mod b).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp4: LCM (mafi ƙarancin gama gari): LCM(a, b) = (a × b) ÷ GCD(a, b).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_tp2: GCD da LCM || Vectors || Vector yana da duka girma (girman) da shugabanci. Vectors suna da mahimmanci a ilimin kimiyyar lissafi (ƙarfi, gudu) da mafi girman lissafi. Ana iya ƙara su, cirewa, da ƙima, kuma sun haɗa ta halitta zuwa sararin 3D.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_name: An ba ku = (2, 3) da v = (4, -1), nemo: (a) u + v, (b) |u|, (c) u · v. Shin u da v daidai suke?
learnSch_mathematics_f5_desc: Ana rubuta vector a matsayin kibiya ko a matsayin haɗin kai: v = (3, 4) yana nufin raka'a 3 dama, raka'a 4 sama.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_kp0: Ƙarin kayan aiki: (a, b) + (c, d) = (a+c, b+d). Ragi iri ɗaya ne da ragi.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_kp2: Dot samfur: (a, b) · (c, d) = ac + bd. Idan samfurin ɗigo = 0, vectors suna tsaye.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_tp1: Jeri shine jerin lambobi da aka yi oda da ke bin tsari. Jeri shine jimlar sharuɗɗan jeri. Dukansu suna bayyana a duk cikin ilimin lissafi da ƙirar ƙira ta gaske (girma, kuɗi, kimiyyar lissafi).
learnSch_mathematics_f6_desc: A sequence is an ordered list of numbers following a pattern. A series is the sum of the terms of a sequence. Both appear throughout mathematics and real-world modelling (growth, finance, physics).
learnSch_mathematics_f6_task: Jeri yana farawa 2, 6, 18, 54, … (a) Shin lissafi ne ko na geometric? (b) Nemo kalma ta 7. (c) Nemo jimlar sharuɗɗan 5 na farko.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp0: Lissafin lissafi: kowane lokaci ya bambanta da ƙayyadadden adadin d (bambancin gama gari). aₙ = a₁ + (n-1) d.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp1: Jimlar jerin lissafin: Sₙ = n/2 · (a₁ + aₙ).
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp2: Jerin Geometric: kowane lokaci ana ninka shi da ƙayyadadden rabo r. aₙ = a₁ · r⁻¹.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp3: Jimlar jeri na geometric: Sₙ = a₁ · (1 − rⁿ) / (1 - r) na r ≠ 1.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp4: Silsilar lissafi mara iyaka tana haɗuwa zuwa S = a₁ / (1 − r) lokacin |r| < 1. || Jerin Lissafi
learnSch_mathematics_f6_tp2: Ƙididdigar ƙididdiga na nazarin ƙimar canji da gangara na masu lankwasa. Ƙwararren yana gaya muku yadda sauri aiki ke canzawa a kowane lokaci. Yana da mahimmanci ga ilimin lissafi, injiniyanci, tattalin arziki, da duk kimiyyar ƙididdiga.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_name: Nemo abin da ya samo asali na f(x) = 4x³ - 2x² + 5. Sannan nemo inda gangare yayi daidai da sifili.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_desc: Ƙwararren f'(x) yana ba da gangaren layin tangent zuwa f(x) a aya x.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_task: Ƙarfin wutar lantarki: idan f(x) = xⁿ, sannan f'(x) = nxⁿ⁻¹. Misali: (x³)′ = 3x².
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp0: Ƙa'idar jimla: (f + g)' = f'+ g'. Tsarin samfur: (fg)' = f'g + fg'.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp1: Ka'idar sarkar: abin da aka samu na f(g(x)) shine f'(g(x)) · g'(x).
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp2: Aiki yana da matsakaicin matsakaici ko ƙarami inda f'(x) = 0 (mahimman batu).
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp3: Iyaka da abubuwan da suka samo asali
learnSch_mathematics_f8_desc: Ƙididdigar haɗin kai tana ƙididdige wuraren da ke ƙarƙashin lanƙwasa da adadin da aka tara. Yana da baya aiki na bambanci. Ana amfani da haɗin kai a cikin ilimin lissafi (aiki, nisa), ƙididdiga (yiwuwar), da injiniyanci.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_task: Kimanta ∫₀² (3x² + 2) dx. Nuna duk matakai ta amfani da ainihin ka'idar lissafi.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp0: Madaidaicin madaidaicin ∫f(x)dx yana ba da iyali ayyuka waɗanda asalinsu f.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp1: Ƙa'idar wutar lantarki don haɗin kai: ∫xⁿ dx = xⁿ⁺¹/(n+1) + C (na n ≠ -1).
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp2: Tabbataccen mahallin ∫ₐᵇ f(x)dx yana ba da madaidaicin yanki tsakanin lanƙwasa da axis x daga a zuwa b.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp3: Asalin ka'idar lissafi: ∫ₐᵇ f(x)dx = F(b) -F(a), inda F'= f.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp4: Wuri tsakanin masu lanƙwasa biyu: ∫ₐᵇ [f(x) -g(x)] dx, inda f(x) ≥ g(x).
learnSch_physics_f0_name: Makanikai shine nazarin motsi da kuma karfin da ke haifar da shi. Dokokin motsi uku na Newton sune tushe. Fahimtar injiniyoyi na taimakawa bayyana komai daga faɗuwar abubuwa zuwa harba roka.
learnSch_physics_f0_desc: Kwallan kilogiram 2 yana haɓaka a 3 m/s². Wane karfi ne ke aiki da shi? Amfani F = ma.
learnSch_physics_f0_task: Doka ta farko ta Newton: abu a hutawa yana hutawa sai dai idan an yi aiki da karfi.
learnSch_physics_f0_kp0: Doka ta 2 ta Newton: Ƙarfi = haɓakar taro × (F = ma).
learnSch_physics_f0_kp1: Doka ta 3 ta Newton: kowane aiki yana da amsa daidai kuma akasin haka.
learnSch_physics_f0_kp2: Ƙarfin motsi = ½ × taro × gudu² (KE = ½mv²).
learnSch_physics_f0_kp3: Aiki = Ƙarfi × nisa a cikin jagorancin ƙarfin (W = Fd).
learnSch_physics_f0_kp4: Work = Force × distance in the direction of the force (W = Fd).
learnSch_physics_f1_name: Lantarki da Magnetism || Wutar lantarki shine kwararar cajin wutar lantarki ta hanyar madugu. Magnetism yana tasowa daga cajin motsi da kayan maganadisu. Dukansu sun haɗu a cikin electromagnetism, wanda ke ƙarfafa fasahar zamani.
learnSch_physics_f1_desc: Wurin kewayawa yana da baturi 12 V da resistor 4 Ω. Menene halin yanzu? Yi amfani da V = IR.
learnSch_physics_f1_task: Dokokin Ohm: Voltage = Resistance × Yanzu (V = IR).
learnSch_physics_f1_kp0: Series circuit: guda halin yanzu ta duk aka gyara; ƙarfin lantarki ƙara sama.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp1: Da'irar layi ɗaya: irin ƙarfin lantarki a duk sassan; igiyoyin ruwa suna ƙara sama.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp2: Ƙarfi = Ƙarfin wutar lantarki × Na yanzu (P = VI).
learnSch_physics_f1_kp3: Filayen Magnetic suna yin ƙarfi akan cajin motsi: F = qvB.
learnSch_physics_f1_tp0: A halin yanzu da ƙarfin lantarki
learnSch_physics_f2_name: Raƙuman ruwa suna canja kuzari ba tare da canja wurin kwayoyin halitta ba. Sauti da haske duka igiyoyin ruwa ne. Na'urar gani da ido tana nazarin yadda hasken ke aiki - nuna kashe madubi, lankwasa ta ruwan tabarau, da ƙirƙirar hotuna.
learnSch_physics_f2_desc: Kalaman sauti yana da mitar 440 Hz da gudun 340 m/s. Menene tsawonsa? Yi amfani da v = f.
learnSch_physics_f2_task: Gudun igiyar ruwa = mita × tsawon zango (v = fλ).
learnSch_physics_f2_kp0: Sauti yana tafiya ta cikin kwayoyin halitta; ba za ta iya tafiya ta wurin wani wuri ba.
learnSch_physics_f2_kp1: Haske yana tafiya a 300,000 km/s a cikin sarari (c).
learnSch_physics_f2_kp2: Light travels at 300,000 km/s in a vacuum (c).
learnSch_physics_f2_kp3: Tunani: kusurwar abin da ya faru = kusurwar tunani.
learnSch_physics_f2_kp4: Refraction: haske lankwasa lokacin wucewa tsakanin kayan na daban-daban yawa (Dokar Snell).
learnSch_chemistry_f0_desc: Komai daga zarra ne. Kowane zarra yana da tsakiya (protons + neutrons) kewaye da electrons. Teburin lokaci-lokaci yana tsara abubuwa ta lambar atom ɗinsu da abubuwan sinadarai.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_task: Carbon yana da lambar atomic 6. Protons, electrons, da neutrons nawa ¹²C ke da shi?
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp0: Lambar atomic = adadin protons; yana ƙayyade abin da yake.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp2: Electrons sun mamaye matakan makamashi (harsashi); outermost electrons ƙayyade reactivity.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp3: Isotopes kwayoyin halitta ne na nau'in halitta guda tare da lambobi daban-daban na neutrons.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp4: Ionic bond: canja wurin electrons. Covalent bond: ana raba electrons.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_desc: Abubuwan sinadaran suna sake tsara kwayoyin halitta don samar da sabbin abubuwa. Reactants suna canzawa zuwa samfura. Fahimtar halayen yana taimakawa a cikin magani, kimiyyar kayan aiki, dafa abinci, da masana'antu.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_task: Daidaita wannan ma'auni: H₂ + O₂ → H₂O. H₂ da O₂ nawa kuke bukata?
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp0: Dokar kiyaye yawan jama'a: kwayoyin zarra ba a halitta ko halaka su a wani dauki.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp1: Daidaita ma'auni: adadin kowane zarra dole ne ya zama daidai a bangarorin biyu.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp2: Adadin amsawa yana ƙaruwa tare da mafi girman zafin jiki, taro, ko yanki na ƙasa.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp3: Masu kara kuzari suna saurin amsawa ba tare da an cinye su ba.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp4: Stoichiometry yana amfani da ma'auni na tawadar halitta don ƙididdige ƙididdiga a cikin halayen.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_name: Acids suna ba da gudummawar ions hydrogen (H⁺); sansanonin yarda da su. Ma'auni na pH yana auna acidity daga 0 (sosai acidic) zuwa 14 (mai mahimmanci), tare da 7 kasancewa tsaka tsaki. Halin tsaka-tsaki yana haɗuwa da acid da tushe don samar da ruwa da gishiri.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_desc: Idan kun haɗu da acid hydrochloric (HCl) da sodium hydroxide (NaOH), wadanne samfura ne? Rubuta lissafin.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_task: pH <7 = acidic (misali vinegar pH ≈ 3). pH> 7 = asali (misali baking soda pH ≈ 9).
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp1: Alamomi (kamar litmus) suna canza launi a cikin acid da tushe.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp2: Ƙarfin acids cikakke suna rarraba (HCl); raunanan acid partially dissociate (CH₃COOH).
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp3: Titration yana ƙayyade ƙaddamarwar da ba a sani ba ta hanyar amsawa tare da sanannen bayani.
learnSch_biology_f0_desc: Tantanin halitta shine ainihin naúrar dukkan abubuwa masu rai. Kwayoyin suna aiwatar da duk ayyukan rayuwa: samun makamashi, amsa ga muhalli, girma, da haifuwa. Fahimtar sel shine ginshiƙi ga duk ilimin halitta.
learnSch_biology_f0_task: Sunan bambance-bambance guda uku tsakanin kwayar shuka da tantanin dabba tare da aiki ɗaya don kowane bambanci.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp0: Prokaryotes (kwayoyin cuta) ba su da tsakiya; eukaryotes (dabbobi, shuke-shuke, fungi) suna da tsakiya.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp1: Tsakanin tsakiya ya ƙunshi DNA, tsarin halittar tantanin halitta.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp2: Mitochondria yana samar da makamashi ta hanyar numfashi ta salula (ATP).
learnSch_biology_f0_kp3: Mitosis yana samar da ƙwayoyin 'ya mace guda biyu don girma da gyarawa.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp4: Meiosis yana samar da ƙwayoyin jima'i guda huɗu (gametes) tare da rabin lambar chromosome.
learnSch_biology_f0_tp1: Mitosis da meiosis || DNA dan RNA || Halittar Dan Adam || Jikin ɗan adam wani tsari ne mai rikitarwa na tsarin gabobin da ke aiki tare don kula da rayuwa. Fahimtar yadda waɗannan tsarin ke aiki yana taimakawa a cikin lafiya, magani, da jin daɗin mutum.
learnSch_biology_f0_tp2: Bincika hanyar numfashin iskar oxygen daga hanci zuwa kwayar tsoka. Sunan kowane tsarin gabobin da abin ya shafa.
learnSch_biology_f1_name: Tsarin jini yana fitar da jini ta jiki, yana isar da iskar oxygen da abubuwan gina jiki.
learnSch_biology_f1_desc: Tsarin narkewar abinci yana karya abinci cikin abubuwan gina jiki da jiki zai iya sha.
learnSch_biology_f1_task: Tsarin juyayi yana aiwatar da bayanai kuma yana daidaita martani.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp0: Homeostasis yana kiyaye yanayin ciki (misali zafin jiki a 37 ° C).
learnSch_biology_f1_kp1: Abincin abinci: carbohydrates suna ba da makamashi; sunadaran gina jiki; fats suna adana makamashi kuma suna kare gabobin.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp3: Homeostasis keeps internal conditions stable (e.g. body temperature at 37°C).
learnSch_biology_f1_kp4: Nutrition: carbohydrates give energy; proteins build; fats store energy and protect organs.
learnSch_biology_f2_name: Ilimin halittu yana nazarin yadda halittu masu rai ke hulɗa da juna da muhallinsu. Fahimtar yanayin muhalli yana taimaka mana kare rayayyun halittu, sarrafa albarkatu, da magance sauyin yanayi.
learnSch_biology_f2_desc: Zana gidan yanar gizon abinci mai sauƙi tare da kwayoyin halitta 5. Masu kera lakabin, masu amfani na farko, da masu amfani da sakandare.
learnSch_biology_f2_task: Masu samarwa (tsiri) suna yin abinci ta hanyar photosynthesis; masu amfani da su suna cin su.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp0: Sarkar abinci tana nuna kwararar kuzari: Rana → shuka → herbivore → carnivore.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp1: Kusan kashi 10% na makamashi yana canjawa zuwa matakin trophic na gaba.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp2: Diversity na halitta yana sa tsarin halittu ya fi juriya don canzawa.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp3: Canjin yanayi yana canza wurin zama, yana canza nau'ikan jeri, kuma yana rushe gidajen abinci.
learnSch_biology_f2_tp2: Tunanin lissafi hanya ce ta warware matsala da ake amfani da ita a cikin shirye-shirye da bayanta. Yana karya rikitattun matsaloli zuwa sassan da za a iya sarrafawa kuma yana nemo mafita mataki-mataki wanda kwamfuta (ko mutum) zai iya bi.
learnSch_computer_science_title: Rubuta algorithm mataki-by-steki (a cikin yare bayyananne) don rarrabuwar katako na katunan 5 ta lamba.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_name: Rushewa: raba babbar matsala zuwa ƙarami, matsalolin da za a iya warware su.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_desc: Ƙirar ƙira: gano kamanceceniya da daidaituwa a cikin matsaloli.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_task: Abstraction: mayar da hankali kan mahimman sassa kuma watsi da cikakkun bayanai marasa mahimmanci.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp0: Decomposition: break a big problem into smaller, solvable sub-problems.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp1: Pattern recognition: identify similarities and regularities in problems.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp2: Abstraction: focus on the important parts and ignore irrelevant details.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp3: Algorithm: daidaitattun matakan matakai don magance matsala.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp4: Pseudocode yana taimakawa tsara algorithm a cikin bayyanannen harshe kafin yin coding.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_tp2: Shirye-shiryen yana fassara ra'ayoyi masu ma'ana zuwa umarnin da kwamfuta za ta iya aiwatarwa. Kowane shiri yana amfani da masu canji, yanayi, madaukai, da ayyuka. Gyara kuskure - ganowa da gyara kurakurai - fasaha ce mai mahimmanci.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_name: Rubuta pseudocode ko ainihin lamba wanda ke tambayar mai amfani lamba kuma ya buga ko yana da ban mamaki ko ma.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_desc: Mai canzawa yana adana ƙimar da za ta iya canzawa: x = 5.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_task: Madauki yana maimaita lambar: don i a cikin kewayon (5) yana tafiyar da jiki sau 5.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp0: Idan-bayani ya yanke shawara: idan x> 0: buga("tabbatacce").
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp1: Ƙungiyoyin ayyuka da za a sake amfani da lambar: def gaisuwa(suna): mayar da "Sannu" + suna.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp2: Nau'o'in kuskuren gama gari: Kuskuren syntax (ba daidai ba rubutu), kurakuran lokacin aiki (karara), kurakuran dabaru (sakamakon kuskure).
learnSch_computer_science_f1_tp2: Tsarin dijital ya samar da ababen more rayuwa na intanet da kwamfuta na zamani. Fahimtar hanyoyin sadarwa, wakilcin bayanai, da tsaro na intanet yana da mahimmanci ga duk wanda ke amfani da ko gina fasaha.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_name: Maida lamba goma sha uku zuwa binary. Nuna aikinku (raba ta 2 akai-akai).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_desc: Ana adana bayanai a cikin binary (0s da 1s): 8 ragowa = 1 byte.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_task: Convert the decimal number 13 to binary. Show your working (divide by 2 repeatedly).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp0: Data is stored in binary (0s and 1s): 8 bits = 1 byte.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp1: ASCII da lambobi taswirar Unicode zuwa haruffa (misali A = 65 a cikin ASCII).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp2: Intanit cibiyar sadarwa ce ta duniya ta hanyar amfani da ka'idojin TCP/IP.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp3: Ana amfani da HTTP don shafukan yanar gizo; HTTPS yana ƙara ɓoyewa don tsaro.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp4: Rufewa yana lalata bayanai don haka mai karɓa kawai zai iya karantawa.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_name: Karatu da nazari suna koya muku fahimta da kimanta rubutu da mahimmanci. Kuna koyon gano manufar marubucin, tsarin mahawara, da kimanta ingancin shaidar da aka yi amfani da ita.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_desc: Karanta sakin layi ɗaya daga kowane labarin. Gane: (1) Babban da’awar, (2) Hujja ɗaya, (3) Ƙimar son zuciya ɗaya.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_task: Nau'o'in tsarin rubutu: tsarin lokaci, matsala-maganin, sanadin-tasiri, kwatanta-kwatance.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp0: Babban hujja ita ce ta tsakiya da'awar marubucin yana son ku yarda.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp1: Shaida tana goyan bayan da'awar: nemo gaskiya, ƙididdiga, ƙwararrun ƙididdiga, da misalai.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp2: Kimanta tushen: shin marubucin mai gaskiya ne? Shin shaidun kwanan nan kuma sun dace?
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp3: Son zuciya yana faruwa ne lokacin da rubutu ya gabatar da gefen gardama ɗaya kawai.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_desc: Kyakkyawan rubutu yana sadar da ra'ayoyi a sarari da lallashi. Tsarin ya ƙunshi tsarawa, tsarawa, bita, da gyarawa. Tsari da shaida suna da mahimmanci kamar ƙamus.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_task: Rubuta sakin layi na PEEL (jumloli 5-7) yana jayayya cewa aikin gida yana da fa'ida ko cutarwa. Yi amfani da shaida ɗaya.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp0: sakin layi na PEEL: Nuni → Shaida → Bayyana → Haɗin baya.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp1: Gabatarwar makala ta bayyana hujjar; ƙarshe ya sake maimaita shi da fahimta.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp2: Rubutun ƙa'ida yana nisantar ƙanƙancewa, zage-zage, da mutum na farko sai dai in an ƙayyade.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp3: Muryar da ke aiki ta fi fitowa fili: "Dalibin ya warware matsalar" (ba "an warware ta ba").
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp4: Koyaushe bita: bincika dabaru, shaida, nahawu, da nau'in jumla.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_name: Dokokin nahawu suna sarrafa yadda kalmomi ke haɗuwa zuwa daidaitattun jimloli. Kalmomin ƙaƙƙarfan ƙaƙƙarfan ƙaƙƙarfan ƙaƙƙarfan ƙaƙƙarfan ƙaƙƙarfan ƙaƙƙarfan rubutu suna sa rubutu daidai da lallashi. Dukansu biyu suna buƙatar aiki mai ƙarfi - ba kawai karatu ba.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_desc: Sake rubuta wannan jumla a cikin nau'i uku daban-daban: "Kungiyar ta yi nasara a wasan." (da, gaba, yanzu cikakke)
learnSch_language_arts_f2_task: Jumla tana buƙatar batu da fi'ili: "Tana gudu."
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp0: Tsawon lokaci yana nuna lokaci: sauƙi mai sauƙi (gudu), baya (gudu), gaba (zai gudana), cikakke yanzu (ya gudu).
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp1: Fassarar: babban jigo ya tsaya shi kaɗai; wani juzu'i na ƙasa yana buƙatar babban jumla.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp2: Rubutun rubutu yana jagorantar mai karatu: waƙafi = taƙaitaccen ɗan dakata, ƙwararru = haɗa ra'ayoyi masu alaƙa.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp3: Alamun yanayi suna taimakawa ɓata kalmomin da ba a sani ba: duba kalmomin da ke kewaye.
learnSch_history_f0_name: Tarihin Duniya || Tarihin duniya ya bibiyi yadda al’ummomin ’yan Adam suka ci gaba sama da dubban shekaru, tun daga tsoffin wayewa ta hanyar dauloli, juyin-juya hali, da yakin duniya zuwa tsarin zamani na duniya. Tarihi ya taimaka mana mu fahimci dalilin da ya sa duniya take yadda take.
learnSch_history_f0_desc: Zaɓi wani babban lamari na tarihi kuma ka bayyana: (1) dalilinsa, (2) abin da ya faru, (3) tasirinsa na dogon lokaci.
learnSch_history_f0_task: Mesopotamiya (Iraki) da Masar suna daga cikin sanannun wayewa.
learnSch_history_f0_kp0: Juyin juya halin masana'antu (18-19th c.) ya canza tattalin arziki daga noma zuwa masana'antu.
learnSch_history_f0_kp1: Yaƙin Duniya na ɗaya (1914–1918) da yaƙin duniya na biyu (1939–1945) sun sake fasalin tsarin duniya.
learnSch_history_f0_kp2: Yakin Cold (1947-1991) ya raba duniya tsakanin Amurka da Tarayyar Soviet.
learnSch_history_f0_kp3: Haɗin duniya daga shekarun 1990 ya haifar da tattalin arziki da al'adu masu alaƙa.
learnSch_history_f0_tp1: Maɓuɓɓuka na farko takaddun asali ne ko kayan tarihi daga lokacin da ake nazari - haruffa, jawabai, hotuna, dokoki, litattafai. Masana tarihi suna amfani da su don sake gina abubuwan da suka gabata daidai gwargwadon iko.
learnSch_history_f0_tp2: Nemo gajeriyar magana ta tarihi (daga magana ko wasiƙa). Gano marubucin, kwanan wata, da ɗaya yuwuwar son zuciya.
learnSch_history_f1_name: Tushen farko sun haɗa da diaries, dokoki, hotuna, jawabai, da yarjejeniya.
learnSch_history_f1_desc: Maɓuɓɓuka na biyu suna fassara tushen farko: litattafai, tarihin rayuwa, takardun shaida.
learnSch_history_f1_task: Tambayi: Wanene ya rubuta wannan? Yaushe? Ga masu sauraro? Menene mahangarsu?
learnSch_history_f1_kp0: Bias ba ya sa tushe mara amfani - yana bayyana ra'ayin marubucin duniya.
learnSch_history_f1_kp1: Secondary sources interpret primary sources: textbooks, biographies, documentaries.
learnSch_history_f1_kp2: Ask: Who wrote this? When? For what audience? What is their perspective?
learnSch_history_f1_kp3: Bias does not make a source useless — it reveals the author’s worldview.
learnSch_history_f1_kp4: Tabbatarwa: bincika tushen akan wasu shaidu don tantance abin dogaro.
learnSch_geography_f0_name: Geography na jiki yana nazarin abubuwan halitta na duniya - fasalin ƙasa, koguna, yanayi, da yanayin muhalli. Fahimtar yanayin ƙasa na zahiri yana bayyana dalilin da yasa birane, hanyoyin kasuwanci, da wayewa suka bunƙasa inda suka yi.
learnSch_geography_f0_desc: Bayyana dalilin da yasa girgizar asa ke faruwa tare da "Ring of Fire" ta amfani da tectonics.
learnSch_geography_f0_task: Plate tectonics: An raba ɓawon ƙasa zuwa faranti waɗanda ke motsawa, suna haifar da girgizar ƙasa da volcanoes.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp0: Zagayowar ruwa: evaporation → condensation → hazo → runoff → maimaita.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp1: Yankunan yanayi: wurare masu zafi, m, matsananciyar yanayi, nahiya, iyakacin duniya.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp2: Tsarin kogi yana da tushe (ƙasa mai tsayi), ƙorafi, da baki (inda ya haɗu da teku).
learnSch_geography_f0_kp3: Hatsari na halitta ( girgizar ƙasa, ambaliya, guguwa) ana siffanta su ta hanyar yanayin ƙasa.
learnSch_geography_f0_tp2: Tarihin Dan Adam || Geography na ɗan adam yana nazarin yadda mutane ke hulɗa da muhallinsu da yadda suke tsara sararin samaniya. Batutuwa sun haɗa da inda mutane ke rayuwa, dalilin da yasa birane ke girma, da yadda tattalin arzikin ya bambanta a duniya.
learnSch_geography_f1_name: Kwatanta kasashe biyu ta HDI. Gano dalilai guda biyu wanda zai iya zama mafi girma fiye da ɗayan.
learnSch_geography_f1_desc: Yawan jama'a = mutane ÷ yanki. M a cikin yankunan bakin teku da kuma m; masu yawa a cikin hamada da tsaunuka.
learnSch_geography_f1_task: Compare two countries by their HDI. Identify two reasons one might rank higher than the other.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp0: Population density = people ÷ area. Dense in coastal and fertile regions; sparse in deserts and mountains.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp1: Birane: mutane suna ƙaura daga karkara zuwa birane don ayyukan yi da ayyuka.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp2: Abubuwan turawa suna korar mutane (misali talauci, rikici); abubuwan ja suna jan hankalin su (misali ayyuka, aminci).
learnSch_geography_f1_kp3: Haɗin kai: kaya, babban birni, mutane, da ra'ayoyi suna tafiya a kan iyakoki cikin 'yanci.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp4: Ana iya auna ci gaba ta hanyar GDP ta kowane mutum, tsammanin rayuwa, da ilimi (HDI).
learnSch_economics_f0_desc: Microeconomics yana nazarin yadda mutane da kamfanoni ke yanke shawara game da albarkatu. Yana bayyana yadda aka saita farashi, dalilin da yasa kasuwanni ke yin kasala a wasu lokuta, da yadda abubuwan ƙarfafawa suke tsara ɗabi'a.
learnSch_economics_f0_task: Idan farashin kofi ya tashi, menene zai faru da buƙatar shayi? Yi bayani ta amfani da kayan maye.
learnSch_economics_f0_kp0: Buƙata: yayin da farashin ya faɗi, adadin da ake buƙata yana ƙaruwa (dangantaka ta bambanta).
learnSch_economics_f0_kp1: Kayayyaki: yayin da farashin ya tashi, adadin da aka kawo yana ƙaruwa (dangantaka kai tsaye).
learnSch_economics_f0_kp2: Ma'auni: inda wadata ya cika buƙatu - farashin share kasuwa.
learnSch_economics_f0_kp3: Nauyi yana auna yadda buƙatu mai mahimmanci ko wadata yake ga canje-canjen farashi.
learnSch_economics_f0_kp4: Rashin kasuwa: lokacin da kasuwanni ke samar da yawa (mara kyau waje) ko kadan (kayan jama'a).
learnSch_economics_f1_desc: Kuɗin sirri yana taimaka muku sarrafa kuɗin ku cikin hikima. Fahimtar tsarin kasafin kuɗi, adanawa, da ƙima yana nufin za ku iya yanke shawara mai zurfi cikin rayuwar ku.
learnSch_economics_f1_task: Kuna samun € 800 / watan. Lissafin nau'ikan kuɗi 5 kuma ware kasafin kuɗi don kowane wanda ya ƙara har zuwa € 800.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp0: Kasafin kudi na bin diddigin kudin shiga da kashe kudi. Ku kashe ƙasa da abin da kuke samu don adanawa.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp1: Sha'awa mai sauƙi: I = P × r × t (Babban ƙimar × lokaci).
learnSch_economics_f1_kp2: Haɗin riba yana haɓaka tanadi da yawa - fara da wuri.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp3: Credit: rance yanzu da kuma biya daga baya tare da riba; yi amfani da shi a hankali.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp4: Asusun gaggawa ya kamata ya rufe watanni 3-6 na kudade.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_name: Geology yana nazarin tsarin duniya, duwatsun da aka yi da su, da kuma yadda take canzawa a kan lokaci. Duniya tana da kimanin shekaru biliyan 4.5. Yadudduka - ɓawon burodi, alkyabba, babban cibiya, ainihin ciki - suna da kaddarorin daban-daban.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_desc: Ruwan lava yana sanyi kuma yana taurare. Wane nau'in dutsen ne? Menene zai iya juya shi zuwa dutsen metamorphic akan lokaci?
learnSch_earth_science_f0_task: Zagayowar dutse: igneous → sedimentary → metamorphic → komawa zuwa magma.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp0: Duwatsu masu banƙyama suna fitowa daga magma mai sanyaya ko lava (misali granite, basalt).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp1: Duwatsun da ke ɓarkewa suna fitowa daga ɗigon ruwa da aka matsa (misali dutse yashi, farar ƙasa).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp2: Ana canza duwatsun metamorphic ta zafi da matsa lamba (misali marmara, slate).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp3: Plate tectonics yana bayanin girgizar ƙasa, volcanoes, da ginin tsaunuka.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_tp1: Plate tectonics || Girgizar kasa || Tushen Astronomy
learnSch_earth_science_f0_tp2: Astronomy yana nazarin duk abin da ya wuce Duniya - taurari, taurari, taurari, da sararin samaniya kanta. Tsarin mu na hasken rana ya samo asali ne kimanin shekaru biliyan 4.6 da suka wuce. An kiyasta sararin samaniya ya kai shekaru biliyan 13.8.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_name: Ƙididdige: haske yana tafiya a 300,000 km/s. Yaya nisa haske ke tafiya a cikin minti 1? A cikin awa 1?
learnSch_earth_science_f1_desc: Tsarin mu na hasken rana: taurari 8 suna kewaya rana. Order: Mercury, Venus, Duniya, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_task: Taurari suna samar da makamashi ta hanyar haɗakar nukiliya: hydrogen atoms sun haɗu don samar da helium.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp0: Shekarar haske ita ce tazarar da haske ke tafiya a cikin shekara guda (≈9.46km tiriliyan).
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp1: Hanyar Milky ita ce taurarinmu; ya ƙunshi taurari sama da biliyan 200.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp2: Ka'idar Big Bang: sararin samaniya ya fara ne a matsayin zafi mai tsananin zafi, mai yawa - shekaru biliyan 13.8 da suka wuce.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp4: Taurari da taurari || Binciken sararin samaniya
learnSch_earth_science_f1_tp1: Kiwon lafiya na sirri ya ƙunshi halaye da zaɓuɓɓuka waɗanda ke shafar lafiyar jikin ku da ta hankali. Ƙananan ayyuka na yau da kullum - barci, abinci mai gina jiki, motsa jiki - suna da tasiri na dogon lokaci akan lafiya.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_tp2: Shirya daidaitaccen abinci tare da aƙalla ƙungiyoyin abinci 4. Gano sinadarai guda ɗaya da aikinsa ga kowane abinci.
learnSch_health_title: Manya suna buƙatar sa'o'i 7-9 na barci kowace dare; matasa suna buƙatar sa'o'i 8-10.
learnSch_health_f0_name: Daidaitaccen abinci ya haɗa da carbohydrates, sunadarai, fats lafiya, bitamin, da ma'adanai.
learnSch_health_f0_desc: Ayyukan motsa jiki na yau da kullum (minti 150 / mako matsakaici matsakaici) yana rage haɗarin cututtuka.
learnSch_health_f0_task: Plan a balanced meal with at least 4 food groups. Identify one nutrient and its function for each food.
learnSch_health_f0_kp0: Adults need 7–9 hours of sleep per night; teenagers need 8–10 hours.
learnSch_health_f0_kp1: A balanced diet includes carbohydrates, proteins, healthy fats, vitamins, and minerals.
learnSch_health_f0_kp2: Regular physical activity (150 min/week moderate intensity) reduces disease risk.
learnSch_health_f0_kp3: Rashin ruwa: nufin ≈2 lita na ruwa kowace rana dangane da aiki da yanayi.
learnSch_health_f0_kp4: Kiwon lafiya na rigakafi: dubawa na yau da kullun, alluran rigakafi, da ziyartar hakora.
learnSch_health_f1_desc: Lafiyar tunani yana da mahimmanci kamar lafiyar jiki. Ya shafi yadda muke tunani, ji, da kuma ayyuka. Fahimtar damuwa da motsin rai - da kuma inda za a sami taimako - fasaha ce ta rayuwa.
learnSch_health_f1_task: Jerin hanyoyin lafiya guda 3 da kuke sarrafa damuwa. Bayyana dalilin da yasa kowace dabara ke aiki ta jiki ko ta hankali.
learnSch_health_f1_kp0: Damuwa amsa ce ta al'ada ga kalubale; matsananciyar damuwa yana cutar da lafiya.
learnSch_health_f1_kp1: Dabarun: zurfin numfashi, motsa jiki na jiki, magana da wani, sarrafa lokaci.
learnSch_health_f1_kp2: Damuwa da damuwa suna da yawa - su ne yanayin likita, ba rauni ba.
learnSch_health_f1_kp3: Taimakawa aboki: saurare ba tare da hukunci ba, ƙarfafa goyon bayan sana'a.
learnSch_health_f1_kp4: Barci, motsa jiki, da haɗin gwiwar zamantakewa suna inganta lafiyar kwakwalwa.
learnSch_arts_f0_desc: Zane-zane na gani suna bayyana ra'ayoyi, motsin rai, da labarai ta hotuna da abubuwa. Zane, zane, sassaka, da ƙira duk suna amfani da abubuwan tushe iri ɗaya: layi, siffa, launi, rubutu, sarari, da tsari.
learnSch_arts_f0_task: Zana kowane abu ta amfani da layin kwane-kwane kawai (shaci kawai). Sannan inuwa wuri guda don nuna zurfin ciki.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp0: Dabarar launi: na farko (ja, rawaya, shuɗi) → sakandare (orange, kore, violet).
learnSch_arts_f0_kp1: Launuka masu dacewa suna zama gaba da juna akan dabaran (ja-kore, shuɗi-orange).
learnSch_arts_f0_kp2: Abun ciki: yadda aka tsara abubuwa. Doka ta uku tana raba firam zuwa sassa daidai 9.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp3: Layi: na iya ba da shawarar motsi, motsin rai, shugabanci.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp4: Wuri mara kyau: bangon da ke kewaye da wani batu - yana da mahimmanci kamar batun kansa.
learnSch_music_f0_name: Ka'idar Kiɗa || Ka'idar kiɗa ita ce harshen kiɗa. Yana bayyana yadda aka tsara sautuna cikin waƙoƙi, jituwa, da kari. Karanta alamar waƙa kamar karanta taswirar sauti ne.
learnSch_music_f0_desc: Tafawa kidan wakar da kuka sani. Rubuta ta ta amfani da dogayen (—) da gajerun (·) alamomi. Buga nawa a kowace mashaya?
learnSch_music_f0_task: Pitch: girman ko ƙasƙantar sauti. An auna a cikin Hz.
learnSch_music_f0_kp0: Bayanan kula akan ma'aikatan: Layin clef (EGBDF), sarari (FACE).
learnSch_music_f0_kp1: Beat = bugun bugun zuciya. Tempo = gudun (BPM). Rhythm = tsarin sauti mai tsawo da gajere.
learnSch_music_f0_kp2: Ma'auni shine jerin bayanin kula a cikin takamaiman tsari (misali babban ma'auni: gaba ɗaya-rabin-rabi-duka-duka-rabi).
learnSch_music_f0_kp3: An buga bayanin kula guda 3+ tare; manyan lambobi suna sauti mai haske, ƙananan lambobi suna ƙara duhu.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_desc: Ƙwararren jiki yana da manyan abubuwa guda huɗu: juriya na zuciya da jijiyoyin jini, ƙarfin tsoka, sassauci, da tsarin jiki. Horar da kowane yanki akai-akai yana inganta lafiya da aiki.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_task: Zana shirin motsa jiki na mako-mako na minti 30 ta amfani da ka'idar FITT. Haɗa aƙalla nau'ikan motsa jiki guda biyu.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp0: motsa jiki na motsa jiki (gudu, iyo) yana ƙarfafa zuciya da huhu.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp1: motsa jiki na anaerobic (ɗaukar nauyi, sprinting) yana ƙarfafa ƙarfin tsoka.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp2: Ci gaba da yawa: a hankali ƙara ƙarfi don ci gaba da ingantawa.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp3: Huta da dawowa shine lokacin da tsokoki suka girma da ƙarfi.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp4: Ka'idar FITT: Mitar, Ƙarfi, Lokaci, Nau'in - ginshiƙan shirin horo.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_tp2: Harshen Jamus || Nahawu da Tsarin Jumla
learnSch_german_language_title: An gina nahawun Jamusanci akan shari'o'i huɗu (Nominativ, Akkusativ, Dativ, Genitiv) waɗanda ke ƙayyadaddun suna da siffofin labarin. Fahimtar shari'o'i shine mabuɗin ƙirƙirar jimlolin Jamusanci daidai.
learnSch_german_language_f0_name: Sake rubutawa a cikin akwati daidai: 'Der Hund (beißen) ___ Mann.' Saka madaidaicin labarin Akkusativ don 'Mann'.
learnSch_german_language_f0_desc: Nominativ = batun (Wane ne yake yin aikin?). Akkusativ = abu kai tsaye (Me?). Dativ = abu kai tsaye (Don / ga wane?). Genitiv = mallaka.
learnSch_german_language_f0_task: Takaitattun labarai suna canzawa ta hanyar shari'a: der/die/das (Nom.) → den/die/das (Akk.) → dem/der/dem (Dat.).
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp0: Matsayin fi'ili: a cikin manyan jumla, fi'ili koyaushe shine na biyu. A cikin sassan da ke ƙasa, fi'ili yana zuwa ƙarshe.
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp1: Ƙarshen sifa yana canzawa dangane da labarin da shari'ar (ƙarfi, rauni, ƙaddamarwa gauraye).
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp2: Verb position: in main clauses, the verb is always second. In subordinate clauses, the verb goes to the end.
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp3: Adjective endings change depending on the article and case (strong, weak, mixed declension).
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp4: Modal fi'ili (können, müssen, dürfen, sollen, wollen, mögen) ko da yaushe suna tare da rashin iyaka a ƙarshe.
learnSch_german_language_f1_desc: Binciken rubutun Jamus yana koya muku gano na'urorin adabi, fassara ma'ana, da rubuta gardama da aka tsara. Waɗannan basirar sun shafi waqoqi, gajerun labarai, da kuma dogon zance.
learnSch_german_language_f1_task: Nemo kwatance ɗaya da simi ɗaya a cikin gajeriyar waƙar Jamusanci. Rubuta jimla ɗaya don bayyana ma'anar kowannensu.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp0: Bincika tsari: gabatarwa, babban jiki, ƙarshe (Einleitung, Hauptteil, Schluss).
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp1: Na'urorin adabi: Metapher (metaphor), Vergleich (simile), Alliteration, Personifikation.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp2: Textsorte al'amura: ana nazarin waka daban da rahoton labarai.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp3: Rubuce-rubucen (Waɗannan) + shaida (Beleg) + sharhi (Deutung) = daidaitaccen tsarin bincike.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp4: Maganar kai tsaye tana amfani da Konjunktiv I: Er sagt, er könne helfen.
learnSch_german_language_f2_desc: Kyakkyawan rubutun Jamusanci daidai ne, ingantaccen tsari, kuma yana amfani da bambance-bambancen ƙamus da tsayin jimla. Aiwatar da nau'ikan rubutu daban-daban na haɓaka kwarin gwiwa ga jarrabawa da sadarwa ta zahiri.
learnSch_german_language_f2_task: Rubuta Erörterung jumla 5 akan: 'Sollten Smartphones in der Schule verboten werden?' Yi amfani da 'einerseits…andererseits'.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp0: Erörterung (maƙalar tattaunawa) tana gabatar da gardama na ƙira da sabani da ƙarshe na sirri.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp1: Kommentar (sharhin) yana jayayya da matsayi ɗaya tare da shaida da tambayoyin maganganu.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp2: Zusammenfassung (taƙaice): taƙaitacce, mutum na uku, halin yanzu, babu ra'ayi.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp3: Bambance farkon jumla: yi amfani da haɗin kai (weil, obwohl, damit, wenn) don hadaddun sifofi.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp4: Alamun rubutu: waƙafi a gaban duk juzu'i na ƙasa (Nebensätze).
learnSch_religion_ethics_title: Addini & Ladabi || Addinin Duniya || Fahimtar manyan addinan duniya yana taimakawa haɓaka mutuntawa, tausayawa, da ilimin al'adu. Kowace al'ada tana ba da amsoshi na musamman ga tambayoyi game da rayuwa, mutuwa, adalci, da ma'ana.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_name: Kwatanta yadda addinai biyu da ka yi nazari suka amsa wannan tambayar: 'Me ke faruwa bayan mutuwa?' Rubuta jimloli 3 ga kowane.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_desc: Kiristanci: bangaskiya ga Allah ɗaya, Yesu a matsayin mai ceto; rubutu mai tsarki = Littafi Mai Tsarki; mabiya biliyan 2.4.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_task: Musulunci: imani da Allah, Muhammadu a matsayin annabi; rubutu mai tsarki = Alqur'ani; ginshiƙai guda biyar suna jagorantar rayuwar yau da kullun.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp0: Yahudanci: tauhidi; Attaura (Littafi Mai Tsarki na Ibrananci); 613 dokokin (mitzvot); ~ 15 miliyan mabiya.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp1: Hindu: alloli da yawa, ainihin gaskiya ɗaya (Brahman); ra'ayoyi na karma, dharma, reincarnation.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp2: Buddha: koyarwar Buddha; Gaskiya Hudu Masu Girma, Tafarki Takwas; manufa = Nirvana ('yanci daga wahala).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_tp1: Ethics tambaya: menene daidai da kuskure, kuma me yasa? Babban ka'idodin ɗabi'a suna ba da tsari daban-daban don yanke shawarar ɗabi'a. Fahimtar su yana taimaka muku yin tunani game da rikice-rikice na duniya.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_desc: Ethics asks: what is right and wrong, and why? The main ethical theories give different frameworks for making moral decisions. Understanding them helps you reason about real-world dilemmas.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_task: Mota mai tuka kanta dole ne ta zaɓi: bugi mutum 1 ko ta karkace kuma ta buga 5. Yi nazarin wannan matsala daga mai amfani DA hangen nesa na deontological.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp0: Consequentialism (misali Utilitarianism): yin hukunci da ayyuka ta sakamakonsu. Mafi kyawun kyau ga mafi girman lamba (Bentham, Mill).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp1: Deontology (Kant): wasu ayyukan suna daidai ko kuskure a kansu, ba tare da la'akari da sakamakon ba. Babban Mahimmanci: Yi kawai yadda za ku iya kowa zai yi aiki.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp2: Da'a na nagarta (Aristotle): mayar da hankali kan hali, ba dokoki ba. Mutumin kirki yana zabar ma'anar zinare tsakanin wuce gona da iri.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp3: Contractarianism (Rawls): Adalci shine abin da mutane masu hankali za su yarda da shi a bayan 'rufin jahilci' (rashin sanin matsayinsu a cikin al'umma).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp4: Halayen da aka yi amfani da su: yadda waɗannan ra'ayoyin ke sanar da muhawara ta ainihi - euthanasia, 'yancin dabba, AI, adalcin yanayi.
learnSch_social_studies_title: Dimokuradiyya da Gwamnati || Fahimtar yadda gwamnatoci ke aiki yana da mahimmanci don zama ɗan ƙasa mai aiki. Tsarin dimokuradiyya yana kare haƙƙoƙi, raba iko, da bai wa ƴan ƙasa dama ta hanyar zaɓe.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_name: Yi bayanin rassa uku na gwamnati a ƙasarku. Ka ba da misali ɗaya na ikon kowane reshe.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_desc: Dimokuradiyya: mulki ya rataya a wuyan jama'a, ana bayyana shi ta hanyar zabuka masu 'yanci da kare hakkinsu.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_task: Rarraba iko: majalisa (tana yin dokoki), zartarwa (aiwatar da dokoki), shari'a (tana fassara dokokin).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp0: Tsarin tarayya yana raba iko tsakanin gwamnatocin tsakiya da na yanki (misali Jamus, Amurka).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp1: Haƙƙoƙin ɗan adam na duniya ne, haƙƙoƙin da ba za a iya raba su ba (misali sanarwar Majalisar Dinkin Duniya game da haƙƙin ɗan adam, 1948).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp2: Tsarin majalisa da tsarin shugaban kasa: a tsarin majalisa bangaren zartarwa yana fitowa ne daga majalisa.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp4: Parliamentary vs presidential systems: in parliamentary systems the executive comes from the legislature.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_desc: Al'adu, tattalin arziki, cibiyoyi, da sojojin tarihi ne ke tsara al'umma. Ilimin zamantakewa da nazarin al'adu yana taimaka mana fahimtar rashin daidaito, ainihi, da canjin zamantakewa.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_task: Ka ba da misali ɗaya na yadda haɗin gwiwar duniya ya canza rayuwar yau da kullun a ƙasarku. Shin tasirin yana da inganci, mara kyau, ko duka biyun? Bayyana.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp0: Zamantakewa: tsarin da mutane ke koyon ka'idoji, dabi'u, da matsayin al'ummarsu.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp1: Ƙimar zamantakewa: tsarin rashin daidaituwa a cikin al'umma (aji, jinsi, kabilanci).
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp2: Al'adu: dabi'u, imani, ayyuka, da alamomin da ke haɗa ƙungiya tare.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp3: Haɗin gwiwar duniya ya haɓaka musayar al'adu da dogaro da tattalin arziki.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp4: Ilimin jarida: kimanta tushe don son zuciya, hangen nesa, da shaida muhimmin fasaha ne na ƙarni na 21.
learnSch_philosophy_title: Epistemology tambaya: me za mu iya sani, kuma ta yaya muka san shi? Yana bincika tushe da iyakokin ilimin ɗan adam - dalili, gogewa, fahimta, da iko.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_name: Shin zai yiwu a san wani abu tare da cikakken tabbaci? Rubuta amsa mai jimilla 4 daga mai hankali da hangen nesa.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_desc: Rationalism (Descartes, Kant): hankali shine tushen ilimi na farko. 'Cogito ergo sum' - Ina tsammanin, saboda haka ni ne.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_task: Empiricism (Locke, Hume): ilimi yana zuwa daga gwaninta na azanci. Hankali yana farawa azaman faifai mara kyau (tabula rasa).
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp0: Shakku: ya kamata mu yi shakka duk da'awar kuma mu yarda da abin da za a iya tabbatarwa kawai.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp1: Justified True Belief (Plato): ilimi = wani abu gaskiya ne, ka yarda da shi, kuma kana da barata.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp2: Skepticism: we should doubt all claims and accept only what can be proven.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp3: Justified True Belief (Plato): knowledge = something is true, you believe it, and you have justification.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp4: Matsalolin Gettier sun nuna cewa gaskata gaskiya ba koyaushe ya isa ga ilimi ba.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_name: Menene hankali? Shin muna da 'yancin yin zaɓi na gaske? Waɗannan tambayoyin suna zaune ne a tsaka-tsakin falsafar, ilimin halin ɗan adam, da rayuwar yau da kullun.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_desc: Shin ’yan adam da gaske ne ’yanci? Rubuta hujjar jimla 5 ko dai don dacewa ko ƙayyadaddun ƙayyadaddun ƙayyadaddun ƙayyadaddun ƙayyadaddun bayanai.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_task: Dualism (Descartes): hankali da jiki abubuwa ne daban. Matsala: yaya suke mu'amala?
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp0: Physicalism: hankali gabaɗaya samfurin aikin kwakwalwa ne.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp1: Ayyukan aiki: ana bayyana jihohin tunani ta hanyar aikinsu, ba kayan jikinsu ba.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp2: Matsala mai wuyar fahimta: me yasa aikin jiki ke haifar da ƙwarewar tunani?
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp3: Compatibilism: 'yancin nufin da ƙaddara na iya kasancewa tare - 'yanci = yin aiki bisa ga dalilan ku, koda kuwa an haifar da su.
learnSch_technology_f0_name: Tunanin ƙira wata hanya ce ta ɗan adam don magance matsalolin ƙirƙira da tsari. Ana amfani da shi a cikin ƙirar samfura, injiniyanci, UX, da haɓakawa a duk masana'antu.
learnSch_technology_f0_desc: Zaɓi matsala a makarantar ku. Aiwatar da matakan tunani na ƙira 3 na farko: bayyana matsalar, ayyana wanda abin ya shafa, da samar da ra'ayoyi 3.
learnSch_technology_f0_task: Matakai 5: Tausayi → Ƙayyade → Ideate → Prototype → Gwaji.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp0: 5 stages: Empathize → Define → Ideate → Prototype → Test.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp1: Tausayi: fahimtar ainihin bukatun masu amfani ta hanyar bincike da lura.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp2: Ideate: samar da ra'ayoyi da yawa ba tare da hukunci ba; yawa kafin inganci.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp3: Prototype: gina samfura masu sauri, masu arha don gwada ra'ayoyi kafin saka hannun jari.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp4: Iteration: zane shine zagayowar; feedback inganta kowane version.
learnSch_technology_f1_name: Karatun Dijital da AI || Karatun dijital yana nufin fahimtar yadda fasaha ke aiki, yadda ake amfani da bayanai, da yadda ake kewaya duniyar dijital cikin aminci da mahimmanci. AI yana canza kowane fanni.
learnSch_technology_f1_desc: Jera nau'ikan bayanan sirri guda 3 da wayarka ke tattarawa. Ga kowane, bayyana haɗari ɗaya da fa'ida ɗaya na wannan tarin bayanai.
learnSch_technology_f1_task: Algorithms matakai ne mataki-mataki da kwamfuta ke bi. Suna ikon bincike, shawarwari, da AI.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp0: Koyon na'ura: tsarin da ke inganta daga bayanai ba tare da an tsara su ba.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp1: Sirrin bayanai: fahimtar abin da apps ke tattarawa game da ku da yadda ake amfani da shi.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp2: Ba daidai ba: zurfafan karya, tace kumfa, da haɓaka algorithmic suna yin ƙima mai mahimmanci.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp3: Tushen tsaro na yanar gizo: yi amfani da kalmomin shiga masu ƙarfi, kunna 2FA, gane yunƙurin satar bayanan sirri.
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_desc: Ana rubuta Larabci dama-zuwa-hagu (RTL) ta amfani da haruffa 28. Siffofin haruffa suna canzawa dangane da matsayi a cikin kalma (farko, tsakiya, ƙarshe, keɓe). Larabci yana amfani da larabci na Gabas-Indices (٠١٢٣٤٥٦٧٨٩) - Lambobin Yamma 0-9 an samo su a tarihi daga waɗannan.
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_task: Rubuta lambobin 1-10 a Larabci na Gabas-Indic (١ ٢ ٣ ...). Kwatanta kowanne da takwaransa na Yamma. Sannan rubuta kalmar larabci don "lambar" (رقم – raqm).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp0: Ana karanta Larabci kuma ana rubuta shi daga dama zuwa hagu (RTL).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp1: Haruffa na da haruffa 28; yawancin baƙaƙe ne. Sau da yawa ana nuna wasula a matsayin ƙwararru (Harakat).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp2: Kowane harafi yana da har zuwa nau'i 4: ware (م), na farko (مـ), medial (ـمـ), ƙarshe (ـم).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp3: Larabci na amfani da larabci na Gabas-Indic: ٠ ١ ٢ ٣ ٤ ٥ ٦ ٧ ٨ ٩ (0-9). Lambobin Yammacin Turai 0-9 sun samo asali ne daga waɗannan ta hanyar ilimin lissafi na Islama na tsaka-tsaki - kalmar "lambobin Larabci" a yammacin haƙiƙa suna nufin waɗannan asalin Gabas.
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp4: Adadin Larabci na Zamani (Fuṣḥā) ana amfani da shi wajen ilimi da kafofin watsa labarai; Yarukan Darija/Levantine/Gulf sun bambanta da yanki.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_name: Nahawun Larabci ya dogara ne akan tushen harafi uku (جذور) waɗanda ke haifar da kalmomi masu alaƙa. Sunaye suna da jinsi na nahawu (namiji/mace), lamba (maɗaukaki/dual/jam'i), da harka. Ana haɗa kalmomi ga mutum, jinsi, da lamba.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_desc: Gano tushen haruffan: كَاتِب (marubuci), مَكْتُوب (rubuta), كِتَابَة (rubuta). Menene tushen gama gari?
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_task: Tushen tushen uku: tushen ك-ت-ب (k-t-b) yana bada: كَتَبَ (kataba, ya rubuta), كتَاب (kitāb, book), مَكْتَبَة (maktaba, library).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp0: Sunayen suna na namiji ne ko na mace. Sunayen mata yawanci suna ƙarewa da ة (tā' marbūṭa).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp1: Dual yana samuwa ne ta hanyar ƙara ان- (nominative) zuwa suna: كِتَابَان = littattafai guda biyu.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp2: Jam'i mai karye: yawancin jam'in Larabci suna canza wasulan na ciki, misali. كِتَاب → كُتُب (littattafai).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp3: Verb-subject-object (VSO) shine tsohuwar tsarin kalma a cikin Larabci na gargajiya; SVO na kowa a Larabci na Zamani.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_name: Kalmomi da Larabci na yau da kullum
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_desc: Gina ƙamus na Larabci yana da sauƙi da zarar kun fahimci tushen tsarin. Gaisuwa na gama gari, lambobi, da kalmomin yau da kullun suna ba ku tushe don sadarwa ta gaske.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_task: Fassara zuwa Larabci: 'Ya karanta littafi.' (هو يقرأ كتاباً). Sannan rubuta jimlar ta amfani da tsari na gargajiya na fi'ili-farko (VSO).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp0: Gaisuwa: السلام عليكم (As-salāmu ‘alaykum) — Assalamu alaikum. Martani: وعليكم السلام.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp1: Lambobi: وَاحِد (1), اثْنَان (2), ثَلَاثة (3), أَرْبَعَة (4), خَمْسَة (5), سَتَّة (6), سَبْعَة (7), ثَمَانِيَة), ثَمَانِيَة (8), عتَة (8) (10).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp2: Ranaku: الأحد (Lahadi), الاثنين (Litinin), الثلاثاء (Talata), الأربعاء (Laraba), الخميس (Alhamis), الجمعة (Jumma'a), السبت (Asabar).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp3: Kalmomin gama-gari: ذَهَبَ (dhahaba, don tafi), أَكَلَ (akala, don ci), قَرَأَ (qara'a, karantawa), كَتَبَ (kataba, rubutawa).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp4: Formal vs informal: Ana amfani da Larabci na zamani a fannin ilimi; harsunan harshe sun bambanta a cikin ƙasashen Larabawa.
learnSch_french_language_f0_desc: Lafazin Faransanci na iya zama ƙalubale ga masu magana da Ingilishi saboda wasulan hanci, haruffan shiru, da haɗin kai. Kwarewar sautuna da wuri yana sa magana da fahimta sosai.
learnSch_french_language_f0_task: Karanta da ƙarfi: 'Les enfants ont un ami anglais.' Alama waɗanne haɗin gwiwar da kuke buƙatar yin. Yi aiki sau 3.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp0: Wasulan hanci: en/em, in/im/ain/ein, on/om, un — ba a furta kalmar ƙarshe: 'bon' = /bɔ̃/.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp1: Haruffa na shiru: baƙaƙe na ƙarshe yawanci shiru ne (misali 'vous' = /vu/), sai dai kafin wasali (magana).
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp2: Haɗin kai: baƙar magana na ƙarshe shiru ana furtawa lokacin da kalma ta gaba ta fara da wasali: 'les amis' = /le.z‿ami/.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp3: R a cikin Faransanci sautin guttural ne (uvular), sabanin Ingilishi r.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp4: Alamomin lafazi: é (rufe e), è (buɗe e), ê (na tarihi), ç (taushi c = /s/), î, ô, û (mafi yawan tarihi).
learnSch_french_language_f1_desc: Nahawu na Faransanci yana amfani da sunaye na jinsi, haɗin kai tsakanin mutane 6, da kewayon lokuta. Mafi mahimmancin fasaha shine ƙware na yanzu, da (passé composé), da rashin cikar lokaci.
learnSch_french_language_f1_task: Haɗa 'parler' (don yin magana) a halin yanzu don duk mutane 6. Sannan rubuta jimloli 2 ta amfani da rubutaccen rubutu.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp0: Duk sunayen Faransanci na namiji ne ko na mata: le livre (m.), la table (f.). Labarai sun yarda: un/une, le/la, les.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp1: Siffofin sun yarda a cikin jinsi da lamba: un grand livre / une grande maison.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp2: Passé composé = avoir/être + participle na baya: j'ai mangé (Na ci), il est allé (ya tafi).
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp3: Imperfect (imparfait) yana kwatanta jihohin da suka gabata: je mangeais (Ina cin abinci), il faisait chaud.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp4: Negation: ne ... pas ya kewaye fi'ili: Je ne sais pas (ban sani ba).
learnSch_french_language_f2_desc: Rubutun a cikin Faransanci yana buƙatar kulawa ga ƙa'idodin yarjejeniya, alamar rubutu (wuri kafin !? ; :), da rajista na yau da kullun. Tsararren tsari - gabatarwa, haɓakawa, ƙarewa - shine tsakiyar rubutun ilimin Faransanci.
learnSch_french_language_f2_task: Rubuta sakin layi na jumla 6 na Faransa akan lokacin da kuka fi so. Yi amfani da aƙalla masu haɗin magana guda 3 da kuma juzu'i ɗaya.
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp0: Alamun Faransanci yana ƙara sarari kafin: ; ! ? da kuma cikin "guillemets" (alamomin zance).
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp1: Subjunctive (subjonctif) yana bayyana shakka, motsin rai, ko larura: Il faut que tu viennes.
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp2: Masu haɗa magana: d'abord (na farko), ensuite/puis (sannan), enfin (ƙarshe), cependant (duk da haka), en effet (hakika).
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp3: Tsarin da ba na mutum ba ne gama gari: Il est muhimmi de + infinitive; A kan peut dire que...
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp4: Tsarin wasiƙa: Madame/Monsieur (buɗewa na yau da kullun), Veuillez agréer l'expression de mes salutations distinuées (kusa na yau da kullun).
learnSch_spanish_language_title: Harshen Sifen || Lafazin Lafazin Da Tushe
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_name: Mutanen Espanya harshe ne da ya dace da sauti - ana furta kalmomi daidai kamar yadda aka rubuta. Wannan ya sa ya zama ɗaya daga cikin yarukan da aka fi samun dama ga masu farawa. Kwarewar tsarin sauti da lafazin da wuri shine mabuɗin.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_desc: Alama damuwa a: universidad, hablar, árbol, joven. Aiwatar da tsohuwar ƙa'idar kuma bincika wacce ke buƙatar alamar lafazin.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_task: Mutanen Espanya suna da tsattsauran wasali guda 5: a, e, i, o, u - duk ana furta su akai-akai.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp0: Harafin ñ yayi kama da 'ny' (España, mañana). Sau biyun ll yayi kama da 'y' a yawancin yarukan.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp1: Damuwa: kalmomin da ke ƙarewa a cikin wasali, n, ko s ana ƙarfafa su akan saƙo na biyu zuwa na ƙarshe. Alamomin lafazi (á, é) sun soke wannan.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp2: Harafin h koyaushe shiru ne: hola = /ola/.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp3: Yaruka: Castilian (Spain) yana amfani da /θ/ don c/z; Mutanen Espanya na Latin Amurka suna amfani da /s/.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_name: Nahawun Mutanen Espanya tsari ne kuma na yau da kullun. Kwarewar jinsi na suna, haɗakar kalmomi, da abubuwan da suka gabata (preterite da ajizanci) yana ba ku kayan aikin don sadarwa cikin aminci.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_desc: Spanish grammar is systematic and regular. Mastering noun gender, verb conjugations, and the two past tenses (preterite and imperfect) gives you the tools to communicate confidently.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_task: Bayyana lokacin amfani da ser vs. estar. Rubuta jimlolin misali guda 4: 2 tare da ser, 2 tare da estar.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp0: Sunayen suna na namiji ko na mata: el libro (m.), la mesa (f.). Siffofin sun yarda: un libro interesante / una mesa interesante.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp1: Ser vs. estar: dukansu suna nufin 'zama'. Ser = halaye na dindindin; estar = jihohin wucin gadi: Soy médico / Estoy cansado.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp2: Preterite (indefinido) = kammalawa ya wuce: Ayer comí pizza. Imperfecto (imperfecto) = ci gaba da ya wuce: Cuando era niño, jugaba...
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp3: Maganganun maganganu: me lavo (Na wanke kaina), se llama (sunansa/ta).
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp4: Subjunctive don buri/shakku: Quiero que vengas. Yana yiwuwa que llueva.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_name: Rubutun Mutanen Espanya yana biye da ƙayyadaddun ƙa'idodi. Rubutun ilimi suna amfani da rajista na yau da kullun, yayin da sadarwa ta yau da kullun tana da dumi da kuma kai tsaye. Ƙaƙƙarfan umarni na masu haɗawa da ƙaddamarwa yana haɓaka rubutun ku.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_desc: Rubuta gajeren imel (jumloli 6) cikin Mutanen Espanya gayyatar aboki zuwa bikin ranar haihuwa. Yi amfani da rajista na yau da kullun da na yau da kullun - sannan kwatanta su.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_task: Mutanen Espanya suna amfani da jujjuyawar tambaya ¿ da alamar motsin rai a farkon jimloli.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp0: Rijista na yau da kullun: an yi amfani da ku (ku na yau da kullun), babu ƙanƙara, mai jujjuyawa don buƙatun ladabi.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp1: Masu haɗawa: sin embargo (duk da haka), además (ƙara haka), por lo tanto (sabili da haka), aunque (ko da yake), es decir (wato).
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp2: Bude wasiƙa: Estimado/a Sr./Sra. + sunan mahaifi. Rufewa: Le saluda atentamente / Un cordial saludo.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp3: Tsarin muqala: introducción (tesis), desarrollo (argumentos con ejemplos), ƙarshe.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp4: Formal vs. rajista na yau da kullun
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f0_: Nahawun Ingilishi yana da sauƙin sauƙi a tsari amma yana da alamu marasa tsari da yawa. Fahimtar lokuta, labarai, da fi'ilai na modal shine mabuɗin don ingantaccen sadarwa.
Sake rubuta waɗannan jimloli masu aiki da murya mai ƙarfi: (1) 'Malamin ya bayyana darasin.' (2) 'Masana kimiyya sun gano wani sabon nau'i.'
Turanci yana da jimlar fi'ili 12. Mafi na kowa: yanzu mai sauƙi (Ina aiki), ci gaba na yanzu (Ina aiki), mai sauƙi (Na yi aiki), cikakke yanzu (Na yi aiki).
Labarai: 'a/an' don sunaye marasa takamaiman (littafi); 'da' don takamaiman sunaye (littafin da muka tattauna).
Modal fi'ili (iya, iya, dole, ya kamata, so, so, iya, maiyuwa, mai yiwuwa) bayyana iyawa, izini, wajibi, ko yuwuwar.
Sharuɗɗa: Idan + sauƙi mai sauƙi → zai + rashin iyaka (sharadi na biyu: Idan ina da lokaci, zan yi tafiya).
Muryar m: Abun ya zama batun: 'Dalibin ne ya rubuta takardar.'
Muryar da ake so || Karatu da fahimta
Ƙarfin fahimtar karatu yana nufin fahimtar ma'anar ma'ana, yin ra'ayi, da kimanta manufar marubucin da fasaha. Yana da mahimmanci don nasarar ilimi a kowane fanni.
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f1_: Karanta kowane labarin labarai na sakin layi daya. Rubuta: (1) ainihin ra’ayin, (2) hujja ɗaya da aka bayar, (3) wataƙila maƙasudin marubucin.
Skimming: karanta da sauri don samun babban ra'ayi. Ana dubawa: bincika takamaiman bayanai.
Inference: karanta 'tsakanin layi' - menene ake nufi amma ba a faɗi kai tsaye ba?
Manufar marubuci: don sanar, lallashi, nishadantarwa, ko kwatanta.
Kalmomi a cikin mahallin: yi amfani da kalmomin da ke kewaye don aiwatar da ma'anar kalmomin da ba a san su ba.
Karatu mai mahimmanci: gano da'awar, kimanta shaida, da zato na tambaya.
Vocabulary in context: use surrounding words to work out the meaning of unknown words.
Critical reading: identify claims, evaluate evidence, and question assumptions.
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f2_: Rubutun Turanci na ilimi yana biye da ƙayyadaddun ƙa'idodi: rajista na yau da kullun, ainihin ƙamus, da tsari mai ma'ana. Kwarewar waɗannan tarurrukan na taimakawa a cikin jarrabawa, aikace-aikacen jami'a, da rayuwar ƙwararru.
Rubuta gabatarwar jimla 5 don makala akan: 'Tasirin kafofin watsa labarun akan lafiyar kwakwalwar matasa.' Haɗa bayanin rubutun.
Tsarin muqala: Gabatarwa (ƙugiya + mahallin + labarin), Jiki (ma'ana, shaida, bayani a kowane sakin layi), Ƙarshe (sake sake maimaita karatun + mahimmanci).
Bayanin Taswirar: jumla ɗaya bayyananniya mai bayyana babbar hujjar maƙalar.
Harshen shinge a rubuce-rubuce na ilimi: 'Za a iya jayayya cewa…', 'Shaida ta nuna…', 'Wannan na iya nuna…'
Guji yare na yau da kullun: kar a yi amfani da ƙanƙancewa (kada a → kada), ɓatanci, ko labari na mutum na farko sai an tambaye shi.
Nunawa: buga tushe daidai (APA, MLA, Harvard) don guje wa saɓo.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_name: Kalkule || Kalkulo shine lissafin canji. Ƙididdigar ƙididdiga ta samo ƙididdiga na canje-canje (samfurin); Ƙididdigar haɗaɗɗiyar ƙididdigewa ta samo adadin da aka tara (Integrated). Yana tallafawa ilimin kimiyyar lissafi, injiniyanci, tattalin arziki, da duk kimiyyar ƙididdiga.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_desc: Nemo abin da aka samu na f(x) = 3x³ - 2x² + 5x - 7. Nuna kowane mataki ta amfani da ka'idar wutar lantarki.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_task: Iyaka yana bayyana ƙimar da aiki ke gabatowa yayin da x ke gabatowa aya.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp0: Nasarar: f'(x) = ƙimar canji. Na f(x) = xⁿ, f'(x) = nxⁿ⁻¹ (ka'idar iko).
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp1: Derivative: f′(x) = rate of change. For f(x) = xⁿ, f′(x) = nxⁿ⁻¹ (power rule).
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp3: Integral = yanki a ƙarƙashin lanƙwasa. ∫xⁿ dx = xⁿ⁺¹/(n+1) + C.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp4: Muhimmin ka'idar ƙididdiga: bambance-bambance da haɗin kai ayyuka ne masu juzu'i.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_name: Algebra Linear || Algebra na layi shine lissafin vectors, matrices, da sauye-sauye na layi. Yana da mahimmanci a cikin koyan na'ura, zane-zanen kwamfuta, injiniyanci, da kimiyyar bayanai.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_desc: Haɓaka matrix A = [[1,2], [3,4]] ta matrix B = [[5,6], [7,8]]. Nuna duk lissafin.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_task: A vector yana da girma da alkibla. Ana iya ƙara vectors da ƙima.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp0: Matrix yana wakiltar canjin layi ko tsarin daidaitawa.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp1: Matrix multiplication ba mai haɗawa bane: AB ≠ BA gabaɗaya.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp2: Ƙaddara: scalar wanda ke nuna ko matrix baya juyewa. det(A) = 0 → ba mai jujjuyawa ba.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp3: Eigenvalues ​​da eigenvectors: Av = λv. Ana amfani dashi a PCA, physics, da Google's PageRank.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_tp2: Ƙididdiga na jami'a yana motsawa daga siffantawa zuwa rashin fahimta - ta yin amfani da bayanan samfurin don yanke shawara game da yawan jama'a. Ka'idar yiwuwa tana ba da tushe mai ƙarfi.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_name: Samfurin ɗalibai 30 yana da matsakaicin tsayi cm 170, SD 8 cm. Yi lissafin tazarar amincewa 95%.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_desc: University statistics moves from descriptive to inferential — using sample data to draw conclusions about populations. Probability theory provides the rigorous foundation.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_task: A sample of 30 students has mean height 170 cm, SD 8 cm. Calculate the 95% confidence interval.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp0: Bazuwar bazuwar: madaidaicin wanda aka ƙayyade ƙimar sa ta wani lamari bazuwar.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp1: Rarraba al'ada: lanƙwan kararrawa, ma'ana = matsakaici = yanayin; 68-95-99.7 mulki.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp2: Gwajin hasashe: H₀ (null) vs H₁ (madadin). p-darajar <0.05 → ƙi H₀.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp3: Tazarar amincewa: kewayon da sigar gaskiya ta ke tare da fayyace yuwuwar.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp4: Matsakaicin daidaituwa r: -1 = cikakke mara kyau, 0 = babu alaƙar layi, +1 = cikakkiyar tabbatacce.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_desc: Matsakaicin bambance-bambancen suna bayyana yadda yawa ke canzawa dangane da wasu adadi. Harshen ilimin kimiyyar lissafi, injiniyanci, ilmin halitta, da tattalin arziki - suna tsara komai daga haɓakar yawan jama'a zuwa sararin samaniya.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_task: Warware dy/dx = 2xy tare da y(0) = 1. Matsaloli daban-daban, haɗawa, yi amfani da yanayin farko.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp0: ODE (ma'auni na yau da kullun) ya ƙunshi abubuwan haɓakawa dangane da mai canzawa ɗaya: dy/dx = f(x, y).
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp1: ODE mai rabuwa: dy/dx = g(x) · h (y) → keɓance masu canji kuma haɗa ɓangarorin biyu.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp2: ODE mai layi na farko: dy/dx + P(x) y = Q(x), an warware shi tare da ma'auni mai haɗawa μ = e^∫P(x) dx.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp3: ODE madaidaiciyar tsari na biyu tare da ƙididdiga akai-akai: ay″ + by′ + cy = 0. Warware ta hanyar ma'auni ar² + br + c = 0.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp4: Matsalolin ƙimar farko (IVP): Yi amfani da yanayin farko da aka ba don nemo takamaiman bayani akai-akai C.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_desc: Lambobi masu rikitarwa suna fadada ainihin lambobi ta hanyar gabatar da i = √(-1). Suna da mahimmanci a aikin injiniyan lantarki, sarrafa sigina, injiniyoyi na ƙididdigewa, da bincike mai rikitarwa.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_task: Express z = 1 + i a cikin nau'in polar. Nemo modules, hujja, kuma rubuta shi azaman re^(iθ).
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp0: Lamba mai rikitarwa: z = a + bi, inda a shine ainihin sashi kuma b bangaren tunanin.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp2: Polar form: z = r (cosθ + i·sinθ) = re^(iθ) (Euler's formula).
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp3: Asalin Euler: e^(iπ) + 1 = 0 - galibi ana kiransa mafi kyawun daidaito a lissafi.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp4: Ka'idar De Moivre: (cosθ + isinθ)ⁿ = cos(nθ) + i·sin(nθ).
learnUni_physics_f0_name: Makanikai na gargajiya sun bayyana motsin abubuwa na macroscopic ta amfani da dokokin Newton. Makanikan Lagrangian da Hamiltonian sun fi ƙarfin gyare-gyaren da ake amfani da su a cikin ilimin kimiyyar lissafi.
learnUni_physics_f0_desc: Matsakaicin kilogiram 3 yana zamewa ƙasa da karkatacciyar karkata zuwa 30°. Yi lissafin haɓakarsa ta amfani da dokar Newton ta 2.
learnUni_physics_f0_task: Doka ta 2 ta Newton a cikin sigar vector: ΣF = ma.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp0: Kiyaye ƙarfin aiki: jimlar rufaffiyar tsarin yana dawwama.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp1: Kiyaye makamashi: a cikin rufaffiyar tsarin, jimlar makamashin inji yana dawwama.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp2: Angular lokacin L = Iω (lokacin inertia × saurin kusurwa).
learnUni_physics_f0_kp3: Makanikan Lagrangian: L = T - V (kinetic dena yuwuwar makamashi). Euler-Lagrange equations suna samun motsi.
learnUni_physics_f1_name: Electromagnetism || Electromagnetism yana haɗa wutar lantarki, maganadisu, da haske. Ma'auni huɗu na Maxwell gaba ɗaya sun bayyana abubuwan al'ajabi na lantarki kuma suna hasashen raƙuman lantarki.
learnUni_physics_f1_desc: Dokar Faraday ta Jiha kuma ba da aikace-aikacen ainihin duniya guda ɗaya (misali janareta na lantarki ko taswira).
learnUni_physics_f1_task: Dokokin Coulomb: F = kq₁q₂/r² (karfi tsakanin caji).
learnUni_physics_f1_kp0: Dokokin Gauss: wutar lantarki ta hanyar rufaffiyar saman ∝ cajin da aka rufe.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp1: Dokokin Faraday: canza canjin maganadisu yana haifar da EMF.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp2: Ƙididdigar Maxwell ta annabta cewa igiyoyin lantarki suna tafiya a cikin saurin haske.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp3: Haske shine igiyar wuta ta lantarki: filayen E da B suna jujjuyawa daidai da juna da kuma hanyar tafiya.
learnUni_physics_f1_tp1: Daidaiton Maxwell || Kimiyyar Computer || Tsarin Bayanai da Algorithms
learnUni_physics_f1_tp2: Tsarin bayanai yana tsara bayanai yadda ya kamata; Algorithms sarrafa shi. Zaɓin tsarin bayanan da ya dace da algorithm yana ƙayyade ko shirin yana gudana a cikin millise seconds ko sa'o'i akan manyan bayanan bayanai.
learnUni_computer_science_title: Bincika ta hanyar bincike na binary akan tsararrun tsararru [2, 5, 8, 12, 16, 23] neman 12. Matakai nawa?
learnUni_computer_science_f0_name: Array: ƙayyadaddun girman girman, O(1) samun dama. Lissafin da aka haɗa: girma mai ƙarfi, isa ga O(n).
learnUni_computer_science_f0_desc: Stack (LIFO) da Queue (FIFO): ana amfani da su a cikin tsarin gyarawa, balaguron BFS/DFS.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_task: Teburin Hash: O(1) matsakaita dubawa ta amfani da aikin hash.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp0: Array: fixed-size, O(1) access. Linked list: dynamic size, O(n) access.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp1: Stack (LIFO) and Queue (FIFO): used in undo systems, BFS/DFS traversal.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp2: Hash table: O(1) average lookup using a hash function.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp3: Binciken binary: O(log n) - yana buƙatar bayanan da aka jera. Binciken layi: O(n).
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp4: Big-O bayanin kula yana auna yadda lokacin aiki ke girma tare da girman shigarwa: O (1) < O (log n) < O (n) < O (n²).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_name: Rukunin bayanai suna adanawa da tsara bayanai don ingantaccen maidowa da magudi. Bayanan alaƙa suna amfani da tebur da SQL; Ma'ajin bayanai na NoSQL suna ɗaukar bayanai marasa tsari ko rarrabawa.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_desc: Rubuta tambayar SQL don nemo duk ɗaliban da ke da maki sama da 80 daga tebur da ake kira "dalibi" tare da ginshiƙai (id, suna, daraja).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_task: Dangantaka na bayanan bayanai yana adana bayanai a cikin tebur ( layuka = ​​rikodin, ginshiƙai = halaye).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp0: Tambayar Zaɓin SQL: Zaɓi ginshiƙi DAGA Teburin INA oda oda ta shafi.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp1: Maɓalli na farko: mai ganowa na musamman ga kowane jere. Maɓalli na waje: haɗe layuka a kan teburi.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp2: JOIN yana haɗa layuka daga teburi da yawa: JOIN INTER yana dawo da layukan da suka dace.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp3: Kaddarorin ACID: Atomity, Daidaituwa, Warewa, Dorewa - tabbatar da ma'amaloli masu dogaro.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_tp2: Macroeconomics || Macroeconomics na nazarin tattalin arzikin gaba ɗaya: GDP, hauhawar farashin kaya, rashin aikin yi, tsarin kuɗi da kasafin kuɗi. Bankunan tsakiya da gwamnatoci suna amfani da waɗannan kayan aikin don haɓaka ingantaccen ci gaba.
learnUni_economics_title: Idan babban bankin ya kara yawan kudin ruwa, me zai faru da rance, zuba jari, da hauhawar farashin kayayyaki? Bayyana jerin tasirin.
learnUni_economics_f0_desc: Macroeconomics studies the economy as a whole: GDP, inflation, unemployment, monetary and fiscal policy. Central banks and governments use these tools to promote stable growth.
learnUni_economics_f0_task: If a central bank raises interest rates, what happens to borrowing, investment, and inflation? Explain the chain of effects.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp0: GDP = C + I + G + (X-M): amfani + zuba jari + kashe kuɗin gwamnati + fitar da net.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp1: Haɓakawa: hauhawar farashin kayayyaki gabaɗaya. Deflation: faduwar farashin. Dukansu na iya zama cutarwa idan matsananci.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp2: Rashin aikin yi: frictional (tsakanin ayyuka), tsarin (rashin daidaituwa), cyclical ( koma bayan tattalin arziki).
learnUni_economics_f0_kp3: Babban bankunan sun kara yawan kudin ruwa don yaki da hauhawar farashin kayayyaki; rage su don tada girma.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp4: Tattalin Arziki na Keynesian: yakamata gwamnatoci su kara kashe kudade yayin koma bayan tattalin arziki.
learnUni_economics_f0_tp0: GDP da girma || Haushi da faduwar farashin kayayyaki
learnUni_biology_f0_name: Ilimin halitta na kwayoyin halitta yana nazarin tsarin kwayoyin halitta na rayuwa - kwafin DNA, kwafi, fassarar, da ka'idojin kwayoyin halitta. Shi ne tushen ilimin kimiyyar halittu, magani, da kwayoyin halitta.
learnUni_biology_f0_desc: Ganin jerin DNA ATG-GCC-TAA, menene jerin mRNA? (Maye gurbin T da U, da A↔T, C↔G)
learnUni_biology_f0_task: DNA → RNA → Protein: ka'idar tsakiya ta ilimin halitta.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp0: Rubutu: Ana kwafin DNA zuwa cikin manzo RNA (mRNA) a cikin tsakiya.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp1: Fassara: ribosomes suna karanta mRNA kuma suna haɗa amino acid zuwa furotin.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp2: Codon shine jerin nucleotide 3 da ke ɓoye amino acid ɗaya.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp3: CRISPR-Cas9: kayan aikin gyara kwayoyin halitta wanda zai iya yanke daidai da gyara jerin DNA.
learnUni_biology_f1_name: Genetics da Juyin Halitta || Genetics yayi bayanin yadda ake gadon halaye. Juyin Halitta ya bayyana yadda jinsuna ke canzawa a tsawon lokaci ta hanyar zaɓin yanayi da bambancin kwayoyin halitta. Tare suna bayyana bambancin rayuwa.
learnUni_biology_f1_desc: Yi amfani da murabba'in Punnett don nuna giciye Aa × Aa. Menene rabon genotype da phenotype?
learnUni_biology_f1_task: Dokokin Mendel: ka'idar rarrabuwa (alleles sun rabu yayin samuwar gamete); dokar zaman kanta.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp0: Babban abin rufe fuska mai ɗaukar ido a cikin heterozygote (Aa).
learnUni_biology_f1_kp1: Hardy-Weinberg ma'auni: ƙananan mitoci suna tsayawa tsayin daka idan babu juyin halitta.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp2: Zaɓin yanayi: mutanen da ke da halayen da suka fi dacewa da muhalli sun tsira kuma suna haifuwa da yawa.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp3: Maye gurbi shine tushen asalin bambancin kwayoyin halitta; yawancin suna tsaka tsaki.
learnUni_medicine_title: Magunguna & Pre-Med || Psychology || Ilimin zamantakewa || Tarihi
learnUni_environmental_science_title: Thermodynamics yana nazarin zafi, zafin jiki, da jujjuya makamashi zuwa aiki. Manyan dokoki guda uku ne ke tafiyar da kowane injin zafi, firiji, da halayen sinadarai a duniya. Fahimtar thermodynamics yana bayyana dalilin da yasa injuna ba za su iya zama masu inganci 100% ba kuma dalilin da yasa kankara ke narkewa idan an taɓa shi.
learnUni_education_pedagogy_title: Zazzabi yana auna matsakaicin ƙarfin motsi na barbashi; ana auna shi a Kelvin (K) ko Celsius (°C).
learnSch_physics_f3_desc: Thermodynamics studies heat, temperature, and the conversion of energy into work. The three main laws govern every heat engine, refrigerator, and chemical reaction on Earth. Understanding thermodynamics explains why engines cannot be 100 % efficient and why ice melts when touched.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp0: Temperature measures the average kinetic energy of particles; it is measured in Kelvin (K) or Celsius (°C).
learnSch_physics_f3_kp1: Dokar 1st na Thermodynamics: ana kiyaye makamashi - zafi da aka ƙara zuwa tsarin daidai yake da canjin makamashi na ciki da aikin da aka yi (ΔU = Q - W).
learnSch_physics_f3_kp2: Doka ta biyu: zafi yana gudana kai tsaye daga zafi zuwa sanyi, ba zai koma baya ba. Entropy (rashin lafiya) koyaushe yana ƙaruwa a cikin keɓantaccen tsarin.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp3: Ƙimar zafi ta musamman (c): Q = mcΔT - makamashin da ake buƙata don haɓaka 1 kg na abu ta 1 ° C.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp4: Ingantacciyar injin zafi: η = W/Q_hot = 1 - T_cold/T_hot (Yin ingancin Carnot - matsakaicin ka'idar).
learnSch_physics_f3_task: Tushen ƙarfe na 200 g (c = 0.45 J/g · ° C) yana mai zafi daga 20 ° C zuwa 100 ° C. Nawa ake bukata makamashi? Sannan kididdige ingancin Carnot na injin da ke aiki tsakanin 500 K da 300 K.
learnSch_physics_f4_desc: Ilimin kimiyyar nukiliya yana bincika tsarin nuclei na atomic da kuma ƙarfin da ke riƙe su wuri ɗaya. Nuclei marasa ƙarfi suna sakin kuzari azaman radiation don isa mafi kwanciyar hankali. Halayen nukiliya suna ƙarfafa Rana, tsire-tsire na nukiliya, kuma suna bayyana asalin abubuwan da ke cikin taurari.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp0: Tsakanin tsakiya ya ƙunshi protons (tabbatacce) da neutrons (tsaka-tsaki), waɗanda ke tattare da ƙarfi ta makamashin nukiliya - sun fi ƙarfin tunkuɗewar lantarki.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp1: Alpha (α) lalata yana fitar da kwayar helium (2 protons + 2 neutrons). Beta (β) lalata tana fitar da lantarki ko positron. Gamma (γ) lalata tana fitar da hasken lantarki mai ƙarfi.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp2: Rabin-rai: lokacin rabin samfurin rediyo zai ruɓe. Bayan n rabin rayuwa, ragowar juzu'in shine (½)ⁿ.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp3: Matsakaicin Mass-makamashi: E = mc² - ƙaramin taro yana jujjuyawa zuwa babban makamashi (c = 3 × 10⁸ m/s).
learnSch_physics_f4_kp4: Fission yana raba tsakiya mai nauyi (misali ²³⁵U) sakin kuzari; fusion yana haɗuwa da nuclei haske (misali ²H + ³H → ⁴ He) yana fitar da ƙarin kuzari a kowace naúrar.
