learnSch_physics_f4_task: Isotope na rediyoaktif yana da rabin rayuwar shekaru 5. Idan kun fara da 80 g, nawa ne ya rage bayan shekaru 15? Rubuta kowane mataki. Sannan yi amfani da E = mc² don nemo makamashin da aka fitar idan 1 g na taro ya canza gaba ɗaya zuwa makamashi.
learnSch_physics_f5_desc: Quantum physics yana bayyana halayen kwayoyin halitta da makamashi a ma'aunin atomic da subatomic. A wannan matakin, barbashi suna zama kamar raƙuman ruwa, makamashi yana zuwa cikin fakiti masu hankali (quanta), kuma aikin auna yana rinjayar abin da aka gani. Kwamfuta physics yana ƙarƙashin lasers, semiconductor, da na'urorin MRI.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp0: Dangantakar Planck: makamashin photon shine E = hf, inda h = 6.63×10⁻³⁴ J·s (tsayin Planck) kuma f shine mitar.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp1: Tasirin Photoelectric: haske yana fitar da electrons daga saman karfe - yana tabbatar da haske a matsayin barbashi (hotuna). Einstein ya lashe kyautar Nobel don wannan bayanin.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp2: Wave-barbashi duality: electrons (da duk barbashi) suna nuna kamar duka taguwar ruwa da barbashi; de Broglie wavelength λ = h/(mv).
learnSch_physics_f5_kp3: Ƙa'idar rashin tabbas na Heisenberg: Δx · Δp ≥ ℏ/2 - ba za ku iya sanin matsayi da motsin kwayar halitta daidai a lokaci guda ba.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp4: Electrons sun mamaye matakan makamashi masu hankali a cikin kwayoyin halitta; lokacin da na'urar lantarki ta sauko zuwa matakin ƙasa, yana fitar da photon mai ƙarfi daidai da bambanci.
learnSch_physics_f5_task: Photon yana da mitar 6.0×10¹⁴ Hz. Yi lissafin kuzarinsa (h = 6.63×10⁻³⁴ J·s). Sannan nemo tsawon zangon lantarki da ke motsi a 2.0×10⁶ m/s (mass = 9.11×10⁻³¹ kg).
learnSch_physics_f5_tp2: Matakan makamashin atomic || Tushen Dangantaka Na Musamman
learnSch_physics_f6_name: Dangantakar Einstein ta musamman (1905) ta kawo sauyi a kimiyyar lissafi ta hanyar nuna cewa sarari da lokaci ba cikakke ba ne - suna mikewa da damfara dangane da saurin dangi. A gudun kusa da saurin haske, lokaci yana raguwa, abubuwa suna raguwa, kuma taro yana ƙaruwa. Waɗannan illolin, waɗanda tauraron dan adam GPS suka tabbatar da masu haɓaka ɓangarorin, suna canza yadda muke fahimtar sararin samaniya.
learnSch_physics_f6_desc: Matsayi na farko: Dokokin kimiyyar lissafi iri ɗaya ne a cikin duk firam ɗin inertial (marasa hanzari).
learnSch_physics_f6_kp0: Matsayi na biyu: gudun haske c = 3×10⁸ m/s yana dawwama ga duk masu kallo, ba tare da la'akari da motsi na tushen ko mai kallo ba.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp1: Faɗawar lokaci: agogo mai motsi yana tafiya a hankali. Δt' = Δt / √(1 - v²/c²). Da sauri da kuke motsawa, lokacin jinkirin ya wuce muku.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp2: Tsawon tsayi: abu mai motsi ya fi guntu a alkiblar motsi. L' = L₀ √(1 - v²/c²).
learnSch_physics_f6_kp3: Mass-makamashi daidaitattun E = mc²: yawan hutawa shine nau'in makamashi da aka adana. Wannan shine dalilin da ya sa halayen nukiliya suka saki makamashi mai yawa.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp4: Roka yana da tsayin mita 100 a hutawa kuma yana tafiya a 0.8c. Menene tsawonsa kamar yadda mai kallo ya auna a Duniya? Yi amfani da L' = L₀√(1 - v²/c²). Har ila yau, da daƙiƙa nawa ne minti 1 akan roka ya bambanta da minti 1 a duniya?
learnSch_chemistry_f3_name: Sinadarin Halitta || Masana kimiyyar halitta suna nazarin mahadi masu tushen carbon. Ƙarfin Carbon na musamman don samar da haɗin kai guda huɗu yana haifar da nau'ikan kwayoyin halitta kusan marasa iyaka - tubalan ginin rayuwa, magunguna, mai, da robobi. Jagorar ƙungiyoyin aiki da nau'ikan amsawa suna buɗe ilimin kimiyyar halittu, ilimin harhada magunguna, da kimiyyar kayan aiki.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_desc: Dukkan kwayoyin halitta suna dauke da carbon, yawanci hade da hydrogen (C-H) kuma sau da yawa kuma zuwa O, N, S, ko halogens.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp0: Hydrocarbons: alkanes (C-C single bonds, saturated), alkenes (C=C biyu bond, unsaturated), alkynes (C≡C uku bond).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp1: Ƙungiyoyin aiki suna ƙayyade kaddarorin sinadaran: -OH (giya), -COOH (carboxylic acid), -NH₂ (amine), -CHO (aldehyde), -C = O (ketone).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp2: Isomers na tsarin suna da tsarin kwayoyin halitta iri ɗaya amma haɗuwa daban-daban; stereoisomers suna da haɗin kai iri ɗaya amma tsarin sararin samaniya daban-daban.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp3: Polymers sune manyan kwayoyin da aka gina daga maimaita raka'a monomer: ƙari polymerisation (ethene → polyethylene) da polymerisation condensation (amino acid → sunadarai).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp4: Zana cikakken tsarin tsarin etanoic acid (CH₃COOH). Gano ƙungiyar masu aiki. Rubuta ma'auni don amsawarsa tare da sodium hydroxide (NaOH) kuma suna suna samfuran.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_tp2: Electrochemistry || Electrochemistry yana bincika alakar da ke tsakanin halayen sinadarai da makamashin lantarki. Batura suna canza makamashin sinadarai zuwa wutar lantarki; electrolysis yayi baya. Halayen Redox - musayar wutar lantarki tsakanin nau'ikan nau'ikan - suna cikin zuciyar kowane tsarin sinadaran lantarki, daga tsatsawar ƙarfe zuwa cajin wayarka.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_name: Oxidation = asarar electrons (OIL); Ragewa = ribar electrons (RIG). Kowane redox dauki yana da matakai biyu a lokaci guda.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_desc: A cikin tantanin halitta galvanic (voltaic), ƙwanƙwasa redox na gaggawa yana motsa wutar lantarki. A anode ne korau (oxidation); cathode yana da kyau (raguwa).
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp0: Electrolysis yana amfani da makamashin lantarki na waje don fitar da martani maras lokaci-wanda ake amfani dashi don farantin karfe, samar da aluminum, da raba ruwa zuwa H₂ da O₂.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp1: Madaidaicin ƙarfin lantarki (E°): mafi girma E° yana nufin wakili mai ƙarfi mai ƙarfi. Wutar lantarki = E ° cathode - E°anode.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp2: Dokokin Faraday: yawan abubuwan da aka ajiye a cikin lantarki ya yi daidai da cajin da aka yi (Q = It) da kuma ma'auni.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp3: A cikin electrolysis na tsarma sulfuric acid, rubuta rabin-equities a kowace lantarki. Gano samfuran anode da cathode. Idan halin yanzu na 2 A yana gudana na s500, moles nawa na electrons ake canjawa wuri? (F = 96 500 C/mol)
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp4: Faraday's laws: the mass of substance deposited in electrolysis is proportional to the charge passed (Q = It) and to the molar mass.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_task: In the electrolysis of dilute sulfuric acid, write the half-equations at each electrode. Identify the anode and cathode products. If a current of 2 A flows for 500 s, how many moles of electrons are transferred? (F = 96 500 C/mol)
learnSch_chemistry_f5_name: Sinadarin ma'auni yana faruwa a cikin rufaffiyar tsarin lokacin da halayen gaba da baya suka ci gaba a daidai gwargwado, don haka yawan masu amsawa da samfuran sun kasance akai-akai. Fahimtar ma'auni yana da mahimmanci ga sunadarai na masana'antu (tsarin Haber) da tsarin halittu (pH na jini, aikin enzyme).
learnSch_chemistry_f5_desc: A cikin ma'auni, ƙimar amsawar gaba yayi daidai da ƙimar juzu'in amsawa - ƙididdiga suna dawwama amma ba lallai ba ne daidai.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp0: Ma'aunin daidaito K = [samfuran] ^ n / [masu amsawa]^m. K >> 1: samfuran da aka fi so. K << 1: An yarda da masu amsawa.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp1: Ka'idar Le Chatelier: idan tsarin a ma'auni ya rikice, yana canzawa don magance canjin da dawo da daidaito.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp2: Ƙara yawan maida martani na mai amsawa yana canza ma'auni zuwa samfura. Cire samfurin yana yin haka.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp3: Don iskar gas: ƙara matsa lamba yana jujjuya daidaito zuwa gefe tare da ƙarancin moles na iskar gas. Ƙara yawan zafin jiki yana jin daɗin jagorancin endothermic.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp4: N₂(g) + 3H₂(g) ⇌ 2NH₃(g) ΔH = -92 kJ/mol. Yi hasashen canjin ma'auni lokacin: (a) an ƙara matsa lamba, (b) zafin jiki ya tashi, (c) ƙarin N₂ an ƙara. Bayyana kowane ta amfani da ƙa'idar Le Chatelier.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_task: Ka'idar Le Chatelier || Matsakaicin daidaiton Kc da Kp
learnSch_chemistry_f5_tp2: Masana kimiyyar muhalli suna binciken yadda abubuwan sinadarai ke hulɗa da iska, ruwa, da ƙasa - da kuma yadda ayyukan ɗan adam ke canza waɗannan tsarin. Ya yi bayanin sauyin yanayi, raguwar ozone, gurɓataccen ruwa, da kuma sinadarai a bayan mafita mai ɗorewa kamar koren sunadarai da abubuwan da ba za a iya lalata su ba.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_name: Greenhouse gas (CO₂, CH₄, N₂O, H₂O tururi) sha da kuma sake fitar da infrared radiation, warming Duniya ta surface - da greenhouse sakamako.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_desc: Ruwan acid: SO₂ da NOₓ (daga burbushin man fetur) suna narke a cikin ruwan sama da ke samar da H₂SO₃ da HNO₃, suna rage pH da cutar da halittu.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp0: Ragewar Ozone: CFCs suna sakin Cl· radicals a cikin stratosphere, wanda ke lalata O₃: Cl· + O₃ → ClO· + O₂ (sarkar amsawa).
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp1: Eutrophication: nitrate da phosphate suna gudu daga takin mai magani suna haifar da furannin algal wanda ke rage narkar da iskar oxygen da kashe rayuwar ruwa.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp2: Ozone depletion: CFCs release Cl· radicals in the stratosphere, which catalytically destroy O₃: Cl· + O₃ → ClO· + O₂ (chain reaction).
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp3: Eutrophication: nitrate and phosphate run-off from fertilisers cause algal blooms that deplete dissolved oxygen and kill aquatic life.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp4: Ka'idodin sinadarai na kore: halayen ƙira waɗanda ke rage sharar gida, amfani da kayan abinci masu sabuntawa, guje wa kaushi mai haɗari, da haɓaka tattalin arzikin zarra.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_task: Yi bayanin cikakken aikin sarkar da kwayar CFC guda ɗaya zata iya lalata dubban kwayoyin ozone. Rubuta matakai biyu masu mahimmanci. Sannan lissafta tattalin arzikin atom na amsawa 2H₂ + O₂ → 2H₂O.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_tp2: ingancin ruwa da kuma kore chemistry
learnSch_biology_f3_desc: Genetics shine kimiyyar gado - yadda halaye ke wucewa daga iyaye zuwa zuriya ta hanyar kwayoyin halitta da chromosomes. Yana tallafawa magani (cututtukan kwayoyin halitta, magani na musamman), aikin gona (kiwon amfanin gona), da kimiyyar bincike (bayanin bayanan DNA). Fahimtar kwayoyin halitta yana nufin fahimtar dalilin da yasa mutane suka bambanta da kuma yadda cututtuka na gado ke tasowa.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp0: Genes su ne sassan DNA waɗanda ke ƙididdige sunadaran sunadaran. Kowace kwayar halitta tana da takamaiman wuri (wuri) akan chromosome.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp1: Mutane suna da nau'i-nau'i 23 na chromosomes (duka 46); saiti daya daga kowane iyaye. chromosomes na jima'i: XX = mace, XY = namiji.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp2: Mafi rinjaye (B) masks recessive allele (b) a cikin heterozygote (Bb). Dabi'un da aka dawo dasu suna bayyana ne kawai lokacin da homozygous (bb).
learnSch_biology_f3_kp3: murabba'in Punnett suna hasashen yiwuwar zuriyar genotypes. Giciye monohybrid Bb × Bb yana ba da rabon phenotype 3:1.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp4: Abubuwan halayen jima'i (misali makanta launi, haemophilia) ana ɗaukar su akan X chromosome; Maza (XY) sun fi shafar su.
learnSch_biology_f3_task: Iyaye biyu masu launin ruwan ido (Bb × Bb) suna da yara. Zana filin Punnett. Menene yuwuwar yaro mai idanu shuɗi (bb)? Menene rabon genotype da phenotype?
learnSch_biology_f3_tp1: Dandalin Punnett || Gado mai nasaba da jima'i
learnSch_biology_f3_tp2: Juyin Halitta || Juyin Halitta shine canjin halaye na gado na al'ummomi fiye da tsararraki. Zaɓin yanayi na Darwin shine babban tsari: daidaikun mutane waɗanda ke da halaye masu fa'ida suna rayuwa kuma suna haifuwa da yawa. Juyin Halitta ya yi bayanin ɗimbin bambance-bambancen rayuwa a duniya da abubuwan da aka raba tsakanin jinsuna daban-daban.
learnSch_biology_f4_name: Zaɓin dabi'a: mutanen da ke da halayen da suka fi dacewa da muhalli suna tsira kuma suna haɓaka da yawa, suna ba da halaye masu amfani ga zuriya.
learnSch_biology_f4_desc: Shaida ga juyin halitta: rikodin burbushin halittu, kwatankwacin halittar jiki (tsarin kamanni), kamanni na DNA, tarihin rayuwa, bayanin da aka lura.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp0: Natural selection: individuals with traits better suited to the environment survive and reproduce more, passing advantageous traits to offspring.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp1: Evidence for evolution: fossil record, comparative anatomy (homologous structures), DNA similarity, biogeography, observed speciation.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp2: Maye gurbi a cikin DNA shine babban tushen sabon bambancin kwayoyin halitta. Yawancin suna tsaka tsaki; wasu suna cutarwa; kaɗan suna ba da fa'ida.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp3: Bambance-bambance: lokacin da aka keɓance yawan jama'a (geographic, reproductive) tsayin daka, sun rikide zuwa nau'ikan nau'ikan daban-daban waɗanda ba za su iya haɗuwa ba.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp4: Juriya na rigakafi shine juyin halitta a cikin aiki: ƙwayoyin cuta masu juriya suna rayuwa kuma suna haifuwa, suna sa nau'ikan juriya suka mamaye.
learnSch_biology_f4_task: Yi bayani a cikin matakai 4 yadda juriyar ƙwayoyin cuta ke tasowa a cikin yawan ƙwayoyin cuta ta amfani da zaɓin yanayi. Sa'an nan kuma bayyana nau'o'in shaida guda biyu don juyin halitta kuma ku bayyana abin da kowanne ya nuna.
learnSch_biology_f5_desc: Tsire-tsire sune farkon masu samarwa a kusan dukkanin halittu - suna kama makamashin hasken rana kuma suna canza shi zuwa kwayoyin halitta ta hanyar photosynthesis. Fahimtar nazarin halittun shuka ya ƙunshi tsari (tushen, mai tushe, ganyaye, furanni), photosynthesis, haifuwa, da kuma muhimmiyar rawar da tsire-tsire ke takawa wajen daidaita yanayin duniya da ciyar da rayuwa.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp0: Photosynthesis: 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + makamashi haske → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂. Yana faruwa a cikin chloroplasts masu dauke da chlorophyll.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp1: An daidaita ganye don photosynthesis: babban yanki, bakin ciki, m epidermis, stomata don shiga CO₂, da kuma wadataccen cibiyar sadarwa na jijiyoyin jini.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp2: Xylem yana jigilar ruwa da ma'adanai daga tushen zuwa ganye. Phloem yana jigilar sukari daga ganye zuwa sauran shuka.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp3: Transpiration: ruwa yana ƙafe ta cikin stomata, yana jan ruwa sama ta cikin xylem (rafin motsi).
learnSch_biology_f5_kp4: Haifuwa shuka: tsire-tsire masu fure suna amfani da pollination (canja wurin pollen) da hadi don samar da iri; tsaba suna watsewa zuwa sabbin wurare.
learnSch_biology_f5_task: Ƙirƙira gwaji don gwada ko ƙarfin haske yana rinjayar adadin photosynthesis a cikin ruwan tafki. Bayyana masu canji masu zaman kansu, masu dogaro, da sarrafawa. Yi tsinkaya da bayyana sakamakon.
learnSch_biology_f6_name: Microbiology shine nazarin ƙananan ƙwayoyin cuta - ƙwayoyin cuta, ƙwayoyin cuta, fungi, da protists. Waɗannan ƙananan halittu suna tsara lafiyar ɗan adam, aikin noma, samar da abinci, da kuma yanayin yanayin carbon na duniya. Fahimtar ƙananan ƙwayoyin cuta yana da mahimmanci ga magani (maganin rigakafi, rigakafi), ilimin kimiyyar halittu, da fahimtar cututtuka.
learnSch_biology_f6_desc: Microbiology is the study of microscopic organisms — bacteria, viruses, fungi, and protists. These tiny entities shape human health, agriculture, food production, and the global carbon cycle. Understanding microbes is essential for medicine (antibiotics, vaccines), biotechnology, and understanding disease.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp0: Bacteria prokaryotes ne (babu tsakiya). Yawancin marasa lahani ko amfani; wasu cututtukan da ke haifar da cututtuka kamar tarin fuka da kwalara.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp1: Kwayoyin cuta ba kwayoyin halitta ba ne - su ne igiyoyin DNA/RNA a cikin rigar furotin. Suna yin kwafi ne kawai ta hanyar yin garkuwa da injunan tantanin halitta.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp2: Magungunan rigakafi suna kashe ko hana ƙwayoyin cuta amma ba su da amfani ga ƙwayoyin cuta (mura, mura). Yin amfani da yawa yana haifar da juriya na rigakafi.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp3: Tsarin rigakafi: kariya marasa takamaiman (fata, phagocytes) da takamaiman kariya (lymphocytes masu samar da rigakafi). Alurar rigakafi suna horar da tsarin rigakafi ba tare da haifar da cututtuka ba.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp4: Microbes masu amfani: ƙwayoyin cuta na hanji suna taimakawa narkewa; fungi suna samar da maganin rigakafi (penicillin daga Penicillium); yisti ferments sugars ga burodi da giya.
learnSch_biology_f6_task: Kwatanta tsarin ƙwayoyin cuta da ƙwayoyin cuta. Bayyana dalilin da yasa maganin rigakafi ke aiki akan ɗayan amma ba ɗayan ba. Sannan bayyana hanyoyi guda biyu da jiki ke kare kansa daga kamuwa da cutar kwayan cuta.
learnSch_biology_f6_tp0: Kwayoyin cuta da ƙwayoyin cuta || Tsarin rigakafi da alluran rigakafi || Kwayoyin cuta masu amfani da maganin rigakafi
learnSch_biology_f6_tp2: Tsarin bayanai an tsara hanyoyin don adanawa da samun damar bayanai; Algorithms matakai ne na mataki-mataki don magance matsalolin. Zaɓin tsarin bayanan da ya dace da algorithm yana ƙayyade ko shirin yana gudana a cikin millise seconds ko sa'o'i. Wannan batu shine kashin bayan ingantaccen ci gaban software.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_name: Arrays adana abubuwa a cikin tsayayyen jeri; samun dama ta index shine O(1). Lissafi suna ba da izinin girma mai ƙarfi amma yana iya samun shiga a hankali.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_desc: Tari (LIFO - na ƙarshe, na farko) da jerin gwano (FIFO - na farko, na farko) sarrafa tarin da aka ba da oda don takamaiman lokuta na amfani.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp0: Binciken layi yana duba kowane nau'i (O(n)); Binciken binary yana buƙatar bayanan da aka jera kuma ya raba sararin binciken kowane mataki (O(log n)).
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp1: Nau'in kumfa yana kwatanta abubuwan da ke kusa da su kuma yana musanya su (O(n²)). Haɗa nau'ikan rarrabuwa da haɗuwa akai-akai (O(n log n)) - da sauri don manyan bayanai.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp2: Bayanin Big-O yana bayanin ingancin algorithm: O(1) akai-akai ne, O(n) na layi ne, O(n²) ma'auni ne - mafi ƙanƙanta don manyan bayanai.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp3: Gano nau'in kumfa akan jeri [5, 3, 8, 1, 4]. Nuna kowane wucewa. Ƙididdige jimlar kwatancen da musanyawa. Sannan rubuta pseudocode don binciken binary akan jeri da aka jera.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_desc: Ma'adanin bayanai shine tsarin tattara bayanai da aka tsara. Rukunin bayanai masu alaƙa suna adana bayanai a cikin tebur da aka haɗa ta maɓalli. SQL yana ba ku damar ƙirƙira, tambaya, sabuntawa, da share bayanan. Ma'ajin bayanai suna ƙarfafa kowane babban aikace-aikace daga tsarin gudanarwa na makaranta zuwa dandamalin kafofin watsa labarun.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp0: Dangantaka na bayanan bayanai yana adana bayanai a cikin tebur ( layuka = ​​rikodin, ginshiƙai = filayen). An haɗa tebur ta hanyar maɓallan farko da na waje.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp1: Maɓalli na farko: mai ganowa na musamman ga kowane rikodin a cikin tebur. Maɓallin waje: yana haɗa tebur ɗaya zuwa maɓallin farko na wani.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp2: Tambayar Zaɓin SQL: Zaɓi ginshiƙi DAGA Teburin INA oda oda ta shafi. Misali: Zabi suna DAGA ɗalibai INA maki = 'A'.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp3: Daidaitawa yana rage kwafin bayanai ta hanyar raba teburi don haka ana adana kowane yanki sau ɗaya kawai.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp4: Ayyukan CRUD: Ƙirƙiri (saka), Karanta (Zabi), Sabuntawa (UPDATE), Share (SHARE) - mahimman ayyukan bayanai guda huɗu.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_task: Ƙirƙiri sauƙi mai sauƙi don ɗakin karatu na makaranta (littattafai, ɗalibai, lamuni). Ƙayyade aƙalla teburi 3, filayensu, da alaƙa. Sannan rubuta tambaya ta SQL don nemo duk littattafan da ake aro a halin yanzu zuwa ID na ɗalibi 42.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_name: Cibiyoyin sadarwa & Intanet || Cibiyar sadarwa tana haɗa kwamfutoci don raba bayanai da albarkatu. Intanet ita ce cibiyar sadarwa mafi girma a duniya - hanyar sadarwar cibiyoyin sadarwa. Fahimtar yadda bayanai ke tafiya (protocols, adiresoshin IP, DNS) da kuma yadda ake kiyaye su (boyewa, firewalls) yana da mahimmanci a zamanin dijital.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_desc: LAN (Yankin Yanki): yana haɗa na'urori a cikin ƙaramin yanki. WAN (Wide Area Network): yana haɗa LANs akan manyan nisa - intanit WAN ne.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp0: Adireshin IP: lakabin lamba na musamman ga kowace na'ura akan hanyar sadarwa (misali 192.168.1.1 don IPv4). DNS yana fassara sunayen yanki (google.com) zuwa adiresoshin IP.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp1: TCP/IP Protocol suite: Tsarin Gudanar da watsawa yana tabbatar da fakitin bayanai sun isa daidai; Internet Protocol ya bi su.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp2: HTTP (HyperText Transfer Protocol) yana canja wurin shafukan yanar gizo. HTTPS yana ƙara ɓoyayyen TLS - gunkin makullin yana nuna rufaffen haɗin ku.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp3: Canja wurin fakiti: an raba bayanai zuwa fakiti, kowanne an raba shi da kansa a fadin hanyar sadarwa, sannan a sake haduwa a inda aka nufa.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp4: Bincika abin da zai faru lokacin da ka rubuta 'www.example.com' a cikin mai bincike kuma danna Shigar - daga binciken DNS zuwa karɓar shafin yanar gizon. Sunan kowace yarjejeniya da matakin da abin ya shafa.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_desc: Rhetoric fasaha ce ta sadarwa mai gamsarwa - ta yin amfani da harshe yadda ya kamata don faɗakarwa, lallashi, ko motsa masu sauraro. Hujja tana koya muku gina ma'ana, hujjoji masu tushe da kuma ganowa da kuma magance raunin tunani. Waɗannan ƙwarewa suna da mahimmanci don muhawara, kasidu, shari'a, da rayuwar jama'a.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp0: Hanyoyi guda uku na Aristotle na lallashi: Ethos (amincin mai magana), Pathos (jarrawar motsin rai), Logos (hujja mai ma'ana da shaida).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp1: Hujja mai ƙarfi tana da: bayyananniyar da'awa (nazari), dalilai masu goyan baya, shaida, da martani ga husuma.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp2: Ma'anar ma'ana tana lalata gardama: ad hominem (kai hari ga mutum), mutumin bambaro (ba da ra'ayi na gaba), dichotomy na ƙarya (zaɓi biyu kawai da aka gabatar).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp3: Rarraba tunani yana motsawa daga ƙa'idodi na gaba ɗaya zuwa takamaiman yanke shawara (dukkan mutane masu mutuwa ne; Socrates ɗan adam ne; saboda haka Socrates mai mutuwa ne).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp4: Hankali mai fa'ida yana zana ƙarshe gaba ɗaya daga takamaiman abubuwan lura - mai ƙarfi amma yana iya zama kuskure idan misalai ba su da wakilci.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_task: Karanta wani ra'ayi na jarida. Gano babban da'awar, guda uku na shaida masu goyan baya, masu sauraro da aka yi niyya, da rugujewar ma'ana guda ɗaya (idan akwai). Sa'an nan kuma rubuta juzu'i na kalmomi 200 ta amfani da duk hanyoyin Aristotle guda uku.
learnSch_history_f2_name: Zamanin zamani ya canza duniya ta hanyar bincike, juyin juya hali, da masana'antu. Nahiyoyi da ke da alaƙa da faɗaɗawa, Haskakawa sun ƙalubalanci al'ada da hankali, juyin mulkin demokraɗiyya ya sake fasalin gwamnatoci, da juyin juya halin masana'antu ya canza yadda mutane ke rayuwa da aiki - aza harsashi ga duniya ta zamani.
learnSch_history_f2_desc: Shekarun Bincike (1400s-1600s): Ƙarfin Turai (Portugal, Spain, Ingila, Netherlands) sun yi tafiya zuwa Amurka, Afirka, da Asiya, suna ƙirƙirar hanyoyin sadarwar kasuwanci na duniya da daulolin mulkin mallaka.
learnSch_history_f2_kp0: Juyin Juyin Kimiyya da Haskakawa (1600s-1700s): masu tunani kamar Galileo, Newton, Locke, da Voltaire sun yi amfani da hankali da lura don kalubalantar ikon coci da ikon gargajiya.
learnSch_history_f2_kp1: Juyin juya halin Amurka (1776) da juyin juya halin Faransa (1789): wahayi daga ra'ayoyin wayewa, mallaka da ƴan ƙasa sun hambarar da masarautu don kafa haƙƙoƙi, kundin tsarin mulki, da mashahuran ikon mallaka.
learnSch_history_f2_kp2: Juyin juya halin masana'antu (1760s-1850): ya fara a Biritaniya - kwal, injin tururi, masana'antu, da layin dogo sun canza al'ummomin tushen noma zuwa tattalin arzikin birane na masana'antu.
learnSch_history_f2_kp3: Mulkin Mallaka: Ƙasashen Turai sun yi wa Afirka, Asiya, da Amirka mulkin mallaka - suna fitar da albarkatu, da raba jama'a, da barin sakamako mai dorewa na siyasa da al'adu.
learnSch_history_f2_kp4: Colonialism: European nations colonised Africa, Asia, and the Americas — extracting resources, displacing populations, and leaving long-lasting political and cultural consequences.
learnSch_history_f2_task: Zaɓi abu ɗaya daga 1500-1900 (misali juyin juya halin Faransa). Bayyana: (a) Abubuwa uku, (b) abubuwa biyu masu mahimmanci, (c) sakamako biyu na dogon lokaci. Yi amfani da takamaiman ranaku da mutane.
learnSch_history_f3_name: Ƙarni na 20 ya kawo yaƙe-yaƙe na duniya, mulkin kama-karya, mulkin mallaka, da yakin cacar baki - yana sake fasalin kowace ƙasa a duniya. Har ila yau karni ne na ci gaba mai ban mamaki: shan kashi na farkisanci, hawan haƙƙin ɗan adam, saukar wata, da juyin juya halin dijital. Fahimtar shi yana da mahimmanci don fahimtar duniyar yau.
learnSch_history_f3_desc: Yaƙin Duniya na ɗaya (1914–1918): wanda ya haifar da kisan Archduke Franz Ferdinand; haifar da kishin kasa, mulkin mallaka, soja, da tsarin kawance. ~ 17 miliyan sun mutu.
learnSch_history_f3_kp0: Yaƙin Duniya na II (1939-1945): Jamus Nazi, Italiyanci na Fascist, da Imperial Japan a kan Allies. Holocaust ya kashe mutane miliyan 6. An ƙare tare da bama-bamai na atomic akan Hiroshima da Nagasaki.
learnSch_history_f3_kp1: Cold War (1947-1991): kishiyantar akida da siyasa tsakanin Amurka (jari-hujja, dimokuradiyya) da USSR (kwaminisanci). Yaƙe-yaƙe na wakili, tseren sararin samaniya, tseren makaman nukiliya, da bangon Berlin sun raba duniya.
learnSch_history_f3_kp2: Decolonization (1945-1975): Ƙungiyoyin 'yancin kai a Afirka, Asiya, da Gabas ta Tsakiya sun kawo karshen daulolin mulkin mallaka na Turai. Sau da yawa tare da rikici da rashin kwanciyar hankali.
learnSch_history_f3_kp3: Majalisar Dinkin Duniya ta kafa 1945 don wanzar da zaman lafiya; Sanarwar Haƙƙin Dan Adam ta Duniya ta karɓi 1948 - duka martanin kai tsaye ga kisan-kiyashi na WWII.
learnSch_history_f3_kp4: Kwatanta dalilai da sakamakon WWI da WWII. Ƙirƙirar tebur tare da: Babban dalili, Maɓalli na juyawa, Yawan Mutuwa, Babban sakamako. Sannan bayyana yadda WWII ya jagoranci kai tsaye zuwa yakin cacar baki.
learnSch_history_f3_tp2: Tarihi ba kwanan wata da abubuwan da suka faru ba ne kawai - fassarar shaida ce. Masana tarihi suna nazarin tushen asali (takardun asali, kayan tarihi) da tushe na biyu (littattafan rubutu, tarihin rayuwa) don sake gina abubuwan da suka gabata. Koyon yadda ake kimanta tushe da mahimmanci yana sa ku zama mafi kyawun bincike, mai tunani, da ɗan ƙasa.
learnSch_history_f4_name: Madogara na farko: ƙirƙira a lokacin taron (diary, hoto, yarjejeniya, jarida). Madogararsa na biyu: ƙirƙira daga baya, fassarar tushen asali (biography, documentary, textbook).
learnSch_history_f4_desc: Binciken SOAPS: Tushen, Lokaci, Masu sauraro, Manufa, Maudu'i - tsarin fahimtar kowane takaddar tarihi.
learnSch_history_f4_kp0: Dogaro da fa'ida: tushen son zuciya har yanzu yana iya zama da amfani a matsayin shaida na abin da marubucin ya yi imani da shi ko abin da farfaganda ta kasance a lokacin.
learnSch_history_f4_kp1: SOAPS analysis: Source, Occasion, Audience, Purpose, Subject — a framework for understanding any historical document.
learnSch_history_f4_kp2: Reliability vs. usefulness: a biased source can still be useful as evidence of what the author believed or what propaganda existed at the time.
learnSch_history_f4_kp3: Halaye da alaƙa: kawai saboda abubuwan biyu sun faru tare baya nufin ɗayan ya haifar da ɗayan. Masana tarihi suna neman shaidar haɗin kai kai tsaye.
learnSch_history_f4_kp4: Tarihi shine nazarin yadda aka rubuta da fassarar tarihi. Irin wannan taron (misali juyin juya halin Faransa) na iya ganinsa daban-daban daga masana tarihi daban-daban.
learnSch_history_f4_task: Nemo jawabin tarihi ko wasiƙa daga kowane lokaci. Aiwatar da bincike na SOAPS. Yi la'akari da amincinsa (yi la'akari da matsayi da manufar marubucin) da kuma amfaninsa (waɗanne tambayoyi na tarihi ya taimaka wajen amsa?).
learnSch_history_f4_tp0: Madogara na farko da na sakandare
learnSch_geography_f2_name: Taswirori & Zane-zane || Taswirori kayan aiki ne masu ƙarfi don wakiltar bayanan sarari. Zane-zane shine kimiyya da fasaha na yin taswira. Daga tsoffin allunan yumbu zuwa hotunan tauraron dan adam GPS, taswirori sun jagoranci bincike, siffata siyasa, kuma sun ba da ma'anar duniyarmu. Karatu da ƙirƙira taswira shine ainihin ƙwarewar yanki.
learnSch_geography_f2_desc: Sikeli: rabo tsakanin nisa akan taswira da nisa na ainihi-duniya. Taswirar sikelin 1:50,000 na nufin 1 cm = 500 m.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp0: Nassoshi na grid: layukan latitude (a kwance, ma'auni arewa/kudu) da tsayi (a tsaye, ma'auni gabas/yamma) suna gano kowane wuri a duniya daidai.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp1: Layukan kwane-kwane suna haɗa maki daidai tsayi; kwane-kwane mai nisa = tudu mai tsayi; yadu mai nisa = gangara mai laushi.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp2: Hasashen taswira yana karkatar da saman duniya mai lanƙwasa akan taswira mai faɗi. Hasashen Mercator yana adana siffa amma yana gurbata girman; Hasashen Peters yana adana yanki amma yana karkatar da siffa.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp3: GIS (Tsarin Bayanin Geographic) ya shimfiɗa saitin bayanai da yawa (yawan jama'a, amfani da ƙasa, yanayi) akan taswirorin dijital don bincike da yanke shawara.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp4: Yin amfani da taswirar yanayi (ko zana naku), gano: (a) tudu mai gangare, (b) kwari, (c) babban tudu. Rubuta bayanin grid mai lamba 6 don taron. Yi lissafin ainihin nisa na hanyar 4 cm akan taswira 1:50,000.
learnSch_geography_f3_name: Weather shine yanayin ɗan gajeren lokaci na yanayi; yanayi shine matsakaicin dogon lokaci. Yankunan yanayi na duniya - daga wurare masu zafi zuwa iyakacin duniya - suna da siffa ta latitude, igiyoyin teku, tsayi, da iskoki masu rinjaye. Fahimtar tsarin yanayi yana da mahimmanci ga aikin noma, shirye-shiryen bala'i, da magance sauyin yanayi.
learnSch_geography_f3_desc: Abubuwan da suka shafi yanayi: latitude (kusurwar rana), tsayi (zazzabi ya sauka ~ 6.5 ° C da 1000 m), nisa daga teku, igiyoyin teku, iska mai rinjaye.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp0: Factors affecting climate: latitude (angle of sun), altitude (temperature drops ~6.5°C per 1000 m), distance from sea, ocean currents, prevailing winds.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp1: Sauyin yanayi na wurare masu zafi: zafi da jika duk shekara, kusa da equator. Bahar Rum: lokacin rani mai zafi, lokacin sanyi mai sanyi. Polar: sanyi na dindindin, ƙaramin hazo.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp2: Ruwan sama na gaba: Dumi da sanyin iska suna haduwa; iska mai dumi tana tashi sama da sanyi, sanyi, kuma yana takushewa. Na kowa a tsakiyar latitudes (Birtaniya, Jamus).
learnSch_geography_f3_kp3: Zagayowar ruwa: evaporation → condensation (samuwar gajimare) → hazo → gudu-gudu / infiltration → komawa zuwa evaporation.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp4: Canjin yanayi: hauhawar CO₂ yana ƙaruwa da tasirin greenhouse, yana haifar da ɗumamar yanayi, ƙarin yanayin yanayi, haɓaka matakan teku, da canza yanayin yanayi.
learnSch_geography_f3_task: Kwatanta yanayin wurin dajin ruwan sama mai zafi da wurin hamada. Ga kowane: Jiha yana nufin zafin jiki na shekara, ruwan sama na shekara-shekara, sanadi, da daidaitawar halittu guda biyu da ke zaune a wurin.
learnSch_geography_f3_tp1: Yankunan yanayi || Yanayin gaba da zagayowar ruwa
learnSch_geography_f3_tp2: Ciniki na Duniya & Duniya || Kasuwancin kasa da kasa yana baiwa kasashe damar kware kan abin da suka fi samarwa yadda ya kamata da kuma yin ciniki da komai. Haɗin kai na duniya - haɓaka haɗin gwiwar tattalin arziki, al'adu, da mutane - ya fitar da ɗaruruwan miliyoyi daga kangin talauci amma kuma ya haifar da rashin daidaito da ƙalubalen muhalli.
learnSch_economics_f2_name: Amfanin kwatankwacin: ya kamata kasa ta kware wajen kera kayayyaki inda kudin damarta ya yi kadan, sannan ciniki - ko da ta fi komai kyau.
learnSch_economics_f2_desc: Fitarwa: kayayyaki da sabis da ake sayarwa a ƙasashen waje (kudaden shiga ga ƙasa). Shigo da kaya: kayayyaki da sabis da aka saya daga ƙasashen waje ( kashe kuɗi).
learnSch_economics_f2_kp0: Shingayen ciniki: jadawalin kuɗin fito (haraji kan shigo da kaya), ƙididdiga (iyakan shigo da kaya), takunkumi (jimillan bans) - kare masana'antun cikin gida amma haɓaka farashin masu amfani.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp1: Yarjejeniyar ciniki cikin 'yanci (misali EU Single Market, NAFTA) yana rage shinge tsakanin ƙasashe membobin, haɓaka kasuwanci da haɓakar tattalin arziki.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp2: Ma'auni na ciniki: fitarwa - shigo da kaya. Ragowar ciniki yana nufin ana fitar da ƙarin; gibin ciniki yana nufin ana shigo da ƙari.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp3: Kasar A na iya samar da kwamfutoci 100 KO tan 200 na alkama a kowace shekara. Kasar B na iya samar da kwamfutoci 60 KO tan 180 na alkama. Nuna wace ƙasa ke da fa'idar kwatankwacin kowane samfur kuma bayyana dalilin da yasa duka biyun ke amfana da ƙwarewa da ciniki.
learnSch_economics_f3_desc: Kudi na sirri ya ƙunshi gudanar da ayyuka masu amfani na kuɗi: samun, ajiya, tsara kasafin kuɗi, rance, da saka hannun jari. Ilimin kudi yana taimaka maka ka guje wa tarkon bashi, gina dukiya, da kuma yanke shawara a duk tsawon rayuwarka - daga aikinka na farko zuwa ritaya. Ba kasafai ake koyar da waɗannan ƙwarewa ba amma a duk duniya ana buƙata.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp0: Kasafin kuɗi yana keɓance kuɗin shiga ta hanyar buƙatu (haya, abinci), buƙatu (nishaɗi), da tanadi. Dokar 50/30/20: Bukatun 50%, 30% yana so, 20% tanadi.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp1: Hadaddiyar sha'awa: ana samun riba akan duka babba da tara riba. €1,000 a kashi 5% na sha'awa na shekara-shekara ya zama €1,629 bayan shekaru 10.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp2: Kyakkyawan bashi ( jinginar gida, lamunin ɗalibi) na iya gina dukiya ko ƙwarewa. Bashi mara kyau (katin bashi mai girma, lamunin ranar biya) yana kama ku a cikin tsarin biyan kuɗi.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp3: Haɗin kai yana lalata ikon siye: idan hauhawar farashin kaya ta kasance 3% kuma ajiyar ku ta sami 1%, kuɗin ku yana asarar ƙimar gaske kowace shekara.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp4: Bambance-bambance: yada hannun jari a kan kadarori daban-daban (hannun jari, shaidu, kadarori) yana rage haɗari - 'kada ku sanya dukkan ƙwai a cikin kwando ɗaya'.
learnSch_economics_f3_task: Ƙirƙiri kasafin kuɗi na wata-wata don ɗalibin da ke samun € 800 / wata. Rarraba adadin ta amfani da ka'idar 50/30/20. Sannan lissafta nawa €500 ke girma zuwa cikin shekaru 5 a 4% riba mai yawa na shekara-shekara: A = P(1 + r)^n.
learnSch_economics_f3_tp2: Bashi, zuba jari, da hauhawar farashin kayayyaki
learnSch_earth_science_f2_name: Tekuna & Zagayowar Ruwa || Tekuna suna rufe kashi 71% na saman duniya kuma suna daidaita yanayin, samar da iskar oxygen, da tallafawa nau'ikan halittu masu ban mamaki. Zagayowar ruwa yana ci gaba da motsa ruwa tsakanin tekuna, yanayi, da ƙasa, yana mai da Duniya kaɗai duniyar da ke da ruwa mai ruwa a samanta - mahimmin yanayin rayuwa.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_desc: Zagayowar ruwa: evaporation (ruwa zuwa gas, motsa jiki ta hasken rana) → condensation (gas zuwa droplets, forming girgije) → hazo (ruwan sama, dusar ƙanƙara) → gudu-off da infiltration → komawa zuwa evaporation.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp0: Tekuna suna adana zafi da matsakaicin yanayi: suna ɗaukar CO₂ da zafi daga rana, suna sakin shi sannu a hankali da matsananciyar zafin jiki.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp1: Ruwan teku (misali Gulf Stream) yana canza zafi a duniya, ɗumama ko sanyaya yankunan bakin teku da ke nesa da equator.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp2: Ruwan ruwa: kamar yadda CO₂ ke narkewa a cikin ruwan teku yana samar da carbonic acid (H₂CO₃), ragewan pH da barazanar murjani reefs da shellfish.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp3: Ruwan karkashin kasa: ruwan da aka adana a cikin magudanan ruwa na karkashin kasa. Fiye da hakowa yana rage magudanan ruwa da sauri fiye da yadda suke caji - al'amarin tsaro na ruwa da ke karuwa a duniya.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp4: Zana da cikakken lakabin zagayowar ruwa. Ga kowane mataki, bayyana tsarin aikin jiki da ke tattare da shi (shigar ruwa, daskararru, da sauransu) da tushen makamashin da ke motsa shi. Sa'an nan kuma bayyana ayyukan mutane guda biyu da ke rushe tsarin ruwa.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_desc: Hatsari na yanayi - girgizar ƙasa, volcanoes, tsunamis, guguwa - suna tasowa daga makamashin ciki da na yanayi. Fahimtar musabbabin su, rarrabawa, da tasirin su yana bawa al'umma damar shiryawa, rage lalacewa, da ceton rayuka. Hadarin da ke tattare da yawan jama'a ya dogara ne akan abubuwan zamantakewa da tattalin arziƙin kamar haɗarin jiki da kansa.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp0: Girgizar ƙasa tana faruwa a kan iyakokin farantin tectonic (mai ra'ayin mazan jiya, ɓarna, haɓakawa). Ma'aunin girman Richter/lokaci yana auna sakin kuzari; kowace raka'a = × 32 sau ƙarin makamashi.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp1: Volcanoes suna samuwa a yankunan da aka rushe (fashewa, lava mai danko) da kuma a wurare masu zafi/ iyakoki masu kyau (m, ruwa mai gudu, misali Iceland, Hawaii).
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp2: Tsunamis manyan raƙuman ruwa ne da ke haifar da girgizar ƙasa ta ƙarƙashin teku ko fashewar volcanic. Tsunami a Tekun Indiya a shekara ta 2004 ta kashe mutane ~230,000.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp3: Guguwa na wurare masu zafi (guguwa/typhoons) suna tasowa akan ruwan dumin teku (≥26°C). Suna kawo iska mai tsananin gaske, guguwar guguwa, da ambaliya.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp4: Rashin lahani ga hatsarori na yanayi ya dogara da talauci, ingantaccen gini, tsarin faɗakarwa, da shugabanci - ƙasashe matalauta suna fama da rashin daidaituwa.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_task: Kwatanta musabbabi da illolin wata babbar girgizar ƙasa (misali Haiti 2010) tare da babbar fashewar aman wuta (misali Dutsen Pinatubo 1991). Yi amfani da tebur: Dalili, Girma, Tasirin Farko, Tasirin Sakandare, Amsar ɗan adam.
learnSch_health_f2_name: Taimakon farko shine taimakon gaggawa ga wanda ya ji rauni ko mara lafiya kafin taimakon kwararrun likitoci ya zo. Sanin taimakon farko yana ceton rayuka - gami da 'sarkar tsira' a cikin kamawar zuciya. Ilimin aminci na sirri yana taimakawa hana hatsarori, gane haɗari, da yanke shawara mai kyau a cikin gaggawa.
learnSch_health_f2_desc: Binciken farko (ABCDE): Hanyar iska, numfashi, kewayawa, nakasa (matakin sani), Bayyanawa (rauni da ake gani).
learnSch_health_f2_kp0: CPR (Resuscitation Cardiopulmonary): 30 ƙwaƙwalwar kirji a zurfin 5-6 cm da ~ 100-120 a minti daya, sannan 2 ceto numfashi. Maimaita har sai taimako ya zo.
learnSch_health_f2_kp1: Matsayin farfadowa: ga wanda ya sume amma mai numfashi - yana hana shakewar amai kuma yana buɗe hanyar iska.
learnSch_health_f2_kp2: Don konewa: sanyaya ƙarƙashin ruwan gudu mai sanyi na minti 10. KADA KA yi amfani da kankara, man shanu, ko man goge baki. Rufe shi da tsaftataccen sutura mara laushi.
learnSch_health_f2_kp3: Kiran sabis na gaggawa: bayyana wurin ku, yanayin gaggawa, da adadin mutanen da abin ya shafa. Tsaya akan layi kuma bi umarni.
learnSch_health_f2_kp4: Rubuta jagorar mataki-mataki don amsawa ga mutumin da ya ruguje kuma bai amsa ba. Haɗa: bincika aminci, tantance sani, kiran taimako, matakan CPR, da lokacin tsayawa. Haɗa maƙasudin lambobi (yawan matsawa, zurfin).
learnSch_health_f2_task: Write a step-by-step guide for responding to a person who has collapsed and is unresponsive. Include: checking for safety, assessing consciousness, calling for help, CPR steps, and when to stop. Include approximate numbers (compression rate, depth).
learnSch_arts_f1_name: Dabaru & Kafofin watsa labarai na Art
learnSch_arts_f1_desc: Masu zane-zane suna zaɓar daga ɗimbin fasahohi da kayan aiki - zane, zane-zane, gyare-gyaren bugawa, sassaka, fasahar dijital - kowannensu yana da halaye daban-daban da amfani. Fahimtar kafofin watsa labaru daban-daban yana taimaka muku zaɓi kayan aiki da ya dace don manufar fasaha, da gina ƙamus don tattaunawa da kimanta ayyukan fasaha da mahimmanci.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp0: Zana kafofin watsa labarai: fensir (graphite), gawayi, tawada - kowanne yana samar da ingancin layi daban-daban, sautin, da rubutu. Dabarun shading: ƙyanƙyashe, hatching, stippling, haɗuwa.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp1: Kafofin watsa labaru na zane: launin ruwa (m, wuraren haske da aka bari ba tare da fenti ba), acrylics (tushen ruwa, bushewa mai sauri, m), mai (jinkirin bushewa, launi mai launi, fasaha na glazing na gargajiya).
learnSch_arts_f1_kp2: Bugawa: bugu na taimako (linocut - yankewa don barin ƙira), bugu na allo, etching - kwafi iri ɗaya daga matrix ɗaya.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp3: sculpture: ƙari (samfurin yumbu, haɗawa), ragi (dutse sassaƙa ko itace), simintin ƙarfe (tagulla, guduro). Fasahar shigarwa tana amfani da sarari kanta azaman matsakaici.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp4: Kayan aikin fasaha na dijital (Procreate, Photoshop, Blender) suna kwafi da haɓaka dabarun gargajiya - yadudduka, goge-goge, da ƙirar ƙirar 3D - amma suna buƙatar sanin ƙa'idodin tushe iri ɗaya.
learnSch_arts_f1_task: Zaɓi zane-zane ɗaya da matsakaicin fasaha ɗaya wanda ba ku yi amfani da su a baya ba. Bincika kaddarorin sa, sannan ƙirƙirar binciken ta amfani da wannan matsakaici. Rubuta kalmomi 150 don kimanta abin da ke aiki, abin da ke da wuya, da kuma yadda matsakaici ya shafi sakamakon.
learnSch_arts_f2_desc: Launi shine mafi girman ƙarfin gani - yana haifar da motsin rai, yana haifar da zurfi, kuma yana jagorantar idon mai kallo. Ka'idar launi ta bayyana alaƙar launuka da yadda ake amfani da su da gangan. Daga dabaran launi zuwa hadawar gani, sarrafa launi yana canza tasirin kowane aikin zane.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp0: Launuka na farko (RYB don fenti: ja, rawaya, shuɗi) ba za a iya yin su ta hanyar haɗuwa ba. Launuka na biyu (orange, kore, shunayya) an yi su ne daga firamare biyu.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp1: Launuka masu dacewa suna zama gaba da juna akan dabaran launi (misali ja-kore, shuɗi-orange). Sanya gefe da gefe suna ƙarfafa juna; gauraye suna neutralize zuwa launin toka/launin ruwan kasa.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp2: Zafin launi: launuka masu dumi (ja, lemu, rawaya) suna jin kuzari kuma suna ci gaba da gani. Launuka masu sanyi (blues, greens, purples) suna jin nutsuwa da koma baya.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp3: Tint = launi + fari (mai haske). Inuwa = launi + baki (mafi duhu). Sautin = launi + launin toka. Waɗannan suna ƙirƙirar kewayon ƙima a cikin zane-zane.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp4: Shirye-shiryen launi masu kamanni (launuka masu kusa) suna haifar da jituwa. Shirye-shiryen triadic (launuka guda uku daidai-daidai) suna haifar da bambanci. Monochromatic yana amfani da launi ɗaya a cikin ƙima daban-daban.
learnSch_arts_f2_task: Ƙirƙirar dabaran launi mai nuna duk launuka 12 (3 firamare, 3 sakandare, 6 na uku). Sa'an nan kuma zana ko zana ƙananan murabba'i biyu gefe da gefe ta amfani da madaidaicin biyu kuma bayyana tasirin gani. Bayyana tare da: tint, inuwa, da sautin launi ɗaya.
learnSch_music_f1_desc: An haɗa kayan kida na duniya zuwa iyalai ta yadda suke samar da sauti. Nau'ikan kiɗa - daga na gargajiya zuwa jazz zuwa hip-hop - suna nuna al'adu, tarihi, da mahallin zamantakewa. Sanin kayan kida da nau'ikan nau'ikan yana ba ku duka ƙamus mai amfani da fa'idan jin daɗin kiɗan azaman rayuwa, sigar fasaha mai tasowa.
learnSch_music_f1_kp0: Iyalan kayan aiki: kirtani (violin, guitar - kirtani mai girgiza), iska na itace ( sarewa, clarinet - ginshiƙin iska mai girgiza), tagulla (ƙaho, trombone - lebe masu buzzing), bugun ( ganguna, xylophone - buga), keyboard (piano, gabo - hanyoyin da yawa).
learnSch_music_f1_kp1: Sassan ƙungiyar makaɗa: kirtani, iskan itace, tagulla, kaɗa. Jagora yana daidaita duk sassan ta amfani da motsi da sanda.
learnSch_music_f1_kp2: Kiɗa na gargajiya (1750-1820): Siffofin da aka tsara (sonata, symphony, concerto), mawaƙa kamar Mozart, Haydn, Beethoven. Kiɗa na Romantic (1820-1900): ƙarin furcin tunani, manyan ƙungiyar makaɗa, Brahms, Tchaikovsky, Wagner.
learnSch_music_f1_kp3: Jazz (1900s, Asalin Ba-Amurke): haɓakawa, daidaitawa, raye-raye. Nau'ikan nau'ikan: bebop, jazz mai sanyi, fusion. Blues: kira-da-amsa, 12-bar form.
learnSch_music_f1_kp4: Pop da rock (1950s-): guitar lantarki, bass, ganguna, vocals. Hip-hop (1970s, Bronx NY): DJing, samfuri, raye-raye, karya rawa - cikakkiyar motsin al'adu.
learnSch_music_f1_task: Saurari yanki ɗaya daga kowane nau'ikan nau'ikan nau'ikan nau'ikan guda biyu daban-daban (misali Beethoven symphony da waƙar blues). Ga kowane: gano kayan aikin da aka yi amfani da su, ɗan lokaci, ƙarfin hali, yanayi, da fasalin kida ɗaya keɓancewar wannan nau'in. Kwatanta su a cikin tebur.
learnSch_music_f1_tp0: Iyalan kayan aiki || Wakokin gargajiya da na soyayya
learnSch_music_f1_tp1: Jazz, blues, da nau'ikan zamani na zamani || Tarihin Waka || Tarihin kiɗa yana gano yadda salon kiɗa, kayan kida, da ra'ayoyi suka samo asali a cikin ƙarni da al'adu. Daga Gregorian rera zuwa waƙoƙin Beethoven zuwa kiɗan raye-raye na lantarki, kowane zamani yana nuna ƙimar al'ummarsa, fasaha, da ra'ayin duniya. Fahimtar tarihin kiɗa yana zurfafa godiya kuma yana sanya kiɗan na yanzu cikin mahallin.
learnSch_music_f1_tp2: Medieval (500-1400): Gregorian waƙar (monophonic, kiɗan murya mara rakiya don coci). Renaissance (1400-1600): polyphony (sassarar murya masu zaman kansu da yawa); wakar duniya ta fito.
learnSch_music_f2_name: Baroque (1600-1750): J.S. Bach, Handel, Vivaldi. Ƙwararren ƙira, basso ci gaba, siffofin: fugue, suite, oratori. Opera da aka ƙirƙira a Florence (~ 1600).
learnSch_music_f2_desc: Music history traces how musical styles, instruments, and ideas have evolved across centuries and cultures. From Gregorian chant to Beethoven's symphonies to electronic dance music, each era reflects its society's values, technology, and world view. Understanding music history deepens appreciation and puts current music in context.
learnSch_music_f2_kp0: Medieval (500–1400): Gregorian chant (monophonic, unaccompanied vocal music for the church). Renaissance (1400–1600): polyphony (multiple independent vocal parts); secular music emerges.
learnSch_music_f2_kp1: Baroque (1600–1750): J.S. Bach, Handel, Vivaldi. Ornate counterpoint, basso continuo, forms: fugue, suite, oratorio. Opera invented in Florence (~1600).
learnSch_music_f2_kp2: Lokacin gargajiya (1750-1820): ma'auni, tsabta, ci gaban symphony, sonata form, kirtani quartet. Mozart, Haydn, farkon Beethoven.
learnSch_music_f2_kp3: Zamanin Romantic (1820-1900): Ƙarfin motsin rai, kiɗan shirye-shirye (yana ba da labari), kishin ƙasa (Grieg, Sibelius, Dvořák), faɗaɗa ƙungiyar makaɗa.
learnSch_music_f2_kp4: Karni na 20: Zamani (Stravinsky, Tsarin sautin 12 na Schoenberg), Jazz Age, Juyin Juyin Juyin Halitta na Rock & Roll (1950s), minimalism (Philip Glass), da juyin juya halin dijital na ƙirƙirar kiɗan lantarki da na kwamfuta.
learnSch_music_f2_task: Ƙirƙiri tsarin lokaci na kiɗan Yamma daga 500 AZ zuwa yanzu. Ga kowane lokaci: rubuta suna, kwanan wata, mawaƙa/mawaƙa biyu, fasalin kiɗan maɓalli ɗaya, da kayan aiki ko sifa guda ɗaya. Bambance ko bayyani wani yanki na kida ɗaya daga kowane lokaci.
learnSch_music_f2_tp0: Medieval, Renaissance, Baroque || Zamanin Gargajiya Da Na Soyayya
learnSch_music_f2_tp1: Karni na 20 da zai gabatar || Wasannin Ƙungiya & Dabaru
learnSch_music_f2_tp2: Wasannin ƙungiya suna haɓaka ƙwarewar jiki, tunani na dabara, sadarwa, da jagoranci. Ko ƙwallon ƙafa, ƙwallon kwando, wasan volleyball, ko ƙwallon hannu - kowanne yana buƙatar fahimtar dokoki, matsayi, da dabarun ƙungiyar. Koyon karanta wasan da yanke shawara mai sauri yana da mahimmanci kamar ƙarfin jiki.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_name: Sadarwa: kira ga ball, tsara tsaro, da ƙarfafa abokan aiki suna da mahimmanci kamar fasaha na fasaha a cikin wasanni na kungiya.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_desc: Dabaru a wasan ƙwallon ƙafa: gyare-gyare (4-4-2, 4-3-3) sun ƙayyade yadda ake sanya 'yan wasa. Danna sama sama da farar vs. tsaro mai zurfi yana bambanta hanyoyin dabarun.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp0: Yanke shawara: ƙwararrun ƴan wasa koyaushe suna bincika yanayin su, suna tsammanin motsi na gaba, kuma zaɓi zaɓin da zai amfanar da ƙungiyar maimakon nuna ƙwarewar mutum ɗaya.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp1: Akwai dokoki don gaskiya da aminci. Fahimtar ka'idar Offside (kwallon kafa), allon da ba bisa ka'ida ba (kwallon kwando), ko kuskuren juyawa (wallon volley) yana hana kuskure da hukunci.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp2: Jagoranci da wasan motsa jiki: kyaftin na motsa jiki da sadarwa; duk 'yan wasan suna mutunta abokan hamayya, alkalan wasa, da sakamako - ainihin dabi'un wasanni.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp3: Zaɓi wasan ƙungiyar da kuke kunna ko kallo. Ƙirƙira rawar motsa jiki don haɓaka takamaiman fasaha guda ɗaya (misali wucewa daidaito a ƙwallon ƙafa). Jiha: Ƙwarewar da aka yi niyya, kayan aikin da ake buƙata, umarni don rawar soja, yadda za a ƙara yin wahala, da yadda za a tantance ingantawa.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_tp2: Lafiya ya fi dacewa da jiki - ya ƙunshi lafiyar hankali, barci, abinci mai gina jiki, haɗin kai, da sarrafa damuwa. Kyakkyawan salon rayuwa wanda aka gina akan aiki na yau da kullun, daidaitaccen cin abinci, isasshen bacci, da alaƙa mai kyau yana ba da kariya daga cututtuka na yau da kullun kuma yana tallafawa jin daɗin rayuwa.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_desc: Wellness is more than physical fitness — it encompasses mental health, sleep, nutrition, social connections, and stress management. A healthy lifestyle built on regular activity, balanced eating, adequate sleep, and positive relationships protects against chronic disease and supports well-being throughout life.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp0: WHO ta ba da shawarar minti 150-300 na matsakaicin motsa jiki na motsa jiki a kowane mako don manya (misali tafiya cikin sauri, hawan keke) ko minti 75 na aiki mai ƙarfi.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp1: Barci: matasa suna buƙatar sa'o'i 8-10 kowace dare. Rashin isasshen barci yana lalata ƙarfafa ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya, yanayi, aikin rigakafi, da lokacin amsawa.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp2: Dabarun sarrafa damuwa: motsa jiki na jiki, tunani, zurfin numfashi, sarrafa lokaci, da yin magana da amintaccen mutum duk hanyoyin shaida ne.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp3: Lokacin allo: yawan amfani da shi (musamman kafofin watsa labarun da dare) yana rushe barci kuma yana da alaƙa da damuwa da rashin girman kai a cikin samari. Ragewar dijital da iyakoki suna taimakawa.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp4: Sanin abubuwa: barasa da taba suna da doka amma cutarwa - barasa yana lalata hanta da kwakwalwa; shan taba yana haifar da ciwon daji na huhu da cututtukan zuciya. Dukansu suna da illa musamman ga jikin masu tasowa.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_task: Ƙirƙiri shirin lafiya na mako-mako. Haɗa: zaman motsa jiki 5 (nau'in, tsawon lokaci, ƙarfi), jadawalin barci, dabarun sarrafa damuwa 3, da burin abinci mai gina jiki 2. Yi tunani a kan wane yanki ne ya fi buƙatar haɓakawa kuma me yasa.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_tp2: Sanin lafiyar dijital da abubuwan da ke ciki
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_desc: Ka'idar falsafa tana tambaya: yaya ya kamata mu yi? Me yasa wani aiki yayi daidai ko kuskure? Manyan ginshiƙan ɗa'a guda uku - sakamako, deontology, da ɗa'a na kirki - suna ba da amsoshi daban-daban. Aiwatar da waɗannan tsare-tsare zuwa ɗimbin matsalolin duniya (euthanasia, adalcin yanayi, AI) yana haɓaka fayyace, ingantaccen tunani na ɗabi'a.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp0: Consequentialism (Utilitarianism - Mill, Bentham): wani aiki ne daidai idan ya samar da mafi girma farin ciki ga mafi girma lamba. Sakamakon yana ƙayyade ɗabi'a.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp1: Deontology (Kant): wasu ayyuka daidai ne ko kuskure, ba tare da la'akari da sakamakon ba. Babban Mahimmanci: Yi aiki da dokoki kawai za ku iya zama dokokin duniya.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp2: Da'a na nagarta (Aristotle): mayar da hankali kan hali maimakon dokoki ko sakamako. Mutumin kirki ya koyi halaye na jajircewa, gaskiya, adalci, da halin kamun kai.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp3: Dangantakar ɗabi'a: xa'a ta bambanta tsakanin al'adu da ɗaiɗaikun mutane - babu ƙa'ida ta duniya. Halin halin kirki: wasu ayyuka koyaushe daidai ne ko kuskure ba tare da la'akari da al'ada ba.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp4: Halayen da aka yi amfani da su na yin nazarin takamaiman takaddama: da'a na likita (euthanasia, zubar da ciki), ka'idodin muhalli (ayyukan da ba na ɗan adam ba), da kuma ka'idodin AI (makamai masu cin gashin kansu, sirri).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_task: Aiwatar da kowane ɗayan manyan tsare-tsare na ɗabi'a guda uku (utilitarianism, deontology, virtue ethics) zuwa wannan matsalar: 'Shin yana da kyau a yi ƙarya don kare jin daɗin wani?' Ga kowane, faɗi ainihin ƙa'idar tsarin da amsarsa ga matsalar.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_tp2: Kyakkyawan xa'a da ɗa'a mai amfani
learnSch_social_studies_f2_name: Hakkokin Dan Adam & Kasancewar Duniya || Haƙƙoƙin ɗan adam haƙƙoƙi ne na duniya da kowane mutum ke da shi, ba tare da la'akari da ƙasa, jinsi, launin fata, ko addini ba. The Universal Declaration of Human Rights (1948) ya sanya su cikin dokokin duniya. Kasancewar ɗan ƙasa na duniya yana nufin fahimtar haƙƙoƙinku da haƙƙoƙinku a cikin duniyar haɗin gwiwa da ɗaukar mataki don rayuwa mai adalci, mai dorewa nan gaba.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_desc: Yarjejeniya ta Duniya ta Hakkokin Dan Adam (UDHR, 1948) tana da labarai guda 30 da suka shafi 'yancin jama'a, siyasa, tattalin arziki, zamantakewa, da al'adu - tushen dokokin 'yancin ɗan adam na duniya.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp0: Hakkoki na ƙarni na farko: ƙungiyoyin jama'a da na siyasa ('yancin yin magana, 'yancin yin shari'a na gaskiya, 'yancin yin zabe). Ƙarni na biyu: tattalin arziki da zamantakewa (haƙƙin ilimi, kiwon lafiya, aiki).
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp1: Kungiyoyin kare hakkin dan adam: Majalisar kare hakkin dan Adam ta Majalisar Dinkin Duniya, Kotun hukunta manyan laifuka ta kasa da kasa (ta gurfanar da laifuffukan yaki da laifuffukan cin zarafin bil adama), Kotun Turai ta kare hakkin dan Adam.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp2: Haƙƙoƙin yara: Yarjejeniyar Majalisar Dinkin Duniya kan Haƙƙin Yara (1989) ta ba da tabbacin yancin yara na ilimi, kariya, kula da lafiya, da sa hannu. Kasashe 196 ne suka amince da su.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp3: Dan kasa na duniya: ɗaukar alhakin al'amuran duniya (canjin yanayi, rashin daidaito, rikici) da yin aiki a cikin gida da na duniya. Kungiyoyi masu zaman kansu (Amnesty International, Médecins Sans Frontières) sun aiwatar da wannan ka'ida.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp4: Zaɓi labarai guda uku daga Yarjejeniyar Haƙƙin Dan Adam ta Duniya. Ga kowane: bayyana haƙƙin, ba da misali na ainihi inda aka keta wannan haƙƙin a yau, kuma a ba da shawarar mataki ɗaya da mutum ko gwamnati za su iya ɗauka.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_task: UDHR da dokokin duniya || Hakkokin yara || Dan kasa na duniya da aiki
learnSch_social_studies_f2_tp1: Da'a shine reshe na falsafar da ke tambayar yadda ya kamata mu rayu da aiki. Falsafar ɗabi’a tana bincika tushen ƙa’idodinmu: menene nagarta, menene adalci, kuma yaya ya kamata mu bi da wasu? Waɗannan tambayoyin ba su cika ba - suna ƙarfafa dokoki, yanke shawara na likita, haɓaka AI, da zaɓin yau da kullun.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_tp2: Haƙiƙanin ɗabi'a: haƙiƙanin gaskiya na ɗabi'a suna wanzuwa ba tare da abin da kowa ke tunani ba. Haƙiƙanin ɗabi'a: ɗabi'a mutane ne, al'ummomi ne suka gina su, ko kuma nuni ne kawai na motsin rai.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_name: Matsalar trolley (Judith Jarvis Thomson / Philippa Foot): Shin za ku karkatar da trolley ɗin gudu don kashe mutum ɗaya kuma ku ceci biyar? Tsari daban-daban suna ba da amsoshi daban-daban.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_desc: Adalci (Rawls): tsara al'umma daga bayan 'rufin jahilci' - rashin sanin matsayin ku, kun zaɓi dokoki masu kyau kowa zai yarda da su.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp0: Ci gaban ɗabi'a: al'ummomi suna canza ra'ayoyinsu na ɗabi'a a tsawon lokaci - bautar da aka taɓa zama doka kuma an karɓa; An taba amfani da azabtarwa a kotuna. Wannan yana ɗaga: shin ɗabi'a tana da alaƙa da lokaci?
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp1: Dabi'un dabbobi: Hujjar amfani da Peter Singer na cewa wahalar dabbobi tana ƙidaya daidai da ɗabi'a ga wahalar ɗan adam. Yana da? Menene ya biyo baya don yadda muke ci da bincike?
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp2: Yi nazarin matsalar trolley ta amfani da tsarin ɗabi'a daban-daban guda biyu. Wanne tsarin zai ba da shawara? Sannan ka tsara naka matsalar ɗabi'a ka bincika. Tattauna ko akwai amsa 'dama' ko kuma kawai waɗanda suka fi dacewa.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp4: Animal ethics: Peter Singer's utilitarian argument that animal suffering counts morally equally to human suffering. Does it? What follows for how we eat and research?
learnSch_philosophy_f2_task: Analyse the trolley problem using two different ethical frameworks. Which would each framework advise? Then design your own moral dilemma and analyse it. Discuss whether there is a 'right' answer or only better-reasoned ones.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_tp1: Adalci da Rawwal || Ladubban Dabbobi da Matsalolin da ake amfani da su
learnSch_technology_f2_name: Robotics sun haɗu da injiniyan injiniya, na'urorin lantarki, da shirye-shirye don ƙirƙirar injinan da ke aiwatar da ayyuka kai-tsaye ko na kai-da-kai. Automation - maye gurbin aikin ɗan adam da injuna - yana canza masana'antu, magani, da rayuwar yau da kullun. Fahimtar kayan aikin mutum-mutumi yana shirya ku don duniyar da mutane da injuna ke ƙara yin aiki tare.
learnSch_technology_f2_desc: Robots suna da manyan abubuwa guda uku: na'urori masu auna firikwensin (fahimtar muhalli), masu kunnawa (motsawa da aiki), da mai sarrafawa (yana aiwatar da bayanan firikwensin kuma yana yanke hukunci - 'kwakwalwa').
learnSch_technology_f2_kp0: Digiri na 'yanci (DoF): adadin hanyoyi masu zaman kansu da mutum-mutumi zai iya motsawa. Hannun mutum-mutumi tare da 6 DoF na iya isa kowane matsayi da daidaitawa a sararin 3D.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp1: Mutum-mutumi na masana'antu: walda, zane-zane, taro a masana'antar mota. Robots na haɗin gwiwa (cobots) suna aiki lafiya tare da mutane. Robots na tiyata (Da Vinci) suna ba da izinin aiki daidai.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp2: Intelligence Artificial (AI) yana haɓaka robots tare da hangen nesa (gane abubuwa), sarrafa harshe na halitta (umarnin murya), da koyon injin (inganta daga gwaninta).
learnSch_technology_f2_kp3: Automation da tattalin arziki: mutum-mutumi na ƙara yawan aiki amma suna kawar da wasu ayyuka. Ana ƙirƙira sabbin ayyuka a cikin kulawar mutum-mutumi, tsara shirye-shirye, da ƙira. Ana muhawara akan tasirin yanar gizo.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp4: Ƙirƙirar mutum-mutumi mai sauƙi don yin takamaiman ɗawainiya ɗaya (misali rarrabuwar abubuwan sake amfani da su). Bayyana: na'urori masu auna firikwensin da ake buƙata, ana buƙatar masu kunnawa, dabaru masu sarrafawa (chart stream ko pseudocode), da yuwuwar yanayin gazawa. Sannan tattauna damuwar ɗabi'a ɗaya game da sarrafa wannan aikin.
learnSch_technology_f2_tp2: Dimokuradiyya & Tsarin Mulki || Tsarin gwamnati ya ƙayyade yadda ake tsara al'umma da yadda ake rarraba wutar lantarki. Dimokuradiyya - mulkin mutane - yana da nau'i daban-daban: kai tsaye, wakilai, shugaban kasa, da majalisa. Kwatanta tsarin yana taimaka mana fahimtar dalilin da yasa wasu ƙasashe ke da kwanciyar hankali da yanci yayin da wasu ke da iko ko rashin kwanciyar hankali.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_name: Dimokuradiyya: 'yan ƙasa suna zabar wakilai waɗanda suke yin dokoki a madadinsu. Mahimman ka'idoji: bin doka, raba iko, 'yancin fadin albarkacin baki, bangaren shari'a mai zaman kansa.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_desc: Tsarin Shugaban Kasa (Amurka): Zaɓaɓɓen zartarwa (shugaban ƙasa) an zaɓa kai tsaye kuma ya bambanta da majalisa. Tsarin majalisa (Birtaniya, Jamus): zartarwa ta fito ne kuma tana da alhaki ga majalisa.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp0: Rarraba iko: majalisa (tana yin dokoki), zartarwa (aiwatar da dokoki), shari'a (tana fassara dokokin). Dubawa da ma'auni suna hana kowane reshe daga zama mai ƙarfi sosai.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp1: Gwamnonin mulki: ikon da aka tattara a cikin shugaba ɗaya ko jam'iyya ba tare da haƙƙin dimokiradiyya na gaskiya ba (misali Koriya ta Arewa, Belarus). Tsarin mulki: zaɓen da aka gudanar amma ba na gaskiya ko gaskiya ba.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp2: Jiha: ƙasa mai yawan jama'a na dindindin, gwamnati mai tasiri, da kuma ikon da aka sani. Ƙasashe na iya ƙunsar kabilu da yawa; Jihohin kasa sun daidaita kabilanci da iyakokin siyasa.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp3: Authoritarian regimes: power concentrated in one leader or party without genuine democratic accountability (e.g. North Korea, Belarus). Hybrid regimes: elections held but not free or fair.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp4: The state: a territory with a permanent population, an effective government, and recognised sovereignty. Nations may contain multiple ethnic groups; nation-states align ethnicity with political borders.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_task: Kwatanta tsarin siyasa na Amurka (shugaban kasa) da Jamus (majalisa). Ga kowane: bayyana yadda ake zabar zartarwa, yadda ake yin dokoki, da abin da zai faru idan gwamnati ta rasa goyon bayan jama'a. Wanne kuke ganin ya fi karfin rikon dimokradiyya? Tabbatar.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_name: Hakkin Dan Adam & Dokokin Duniya || Dokokin kasa da kasa suna tafiyar da dangantaka tsakanin jihohi da kuma kare muhimman hakkokin mutane. Umurnin bayan WWII ya haifar da Majalisar Dinkin Duniya, Kotun Hukunta Manyan Laifuka ta Duniya, da kuma yarjejeniyoyin da suka daure kasashe don kare hakkin dan Adam. Fahimtar waɗannan cibiyoyi yana taimaka muku tantance yadda duniya ke amsa rikice-rikice, rashin adalci, da rikice-rikicen jin kai.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_desc: Majalisar Dinkin Duniya (wanda aka kafa 1945, kasashe membobi 193): tana kula da zaman lafiya da tsaro na kasa da kasa, tana inganta ci gaba da kare hakkin dan adam ta hanyar hukumominta na musamman 15.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp0: Dokokin jin kai na kasa da kasa (Yarjejeniyar Geneva): tana kare fararen hula, da sojoji da suka ji rauni, da fursunonin yaki a lokacin rikicin makami. keta su ya zama laifin yaki.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp1: Kotun hukunta manyan laifuka ta duniya (ICC, The Hague): tana tuhumar mutane da laifin kisan kiyashi, laifuffukan cin zarafin bil adama, da laifuffukan yaƙi lokacin da kotunan ƙasa suka gaza yin aiki.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp2: Sarauta vs. Sa baki: Jihohi masu iko ne (babu tsoma bakin waje a cikin al'amuran cikin gida), amma koyarwar 'Alhakin Kare' (R2P) yana ba da damar shiga tsakani lokacin da wata ƙasa ta aikata manyan laifuka.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp3: Dokokin 'Yan Gudun Hijira: Yarjejeniyar 'Yan Gudun Hijira ta 1951 ta ayyana ɗan gudun hijira a matsayin wanda ke gujewa tsanantawa bisa kabilanci, addini, ɗan ƙasa, ra'ayin siyasa, ko ƙungiyar zamantakewa. Dole ne jihohi su mayar da su cikin haɗari (ba a sake su ba).
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp4: Bincika rikicin duniya na yanzu ko na baya-bayan nan (misali rikici ko gaggawa na ɗan adam). Gane: (a) Waɗanne dokokin ƙasa da ƙasa suka yi amfani da su, (b) matakan da Majalisar Dinkin Duniya ko ICC suka ɗauka, (c) hujja ɗaya kuma na adawa da tsoma bakin soja.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_task: Tsarin Majalisar Dinkin Duniya || Kotun hukunta manyan laifuka ta duniya || 'Yan Gudun Hijira da Mulki || Shiga Siyasa & Zabe
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_tp0: Shiga cikin dimokuradiyya ya wuce kada kuri'a - ya hada da yakin neman zabe, koke-koke, zanga-zangar, da kuma tsayawa takara. Tsarin zaɓe ya ƙayyade yadda ƙuri'u ke fassara zuwa kujeru da kuma tsara sakamakon siyasa. Fahimtar sa hannu yana taimaka muku aiwatar da haƙƙoƙinku da gane bambanci tsakanin ingantacciyar dimokuradiyya da murkushe masu jefa ƙuri'a.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_tp1: Tsarin kada kuri'a: Farko-Past-The-Post (Birtaniya, Amurka) - dan takarar da ya fi yawan kuri'u ya yi nasara, yana son samar da tsarin jam'iyyu biyu. Matsakaicin wakilci (Jamus, Netherlands) - jam'iyyun sun sami kujeru daidai da kuri'u, suna karfafa haɗin gwiwar jam'iyyu da yawa.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_tp2: Jam'iyyun siyasa na shirya mutane masu irin wannan ra'ayi don yin takara da kafa gwamnati. Hagu-reshe: mafi girman daidaito, sa hannun jiha. Dama-reshe: 'yanci na mutum, kasuwanni masu kyauta. Tsakiya: matsakaicin matsayi.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_name: Yawan fitowar masu jefa ƙuri'a ya bambanta: yawan jama'a yana ƙarfafa dimokuradiyya. Shingayen sun haɗa da: hadadden rajista, buƙatun ID na masu jefa ƙuri'a, wuraren da ba za a iya shiga ba, da kuma ruɗu.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_desc: Democratic participation goes beyond voting — it includes campaigning, petitioning, protesting, and running for office. Electoral systems determine how votes translate into seats and shape political outcomes. Understanding participation helps you exercise your rights and recognise the difference between healthy democracy and voter suppression.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp0: Voting systems: First-Past-The-Post (UK, USA) — candidate with most votes wins, tends to produce two-party systems. Proportional Representation (Germany, Netherlands) — parties win seats in proportion to votes, encourages multi-party coalitions.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp1: Political parties organise people with similar views to contest elections and form governments. Left-wing: greater equality, state intervention. Right-wing: individual freedom, free markets. Centre: moderate positions.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp2: Voter turnout varies: high civic engagement strengthens democracy. Barriers include: complex registration, voter ID requirements, inaccessible polling stations, and disillusionment.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp3: Shigar da ba na zaɓe ba: koke-koke, zanga-zangar, rashin biyayyar jama'a (wasu dokar zaman lafiya don nuna rashin adalci - Gandhi, Martin Luther King yayi amfani da shi), gwagwarmayar kafofin watsa labarun.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp4: Kafofin watsa labarai da dimokuradiyya: 'Yan jaridu suna rike da gwamnatoci a asusun (Estate 4th). Tace kumfa da kuskuren bayanai suna barazanar jefa ƙuri'a na sanarwa - ilimin kafofin watsa labarai fasaha ce ta jama'a.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_task: Kwatanta FPTP da Wakilci Daidaito ta amfani da waɗannan sharuɗɗa: daidaiton wakilci, kwanciyar hankali na gwamnati, zaɓin masu jefa ƙuri'a, da yuwuwar haɗin gwiwa. Sannan tsara kamfen don zaɓen majalisar makaranta - rubuta takarda, tantance masu jefa ƙuri'a, da tsara ayyukan yaƙin neman zaɓe guda uku.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_tp1: Jam'iyyun Siyasa || Shigar da ba na zabe ba
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_name: Psychology shine binciken kimiyya na hankali, kwakwalwa, da kuma hali. Yana neman fahimtar dalilin da yasa mutane suke tunani, ji, da kuma aikata yadda suke yi - daga barci da ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya zuwa ƙauna da zalunci. Hanyoyin ilimin halin dan Adam na kimiyya ne: gwaje-gwaje masu sarrafawa, dubawa, da bincike na ƙididdiga. Ya canza magani, ilimi, da rayuwar yau da kullun.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_desc: Babban ra'ayi na Psychology: ilmin halitta (kwakwalwa, kwayoyin halitta), fahimi (tsarin tunani), halayya (halayen da za a iya gani, kwandishan), ilimin halin dan Adam (wasu abubuwan da ba a san su ba), da ɗan adam (aikin kai).
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp0: Hanyar kimiyya a cikin ilimin halin dan Adam: hasashe → gwaji → tattara bayanai → bincike → ƙarshe. Bitar takwarorinsu na tabbatar da an duba sakamakon binciken kafin bugawa.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp1: Mahimman yankunan kwakwalwa: prefrontal cortex (yanke yanke shawara, hali), amygdala (jin tausayi, amsa tsoro), hippocampus (samuwar ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya), cerebellum (daidaitawa).
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp2: Dabi'a vs. raya muhawara: har zuwa yaya jinsin halittu (dabi'a) vs. muhalli da gogewa (rayarwa) ke tsara hali, hankali, da lafiyar hankali? Ijma'i na yanzu: duka suna hulɗa.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp3: Da'a a cikin ilimin halin dan Adam: dole ne mahalarta su ba da izini na musamman, za su iya janyewa a kowane lokaci, bayanai na sirri ne, kuma karatun dole ne ya haifar da lahani mai dorewa. Gwajin Milgram (1960s) ya haifar da manyan tambayoyin ɗabi'a.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp4: Ƙirƙirar nazarin lura da ɗa'a don bincika ko ɗalibai sun fi shagaltuwa yayin karatu da kiɗa ko a shiru. Jiha: tambayar bincike, hanya, masu canji, yuwuwar ruɗani, da kuma yadda zaku tantance bayanan.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_tp1: Fahimci & Tunawa || Cognition yana nufin duk hanyoyin tunani: fahimta, hankali, ƙwaƙwalwa, tunani, harshe, da warware matsala. Fahimtar ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya - yadda aka kafa shi, adanawa, da kuma dawo da shi - yana dacewa da karatu kai tsaye. Bincike ya nuna cewa tunowa mai aiki da maimaituwar sarari sun fi ƙarfin sake karantawa don riƙewa na dogon lokaci.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_tp2: Samfurin kantin sayar da kayayyaki da yawa (Atkinson & Shiffrin): ƙwaƙwalwar ƙwaƙwalwa (ɓangaren na biyu) → ƙwaƙwalwar gajere (7 ± 2 abubuwa, ~ 20 sec) → ƙwaƙwalwar ajiyar lokaci mai tsawo (ikon iyaka, mai yuwuwar dindindin).
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_desc: Cognition refers to all mental processes: perception, attention, memory, thinking, language, and problem-solving. Understanding memory — how it is formed, stored, and retrieved — is directly relevant to studying. Research shows that active recall and spaced repetition dramatically outperform passive re-reading for long-term retention.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp0: The multi-store model (Atkinson & Shiffrin): sensory memory (fraction of a second) → short-term memory (7±2 items, ~20 sec) → long-term memory (unlimited capacity, potentially permanent).
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp1: Rufewa: juya gwaninta zuwa alamun ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya. Rubutun bayanai (haɗa sabbin bayanai zuwa ilimin da ake dasu) ya fi tasiri fiye da maimaitawa.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp2: Tasirin tazara: nazarin abu iri ɗaya a cikin lokuta da yawa a kan lokaci (maimaituwar tazara) yana haifar da mafi kyawun tunawa na dogon lokaci fiye da ɗimbin 'kumburi'.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp3: Ayyukan maidowa: tuno bayanai da gaske (gwajin kai, katunan filashi) yana ƙarfafa alamun ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya fiye da sake karantawa. Wannan shine 'tasirin gwaji'.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp4: Ƙwaƙwalwar ƙwaƙwalwa tana sake ginawa, ba ta haifuwa ba: duk lokacin da muka tuna ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya, muna canza shi a hankali. Don haka ba za a iya dogara da shaidar shaidar gani da ido ba - ana nunawa akai-akai a binciken ɗakin kotu.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_task: Gwada tasirin tazara: nazarin sabbin kalmomin ƙamus 20 ta amfani da aiki da yawa (duk lokaci ɗaya a yau). Gwada kanka bayan kwana 1. Sannan yi nazarin sabbin kalmomi 20 a cikin kwanaki 5 (4 kowace rana). Gwaji bayan kwanaki 7. Kwatanta maki kuma rubuta sakamakon bincikenku.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_desc: Ilimin halayyar zamantakewa yana nazarin yadda mutane suke tunani, ji, da kuma halinsu a gaban wasu - na gaske ko na gaske. Yana bayyana yadda mahallin mu ke siffata mu sosai: muna bin ƙungiyoyi, mu yi biyayya ga hukuma, da haɓaka son zuciya - galibi ba tare da sani ba. Fahimtar tasirin zamantakewa yana taimaka mana mu yanke shawara masu zaman kansu, masu zaman kansu.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp0: Daidaituwa (gwajin Asch, 1951): mahalarta sun ba da amsa ba daidai ba a fili lokacin da suka ga wasu suna ba su - suna nuna al'ada (son shiga) da kuma bayani (muminai wasu suna daidai) tasirin zamantakewa.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp1: Biyayya (Milgram, 1963): Mahalarta sun gudanar da girgizar wutar lantarki da alama mai haɗari saboda wani adadi na hukuma ya gaya musu - 65% ya tafi iyakar. Yana nuna yadda iko ke ƙetare lamiri na mutum.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp2: Tasirin kallo: yawan mutanen da ke halarta a cikin gaggawa, ƙananan yuwuwar kowane mutum ɗaya zai taimaka (yaɗa alhaki). Kitty Genovese case, 1964.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp3: Ka'idar Haɗawa: muna bayyana ɗabi'a ta hanyar danganta shi ga abubuwan ciki (halaye, iyawa) ko na waje (yanayin, sa'a). Kuskuren asali na asali: ƙima da ƙima na abubuwan cikin gida don munanan halayen wasu.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp4: Ƙungiya da nuna son kai: muna fifita mutanen da muka yi kama da ('mu') kuma muna iya nuna wariya ga wasu ('su'). Gwajin kogon fashi ya nuna yadda gasar rukuni ke haifar da gaba.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_task: Ka lura babu wanda ke cikin zauren taron jama'a da ke taimaka wa mutumin da ya jefar da littattafansa ya bayyana yana jin zafi. Yin amfani da ilimin halayyar ɗan adam, bayyana: (a) dalilin da yasa wannan zai iya faruwa, (b) waɗanne takamaiman abubuwan da ke ƙaruwa ko rage damar taimakawa, (c) abin da kai da kanka za ku iya yi don shawo kan tasirin mai kallo.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_tp2: Halaye da son zuciya a cikin rukuni
learnSch_astronomy_f0_desc: Tsarin mu na hasken rana ya samo asali ne kimanin shekaru biliyan 4.6 da suka wuce daga gajimare na iskar gas da ƙura. Ya ƙunshi tauraro ɗaya (Rana), taurari takwas, da yawa na watanni, da ƙananan ƙananan jiki marasa adadi - taurari, taurari masu tauraro, da taurarin dwarf. Fahimtar tsarinsa da dakarun da ke tafiyar da ita ya haɗa ilimin kimiyyar lissafi, sunadarai, da matsayinmu a cikin sararin samaniya.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp0: Rana ta ƙunshi kashi 99.86% na yawan tsarin hasken rana. Yana samar da makamashi ta hanyar haɗakar nukiliya: hydrogen nuclei fuse don samar da helium, yana fitar da haske da zafi mai yawa.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp1: Taurari masu duwatsu na ciki: Mercury, Venus, Duniya, Mars - ƙananan, mai yawa, kusa da Rana. Gas na waje/Kattai: Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune - ya fi girma, nesa da Rana.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp2: Dokokin Kepler: taurari suna kewaya Rana a cikin ellipses (ba da'ira ba); matsar da sauri idan kusa da Rana; kuma murabba'in lokacin orbital yayi daidai da cube na radius na orbital.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp3: Belin asteroid yana tsakanin Mars da Jupiter; Kuiper Belt bayan Neptune ya ƙunshi Pluto da sauran duniyoyin dwarf. Comets sun samo asali daga Oort Cloud.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp4: Gravity yana riƙe da komai a cikin kewayawa. Gudun tserewa: gudun da ake buƙata don karyewa daga nauyin jiki - Duniya ta kai ~11.2 km/s; Tsawon wata shine ~2.4km/s.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_task: Ƙirƙirar zane mai ƙididdiga na tsarin hasken rana. Ga kowace duniya: bayyana girmanta dangane da Duniya, lokacin kewayawa, siffa ɗaya ta musamman, da ko zai iya tallafawa rayuwa. Alama bel ɗin asteroid da Kuiper Belt. Bayyana dokar Kepler ta 2 ta amfani da zanen ku.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_tp1: Taurari na waje da qananan jikkuna
learnSch_astronomy_f1_name: Taurari & Juyin Halitta || Taurari ba su dawwama - ana haife su, suna rayuwa, kuma suna mutuwa, sau da yawa a cikin fashe-fashe masu ban mamaki. Makomar tauraro ya dogara kacokan akan yawan sa. Rana daga ƙarshe za ta faɗaɗa zuwa katon ja sannan ta ruguje zuwa farin dwarf, yayin da manyan taurarin za su ƙare a matsayin supernovae da neutron stars ko black hole. Dukkan abubuwan da suka fi hydrogen nauyi an ƙirƙira su a cikin taurari.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_desc: Taurari suna samuwa a cikin nebulae (gazazzabin gizagizai na iskar gas da ƙura) lokacin da nauyi ke haifar da rugujewa da zafi har lokacin da makaman nukiliya ya kunna wuta - haihuwar protostar, sannan babban tauraro mai jeri.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp0: Babban jeri: taurari suna ciyar da yawancin rayuwarsu suna haɗa hydrogen zuwa helium a cikin kwanciyar hankali. Rana ta kasance a kan babban jerin shekaru ~ 4.6 biliyan kuma tana da ~ 5 biliyan.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp1: Zane-zane na Hertzsprung-Russell (HR) yana tsara taurari ta hanyar haske da yanayin zafi. Babban jeri yana gudana a diagonal; jajayen kattai (saman dama) da farar dwarfs (a kasa hagu) sun kashe wannan layin.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp2: Ƙananan taurari (kamar Rana): babban jeri → giant ja → planetary nebula → farar dwarf → (a ƙarshe) dwarf baƙar fata.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp3: Taurari masu girma: babban jeri → ja supergiant → fashewar supernova (yana haifar da abubuwa masu nauyi fiye da ƙarfe, ya warwatsa su cikin sararin samaniya) → tauraron neutron ko rami mai baki.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp4: Zana manyan hanyoyin juyin halitta guda biyu akan zane na HR: ɗaya don tauraro kamar Rana, ɗaya don tauraro sau 20 mafi girma. Ga kowane mataki: bayyana sunan, adadin lokaci, da babban tsarin nukiliya da ke faruwa. Bayyana abin da supernova yake da kuma dalilin da yasa yake da mahimmanci ga asalin abubuwa a duniya.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_tp2: Supernovae da ramukan baki || Galaxies & Cosmology Basics
learnSch_astronomy_f2_name: Bayan tsarin hasken rana namu akwai biliyoyin taurari da aka haɗasu cikin taurari, kuma bayan taurarin taurari akwai sararin da ake gani - kimanin shekaru biliyan 93 haske a fadin kuma shekaru biliyan 13.8. Cosmology - kimiyyar asalin duniya da juyin halitta - ya bayyana hoto mai ban mamaki: Big Bang, fadada sararin samaniya, kwayoyin duhu, da makamashi mai duhu.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_desc: Milky Way wani shinge ne na karkace galaxy mai dauke da taurari biliyan 250. Rana tamu tana ~ 27,000 shekaru haske daga cibiyar galactic. Yana ɗaukar Rana ~ shekaru miliyan 225 don kewaya sararin samaniya.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp0: Nau'in Galaxy: karkace (kamar Milky Way da Andromeda), elliptical (tsofaffin taurari, iskar gas), rashin daidaituwa (ba a fayyace siffa, galibi sakamakon karon galactic).
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp1: Ka'idar Big Bang: ~ 13.8 shekaru biliyan da suka wuce, sararin samaniya ya fara ne a matsayin zafi mai zafi, mai yawa kuma yana fadada tun daga lokacin. Shaida: sararin samaniyar microwave bayan radiation, Dokar Hubble (galaxies suna komawa da sauri fiye da yadda suke).
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp2: Baki mai duhu: al'amarin da ba ya gani wanda baya fitar da haske amma wanda tasirinsa ya haɗe taurarin taurari tare. Ya ƙunshi ~ 27% na yawan kuzarin sararin samaniya. Ba a san yanayinsa ba.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp3: Makamashi mai duhu: wani ƙarfi mai ban mamaki yana haifar da haɓaka haɓakar sararin samaniya. Ya ƙunshi ~ 68% na duniya. Abubuwan al'ada (taurari, taurari, gas) shine kawai ~ 5%.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp4: Ƙirƙirar 'adireshi' don Duniya: duniyar duniya, tsarin taurari, galaxy, ƙungiyar galaxy, supercluster, sararin da ake gani. Samar da nisa/girman ga kowane matakin. Sa'an nan kuma bayyana guda biyu shaida na Big Bang ka'idar, ciki har da abin da cosmic microwave background radiation.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_tp0: Babban Bang da fadada || Baki mai duhu da makamashi mai duhu
learnSch_astronomy_f2_tp2: Latin harshe ne mai jujjuyawa - ƙarshen kalma (ba tsarin kalma ba) yana nuna aikin nahawu. Ƙwararriyar ƙa'idodin suna da haɗin kai yana buɗe ma'anar kowane rubutun Latin, daga rahoton yaƙin Kaisar zuwa waƙar almara na Virgil. Nahawun Latin kuma yana haɓaka fahimtar Ingilishi, Faransanci, Sifen, Italiyanci, da Fotigal.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_name: Latin yana da raguwar sunaye guda biyar. Kowane ƙetare yana da shari'o'i shida: nominative (maudu'i), tuhuma (abu), genitive (mallaka), dative (a kaikaice abu), ablative (daban-daban), vocative (adireshi).
learnSch_latin_language_f0_desc: Misali na 1st declension: puella (yarinya) - puella (nom.), puellam (acc.), puellae (gen.), puellae (dat.), puella (abl.), puella (voc.). Jam'i: puellae, puellas, puellarum, puellis, puellis, puellae.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp0: Ana haɗa kalmomi ga mutum (1st/2nd/3rd), lamba (muɗaɗɗiyar/jam'i), tsauri (yanzu, ajizai, cikakke, gaba), murya (aiki/m), da yanayi (mai nuni, subjunctive, dole).
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp1: Present tense of amare (to love): amo, amas, amat, amamus, amatis, amant — I love, you love, he/ she/ it love, we love, you (pl.) love, they love.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp2: Tsarin kalma a cikin Latin yana da sassauƙa saboda ƙarshen yana ba da aiki: 'Puella aquam portat' da 'Aquam puella portat' duka suna nufin 'Yarinyar tana ɗaukar ruwa.' Ƙaddamarwa tana canzawa amma ma'anar tsayawa.
