learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp3: Karkatar da suna 'dominus' (maigida, 2nd declension na namiji) a cikin dukkan lokuta shida, guda ɗaya da jam'i. Sa'an nan kuma haɗa 'videre' (don gani) a cikin halin yanzu, dukan mutane. Fassara: 'Dominus puellas amat' da 'Puellae dominum vident'.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp4: Word order in Latin is flexible because endings convey function: 'Puella aquam portat' and 'Aquam puella portat' both mean 'The girl carries water.' Emphasis shifts but meaning stays.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_task: Decline the noun 'dominus' (master, 2nd declension masculine) in all six cases, singular and plural. Then conjugate 'videre' (to see) in the present tense, all persons. Translate: 'Dominus puellas amat' and 'Puellae dominum vident'.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_tp2: Tsarin jumlar Latin || Karatun Rubutun Latin || Karatun ingantattun matani na Latin - Kaisar, Cicero, Virgil, Ovid - yana haɗa ku zuwa shekaru 2,000 na tunani, doka, adabi, da kimiyyar Yamma. Ƙwarewar fassarar tana gina daidaitaccen nazari, haƙuri, da ikon yin aiki tare da jumloli masu rikitarwa. Ko da sauƙaƙan rubutu suna bayyana ƙimar Romawa, tarihi, da zance.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_name: Dabarun fassarar: fara gano fi'ili (yana gaya muku aikin da lokacin), sa'an nan kuma jigon (nominative), sa'an nan abu (mai zargi), sa'an nan sauran abubuwa.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_desc: Kaisar 'De Bello Gallico' an rubuta shi a fili, Latin soja - manufa don farawa. Maganganun Cicero suna amfani da rikitattun maganganu. Virgil's 'Aeneid' wakoki ne tare da mita da harshe na alama.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp0: Ƙididdiga masu ƙasƙanci: zargi + rashin iyaka (bayani kai tsaye), jimlar jumla (lokacin/tun), jumlar dangi (qui, quae, quod - wanda, wanda), sakamakon sakamako (ut + subjunctive).
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp1: Cikakken lokaci: an kammala ayyukan da suka gabata. Cikakkun ƙarewa na yau da kullun: -i, -isti, -it, -imus, -istis, -erunt. Misali: amavi = Ina son / Ina so.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp2: Dabarun karantawa: alamomin mahallin suna taimakawa lokacin da nahawu bai bayyana ba. Yi amfani da ilimin tushen kalmomi - yawancin kalmomin Ingilishi asalin Latin ne (misali 'tashar ruwa' daga portare = ɗauka).
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp3: Fassara wannan nassi daga Kaisar: 'Milites Romani castrum magnum aedificaverut. Galli per silvas fugerunt et in montibus se celaverunt.' Nazari: gano batun, fi'ili, abu, da kowace jumlar magana. Wanne hali ne fi'ili? Menene wannan ya gaya mana game da abin da ya riga ya faru?
learnSch_latin_language_f1_task: rubutun Kaisar da Cicero || Matsalolin da ke ƙasa
learnSch_latin_language_f1_tp1: Latin ba harshe ne kawai ba - abin hawa ne na dukan wayewa wanda ya tsara doka, gine-gine, addini, da tunanin siyasa a fadin Turai da duniya. Ka'idodin Roman da ke cikin Latin - res publica, imperium, senatus, ius - sun ba mu 'jamhuriya', 'daular', 'majalisar dattijai', da 'adalci' kai tsaye. Fahimtar wannan gado baya rabuwa da fahimtar tarihin Yamma.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_tp2: Gadon Latin: ~ 60% na ƙamus na Ingilishi an samo su ne daga Latin ko Faransanci masu tasiri na Latin. Sunayen kimiyya, sharuɗɗan shari'a, da ƙamus na likitanci galibi Latin ne.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_name: Har yanzu ana amfani da ra'ayoyin shari'a na Roman: habeas corpus (dole ne ku samar da jiki - dama kada a ɗaure ku ba tare da tuhuma ba), ƙaramar shari'a (ƙarƙashin alkali), a rashi, pro bono, ex parte.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_desc: Gudunmawar addini da al'adun Romawa: kalanda (watanni masu suna bayan gumakan Romawa da sarakuna: Janairu/Janus, Maris/Mars, Yuli/Julius Kaisar), umarnin gine-gine (Doric, Ionic, Korinti).
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp0: Latin mottos har yanzu amfani: carpe diem (kama ranar), cogito ergo sum (Ina tsammanin, saboda haka ni), veni vidi vici (Na zo, na gani, na ci nasara - Julius Kaisar), e pluribus unum (daga da yawa, daya - Amurka taken).
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp1: Roman legal concepts still in use: habeas corpus (you must produce the body — right not to be imprisoned without charge), sub judice (under a judge), in absentia, pro bono, ex parte.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp2: Roman religious and cultural contributions: the calendar (months named after Roman gods and emperors: January/Janus, March/Mars, July/Julius Caesar), architectural orders (Doric, Ionic, Corinthian).
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp3: Latin mottos still used: carpe diem (seize the day), cogito ergo sum (I think, therefore I am), veni vidi vici (I came, I saw, I conquered — Julius Caesar), e pluribus unum (out of many, one — USA motto).
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp4: Littattafan Romawa: Virgil's 'Aeneid' ( tarihin kafa tarihin Roma), Ovid's 'Metamorphoses' (tatsuniyoyi na canji), maganganun Cicero, sharhin soja na Kaisar - duk har yanzu ana karantawa kuma suna karatu a yau.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_task: Nemo kalmomin Ingilishi guda 10 waɗanda aka samo daga tushen Latin a cikin sakin layi ɗaya na kowane littafi. Ga kowane: rubuta tushen Latin, ma'anarsa, da kalmar Ingilishi. Sa'an nan kuma bayyana wani ra'ayi na shari'a na Romawa kuma ku nuna yadda yake aiki a tsarin shari'a na zamani.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_tp0: Tushen Latin a Turanci da Kimiyya || Dokokin Rum da Siyasa || Adabi da al'adun Latin || Karatun Media || Ilimin aikin jarida shine ikon isa, nazari, kimantawa, da ƙirƙirar kafofin watsa labarai. A cikin duniyar da ke cike da bayanai - labarai, kafofin watsa labarun, talla, nishaɗi - ikon tantance tushe mai mahimmanci, gano son zuciya, da kuma gane magudi wata fasaha ce ta dimokiradiyya. Jama'a masu ilimin watsa labarai sun fi wahalar yaudara.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_tp1: Duk saƙonnin kafofin watsa labaru an gina su: wani ne ya yi su, don manufa, don masu sauraro, ta amfani da takamaiman fasaha, tare da tasiri mai tasiri. Tsarin CAGE: Gina, Masu sauraro, Salon, Tasiri.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_tp2: Bias in labarai: zaɓin son zuciya (abin da labarai ke rufewa), ƙaddamar da son zuciya (yadda ake gabatar da su), da son zuciya (wanda ake jin muryoyinsu). Duk kafofin watsa labaru suna da ɗan ra'ayi - tambayar ita ce nawa kuma ta wace hanya.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_name: Ba daidai ba: bayanan karya suna yada ba tare da niyyar yaudara ba. Rarraba bayanai: da gangan bayanan karya da aka kirkira don yaudara. Shafukan yanar gizo na duba gaskiya (Snopes, Cikakken Gaskiya, Siyasa) suna taimakawa tabbatar da da'awar.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_desc: Dabarun talla: roƙon motsin rai, amincewar shahararru, bandwagon ('kowa yana amfani da shi'), ƙarancin ('iyakance tayin'), maimaitawa. Talla yana aiki da hankali - ko da mun san dabaru.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp0: Abubuwan mallakar mallaka: ƙananan kamfanoni sun mallaki mafi yawan kafofin watsa labaru na duniya (News Corp, Disney, Google, Meta). Mahimmancin mallaka na iya iyakance bambancin ra'ayi.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp1: Zaɓi labarin guda ɗaya wanda kafofi daban-daban guda uku suka rufe (misali labarin BBC, tabloid, da kuma rubutun kafofin watsa labarun). Kwatanta: kanun labarai, sautin murya, shaidun da aka yi amfani da su, waɗanda aka haɗa abubuwan da aka ambata, da abin da aka bari. Raba kowa don amintacce. Ƙarshe wanne ne mafi aminci kuma me yasa.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_task: Fim & Kafafen Sadarwa || Fim na ɗaya daga cikin mafi ƙarfin watsa labarai da aka taɓa ƙirƙira. Yana haɗa hoto, sauti, motsi, da gyara don ƙirƙirar ma'ana. Koyon 'karanta' fim kamar rubutu - nazarin kusurwar kyamara, haske, ƙirar sauti, da tsarin ba da labari - yana buɗe ƙwarewar cinema kuma yana ba ku kayan aiki don ƙirƙirar labarun gani na ku.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_tp0: Hotunan kamara: matsananciyar kusanci (ji, daki-daki), kusa-kusa (halayyar hali), matsakaicin harbi (hali + mahallin), dogon harbi (saitin), matsananci tsayin harbi (keɓewa, shimfidar wuri). Kowannensu yana haifar da tasirin tunani daban-daban.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_tp1: Kusurwoyin kyamara: ƙananan kusurwa (yana sa batun yayi kama da ƙarfi), babban kusurwa (yana sa batun ya zama ƙarami / mai rauni), matakin ido (tsaka-tsaki), karkatar Dutch (rashin lafiya / tashin hankali). Hotunan kallo suna nutsar da mai kallo a cikin mahallin hali.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_desc: Film is one of the most powerful storytelling media ever invented. It combines image, sound, movement, and editing to create meaning. Learning to 'read' film like a text — analysing camera angles, lighting, sound design, and narrative structure — opens up a richer experience of cinema and gives you tools to create your own visual stories.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp0: Camera shots: extreme close-up (emotion, detail), close-up (character reaction), medium shot (character + context), long shot (setting), extreme long shot (isolation, landscape). Each creates different emotional effects.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp1: Camera angles: low angle (makes subject look powerful), high angle (makes subject look small/vulnerable), eye level (neutral), Dutch tilt (unease/tension). Point of view shots immerse the viewer in a character's perspective.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp2: Gyara: yanke (motsawa kai tsaye), fade (hannun hankali zuwa baki - yana nuna lokacin wucewa), narke (zoba - yana nuna haɗin gwiwa). Editan Montage yana haifar da ma'ana ta hanyar jeri (Eisenstein).
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp3: Sauti: sautin diegetic (akwai a cikin duniyar fina-finai - tattaunawa, sawun ƙafa), marasa abinci (sautin sauti da masu sauraro kawai ke ji). Kiɗa yana haifar da yanayi; shiru yana haifar da tashin hankali.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp4: Mise-en-scène: duk abin da aka sanya a cikin firam - saita ƙira, kayayyaki, haske, matsayi na ɗan wasan kwaikwayo. Kowane kashi yana sadar da ma'ana da gangan.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_task: Zaɓi yanayi na mintuna 2 daga fim. Nazari: (a) nau'ikan harbi daban-daban guda uku da aka yi amfani da su da tasirin su, (b) haske (maɓalli mai girma = mai haske/mai fara'a ko ƙaramin maɓalli = duhu/asiri?), (c) sauti (bayyana abinci mai gina jiki da marasa abinci), (d) yadda gyare-gyare ke haifar da taki. Ƙaddamar da abin da aka halicce shi da kuma yadda.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_name: Kafofin Watsa Labarai na Dijital & Social Networks
learnSch_media_studies_f2_desc: Kafofin watsa labarun sun canza yadda mutane ke sadarwa, cinye labarai, da kuma samar da gabobin. Har ila yau, sun gabatar da sabbin haɗari: magudin algorithmic, cin zarafi ta yanar gizo, lalata sirri, da lalata siyasa. Fahimtar yadda dandamali ke aiki da yadda ake amfani da su cikin mahimmanci da aminci yana da mahimmancin zama ɗan ƙasa na dijital.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp0: Algorithms ke keɓance abun ciki dangane da halayenku - abin da kuka danna, so, da rabawa. Wannan yana haifar da kumfa masu tacewa inda kuke gani kawai masu tabbatar da ra'ayi, haɓaka polarisation.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp1: Samfurin kasuwanci: galibin dandamali na zamantakewa kyauta ne saboda bayanan masu amfani da kulawa su ne samfurin da aka sayar wa masu talla. 'Idan ba ku biya ba, ku ne samfurin.'
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp2: Sawun dijital: duk abin da kuka buga, so, ko bincike yana barin alamar dindindin. Masu ɗaukan ma'aikata na gaba, jami'o'i, da jami'an tilasta bin doka za su iya samun damar abun cikin ku na jama'a da kuma wani lokacin masu zaman kansu.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp3: Cin zarafin yanar gizo: cin zarafin kan layi wanda zai iya zama wanda ba a san sunansa ba, ya kai wanda abin ya shafa a ko'ina, kuma ya bar rikodin dindindin. Tasiri kan lafiyar kwakwalwa yana da tsanani; laifi ne na doka a yawancin ƙasashe.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp4: Deepfakes da kafofin watsa labarai na roba: AI na iya ƙirƙirar bidiyon karya na mutane na gaske. Wannan yana sa shaidar gani ta ƙara rashin amana - 'ganin' ba ya 'gaskantawa'.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_task: Yi nazari kan kasancewar ku na kafofin watsa labarun: wane hoton ku kuke ƙirƙirar posts ɗin ku? Menene Algorithm din ku ya nuna muku? Kuna bin asusu tare da ra'ayoyi masu gaba? Sannan ƙirƙira jagora don ɗalibin Shekara 7 akan amintaccen amfani da kafofin watsa labarun mai mahimmanci - haɗa da takamaiman 5, shawarwari masu amfani.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_tp2: Zagin yanar gizo da zurfafa zurfafawa
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_desc: Sinanci na Mandarin yana da masu magana sama da biliyan 1 a duk duniya kuma shine yaren da aka fi magana da yaren yare. Ba kamar harsunan haruffa ba, Mandarin yana amfani da sautuna - canje-canje a cikin sauti wanda ke canza ma'ana - da tsarin rubutun kalmomi. Kwarewar tsarin romanisation na Pinyin da sautuna huɗu shine muhimmin mataki na farko.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp0: Pinyin: tsarin romanization na hukuma don Mandarin. Yana amfani da haruffan Latin tare da alamun sauti don wakiltar lafazin magana. Mahimmanci don koyan haruffa da amfani da hanyoyin shigar da dijital.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp1: Sautuna huɗu: 1st (high level, ā) — 'mā' na nufin uwa. Na biyu (tashi, á) - 'má' yana nufin hemp. Na uku (dipping, ǎ) — 'mǎ' na nufin doki. 4th (fadowa, à) - 'mà' na nufin tsautawa. Ƙarin sautin tsaka tsaki (babu alama).
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp2: Na farko (consonants): b, p, m, f, d, t, n, l, g, k, h, j, q, x, zh, ch, sh, r, z, c, s. Ƙarshe (wasulan da ƙarewa): a, o, e, i, u, ü, ai, ei, ao, ou, an, en, ang, eng, ong, da sauransu
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp3: Gaisuwa mai mahimmanci: 你好 (nǐ hǎo) - sannu; 谢谢 (xièxiè) - na gode; 不客气 (bù kèqì) - maraba; 对不起 (duìbuqǐ) - hakuri; 再见 (zàijiàn) - ban kwana.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp4: Nahawun Mandarin ya fi sauƙaƙa fiye da harsunan Turai ta wasu hanyoyi: babu haɗin fi’ili, babu jinsi na nahawu, babu ƙarshen jam’i. Tsarin kalma (Subject-Verb-Object) yana ɗauke da ma'ana.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_task: Saurari sautunan 'ma' duka guda huɗu kuma ku maimaita har sai kun iya samar da kowane ta musamman. Rubuta 'Ni ɗalibi' a cikin Mandarin ta amfani da Pinyin: 'Wǒ shì xuéshēng.' Sai ka rubuta: 'Ina son in ci shinkafa' — 'Wǒ xiǎng chī mǐfàn.' Bayyana bambancin ma'anar da canjin sautin ya haifar a cikin 'mā/mǎ'.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_desc: Haruffan Sinanci (汉字, Hànzì) ɗaya ne daga cikin tsofaffin tsarin rubuce-rubuce a duniya, tare da haruffa sama da 50,000 - ko da yake karatu yana buƙatar sanin kusan 2,000-3,000 na gama gari. Haruffa ba zane-zane ba ne - an gina su daga abubuwa masu ma'ana da ake kira masu tsattsauran ra'ayi, waɗanda ke ba da alamu ga ma'ana da kuma karin magana.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp0: An rubuta haruffa akan grid murabba'i kuma sun haɗa da bugun jini a cikin takamaiman tsari. Dokokin odar bugun bugun jini suna tabbatar da daidaito da ƙwaƙwalwar taimako: gabaɗaya sama zuwa ƙasa, hagu zuwa dama, a kwance kafin a tsaye.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp1: Radicals: duk haruffa suna ɗauke da tsattsauran ra'ayi wanda ke nuna ma'ana. 水 (water radical 氵) yana bayyana a cikin 海 (teku), 河 (kogi), 泳 ( iyo). Sanin ~ 200 masu tsattsauran ra'ayi yana buɗe alamu a cikin dubban haruffa.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp2: Sauƙaƙe da na Gargajiya: Sauƙaƙen haruffa (amfani da su a babban yankin China, Singapore) suna da ƙarancin bugun jini. Haruffa na gargajiya (Taiwan, Hong Kong, al'ummomin ketare) suna adana siffofin tarihi. Misali: soyayya - 爱 (sauƙaƙe) vs. 愛 (na gargajiya).
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp3: HSK (Hanyu Shuiping Kaoshi): daidaitaccen gwajin ƙwarewar Sinanci. HSK 1 = kalmomi 150, HSK 2 = 300, har zuwa HSK 6 = kalmomi 5,000. Mahimmin ma'auni ga masu koyon Sinanci.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp4: Haruffa gama gari don koya da farko: 一二三四五六七八九十 (1–10), 人 (mutum), 大 (babban), 小 (karamin), 中 (tsakiyar/China), 日 (rana/rana), 月 (moon/month), 山 (ruwa), a cikin ruwa (wuta).
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_task: Koyi kuma rubuta (tare da daidai tsarin bugun jini) lambobi 1-10 a cikin haruffan Sinanci. Sannan koyi ƙarin haruffa guda biyar ta amfani da radicals a matsayin taimakon ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya - bayyana haɗin kai ga kowane. A ƙarshe, rubuta sunan ku a cikin Pinyin kuma zaɓi haruffan Sinanci masu dacewa da shi.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_desc: Koyan Mandarin na tattaunawa yana buɗe kofofin zuwa tattaunawa biliyan 1.4 da kuma ɗayan manyan al'adun duniya. Mahimman batutuwa - gabatarwa, lokaci, sayayya, abinci, kwatance - suna ba da ƙamus mai amfani don sadarwar yau da kullun. Daidaitaccen nahawu na Sinanci yana sa tattaunawa ta zama abin ban mamaki da zarar an ƙware sautuna da ƙamus.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp0: Tsarin jumla: Batun + Lokaci + Wuri + Fi’ili + Abu. Misali: 我 (I) 明天 (gobe) 在图书馆 (a cikin ɗakin karatu) 学习 (nazari) 中文 (Chinese) = 我明天在图书馆学习中文.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp1: Tambayoyi: ƙara 吗 (ma) zuwa bayanin eh/a'a tambayoyi. 你是学生 (kai dalibi ne) → 你是学生吗? (Shin dalibi ne?). Ko kuma yi amfani da kalmomin tambaya: 什么 (shénme, menene), 哪里 (nǎlǐ, inda), 什么时候 (shénme shíhòu, lokacin).
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp2: Lambobi da farashin: 一百 (100), 两百五十 (250). A cikin shaguna: 这个多少钱? (zhège duōshǎo qián?) — Nawa ne wannan? 太贵了 (tài guì le) — Yayi tsada! 便宜一点 (piányi yīdiǎn) — Mai rahusa kaɗan don Allah.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp3: Abinci da oda: 我要一碗米饭 (Wǒ yào yī wǎn mǐfàn) — Ina son tuwon shinkafa. 我不吃肉 (Wǒ bù chī ròu) - Ba na cin nama. 好吃! (Hǎochī!) - Dadi!
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp4: Halin al'adu: musayar katunan kasuwanci da hannaye biyu; yin jawabi ga dattawa bisa ka’ida; muhimmancin 面子 (miànzi, 'fuska' - suna, mutunci); da'a na kyauta. Harshe da al'adu ba sa rabuwa.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_task: Wasan kwaikwayo (rubuta ko rikodin) tattaunawa a gidan cin abinci na kasar Sin. Kun hada da: gaishe da ma'aikaci, tambayar abin da yake mai kyau, odar abinci biyu da abin sha (amfani da kalmomin ma'auni daidai), tambayar farashi, da ban kwana. Nufin aƙalla musayar guda 10. Bayyana fassarar Pinyin da Turanci.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_tp2: Abinci, al'adu, da rayuwar yau da kullun || Canjin Yanayi & Zagayowar Carbon
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_name: Canjin yanayi shine ma'anar ƙalubale na zamaninmu. Fitar da iskar gas na ɗan adam yana ɗumamar duniya a wani yanayi da ba a taɓa ganin irinsa ba, yana tarwatsa yanayin yanayi, narkar da ƙanƙara, da barazana ga yanayin muhalli da al'ummomin ɗan adam. Fahimtar ilimin kimiyya - zagayowar carbon, maki mai tsoka, da madaukai na amsa - yana da mahimmanci ga kowane ɗan ƙasa da aka sani.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_desc: Zagayowar carbon: CO₂ yana motsawa tsakanin yanayi, tekuna, ƙasa (tsiri ta hanyar photosynthesis), da rayayyun halittu (ta hanyar numfashi). Burbushin burbushin ƙonawa yana fitar da carbon da aka adana na miliyoyin shekaru, yana rushe zagayowar.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp0: Tasirin greenhouse: hasken rana yana dumama Duniya; Duniya tana fitar da hasken infrared; iskar gas (CO₂, CH₄, N₂O, H₂O tururi) na shanye shi kuma ya sake haskaka zafi, yana dumama saman. Idan ba tare da shi ba, duniya za ta kasance -18 ° C; tare da shi (na halitta), 15 ° C; haɓakawa = ɗumamar haɗari.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp1: Matsayi na yanzu (2024): yanayin yanayi CO₂ ya wuce 420 ppm (kafin masana'antu: 280 ppm). Matsakaicin zafin jiki na duniya ya tashi ~1.2°C sama da matakan masana'antu kafin masana'antu. Yarjejeniyar Paris na nufin iyakance dumamar yanayi zuwa 1.5°C.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp2: Wuraren jujjuyawa yanayi: ƙofofin da suka wuce waɗanda canje-canje suka zama masu ƙarfafa kai. Narke permafrost yana sakin CH₄; narkewar ƙanƙarar Arctic yana fallasa teku mai duhu, yana ɗaukar ƙarin zafi; Yanke dazuzzuka na Amazon na fuskantar kasadar mayar da dazuzzukan daji zuwa savanna.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp3: Adalci na yanayi: Kasashe masu tasowa suna ba da gudummawa a kalla don fitar da hayaki amma suna fama da tasirin yanayi (hawan teku, matsanancin zafi, gazawar amfanin gona). Ma'auni na ɗabi'a da siyasa na ayyukan yanayi ba su da bambanci da kimiyya.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp4: Zana da bayyani tsarin zagayowar carbon, yana nuna kwararar yanayi da rushewar ɗan adam. Yi ƙididdige: idan ƙasa tana fitar da 500 Mt CO₂ a kowace shekara kuma ta shuka bishiyoyi masu ɗaukar 50 Mt / shekara yayin da aka canza zuwa abubuwan sabuntawa yana adana 100 Mt / shekara, shekaru nawa don isa sifilin net (ba tare da ɗaukan sabbin matakan ba)? Ƙimar ƙarin ayyuka uku da ƙasar za ta iya ɗauka.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_task: Carbon sake zagayowar da kuma greenhouse sakamako
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_tp1: Bayanai na yanzu da yarjejeniyar Paris
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_desc: Halittar halittu - iri-iri na rayuwa a duniya - shine tushe na lafiyayyen halittu waɗanda ke samar mana da abinci, ruwa mai tsabta, magunguna, da kwanciyar hankali. A halin yanzu muna fuskantar ɓarna ta shida na jama'a, wanda ke haifar da lalacewa ta hanyar lalacewa, gurɓataccen yanayi, nau'in mamayewa, da sauyin yanayi. Fahimtar yanayin halittu yana bayyana dalilin da yasa kowane nau'in da ya ɓace yana da mahimmanci.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp0: Sabis na muhalli: yanayin fa'idodin yana ba da kyauta - pollination (mahimmanci ga 75% na amfanin gona), tsarkakewar ruwa, sarrafa ambaliya, ajiyar carbon, samuwar ƙasa, da kariyar bakin teku.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp1: Rushewar taro na shida: nau'in nau'in nau'in nau'in nau'in nau'in nau'in nau'in nau'in nau'in nau'in nau'in nau'in nau'in nau'in nau'in nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i nau'i) barewa) sau 100-1,000 da sauri fiye da yanayin asalin halitta. ~ 1 miliyan nau'in suna barazana a halin yanzu. Dalilai na farko: canjin amfani da ƙasa (asara mazauna), wuce gona da iri, gurɓataccen yanayi, nau'in ɓarna, canjin yanayi.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp2: Jinsunan maɓalli: nau'ikan da ke taka rawar da ba ta dace ba a cikin yanayin yanayin su. Cire su yana haifar da rugujewar yanayin muhalli - misali. Wolves a cikin Yellowstone da ke sarrafa yawan barewa, wanda ya ba da damar ciyayi su dawo, suna shafar koguna.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp3: Biomes: manyan al'ummomin muhalli da aka bayyana ta yanayin yanayi da ciyayi - gandun daji na wurare masu zafi (mafi girman nau'in halittu), daji mai zafi, ciyayi / savanna, hamada (matsanancin yanayi), tundra (permafrost), teku (mafi girma biome).
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp4: Dabarun kiyayewa: wuraren da aka karewa ( wuraren shakatawa na kasa, wuraren ajiyar ruwa), rewilding (maido da nau'ikan halitta da tsari), tsoffin wuraren kiyayewa (gidajen dabbobi, bankunan iri), yarjejeniyar CITES (tana sarrafa ciniki a cikin nau'ikan da ke cikin haɗari).
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_task: Bincika yanayin halittu guda ɗaya da ke cikin haɗari (misali murjani reefs, dajin Amazon, peat bogs). Don zaɓaɓɓun yanayin yanayin da kuka zaɓa: (a) bayyana nau'ikan halittunsa, (b) bayyana barazanar uku, (c) ƙididdige ƙimar tattalin arziƙin sabis ɗin halittu, (d) kimanta dabarun kiyayewa guda uku da ingancinsu.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_desc: Dorewa yana nufin biyan buƙatun na yanzu ba tare da ɓata ikon al'ummomi masu zuwa don saduwa da nasu ba (ma'anar Brundtland, 1987). Juyawa zuwa duniya mai dorewa na buƙatar canje-canje a makamashi, abinci, sufuri, da amfani - kuma ya haɗa da kowa daga gwamnatoci da kamfanoni zuwa daidaikun mutane.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp0: Manufofin Ci gaba mai dorewa (SDGs): murabba'i 17 da dukkan ƙasashe membobin Majalisar Dinkin Duniya suka amince da su a cikin 2015, wanda ke nufin fatara, lafiya, ilimi, makamashi mai tsafta, aikin yanayi, da rayayyun halittu nan da 2030.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp1: Makamashi mai sabuntawa: hasken rana, iska, ruwa, geothermal, da magudanar ruwa suna samar da wutar lantarki tare da ƙarancin gurɓataccen iska. Kudin hasken rana da iska sun faɗi 90%+ tun daga 2010 - yanzu sune mafi arha hanyoyin samar da makamashi da aka taɓa ginawa.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp2: Tattalin arzikin madauwari: maimakon ɗaukar-yi- zubar, ana sake amfani da kayan, gyare-gyare, da sake yin fa'ida a cikin madaukai masu rufe. Yana rage sharar gida, adana albarkatu, da samar da ayyukan yi.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp3: Tsarin abinci: aikin noma ya kai ~25% na hayaki mai gurbata yanayi na duniya. Rage cin nama (musamman naman naman sa), yanke sharar abinci, da canzawa zuwa noma mai ɗorewa (kwayoyin halitta, agroforestry) sune manyan levers.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp4: Abubuwan da suka shafi ɗaiɗaikun ɗaiɗaikun: sawun carbon ya bambanta da yawa. Yawo, cin nama, da tukin motocin man fetur sune mafi girman tasirin zabin mutum. Amma canjin tsari - manufofin gwamnati, ayyukan kamfanoni, abubuwan more rayuwa - yana da tasiri sosai.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_task: Yi lissafin sawun carbon ɗin ku na wata-wata ta amfani da kalkuleta kan layi. Gano ayyukanku uku mafi girman tasiri. Bincika da ba da shawarar canji na mutum ɗaya da sauyi na tsari ɗaya (manufofin gwamnati ko na kamfani) waɗanda zasu rage sawun ku. Present: sawun na yanzu, sawun manufa, da tsarin lokaci.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_tp1: Tattalin arzikin da'ira || Tsarin abinci da mutum vs. tsarin aiki
learnUni_mathematics_f5_name: Bincike na ainihi shine ƙaƙƙarfan tushe na ƙididdiga, yana tabbatar da sakamako game da iyaka, ci gaba, bambanta, da haɗin kai ta amfani da ma'anar ε-δ daidai. Yana maye gurbin tunani mai fa'ida tare da hujjar ma'ana mara ruwa - babban canji a cikin balagaggen lissafi da ake buƙata a matakin jami'a.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_desc: ε-δ iyaka: lim_{x→a} f(x) = L yana nufin kowane ε>0 akwai δ>0 kamar haka 0<|x−a|<δ yana nufin |f(x) -L|<ε. Wannan yana kawar da shubuha daga ma'anar 'kusanci'.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp0: Ka'idar Bolzano-Weierstrass: kowane jeri mai iyaka a cikin ℝⁿ yana da juzu'i mai zuwa. Heine-Borel: wani yanki na ℝⁿ yana da ƙarfi idan an rufe shi kuma an ɗaure shi.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp1: Matsakaicin Ƙimar Ƙimar: idan f yana ci gaba a kan [a,b] da f (a) da f (b) suna da alamun sabani, akwai c ∈ (a,b) tare da f(c) = 0. An tabbatar da shi sosai daga cikar ℝ.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp2: Ci gaba da Uniform: guda δ yana aiki don duka x lokaci guda - ya fi ƙarfin ci gaba. Kowane aiki mai ci gaba a kan ƙaƙƙarfan saiti yana ci gaba iri ɗaya.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp3: Riemann vs. Lebesgue na haɗin gwiwa: haɗin Lebesgue yana faɗaɗa Riemann ta hanyar auna saiti (ka'idar auna) kuma yana ɗaukar ayyuka da yawa, gami da iyakoki na jeri.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp4: Yin amfani da ma'anar ε-δ, tabbatar da cewa lim_{x→3} (2x−1) = 5. Sannan yi amfani da IVT don nuna cewa x⁵ - x - 1 = 0 yana da aƙalla mafita guda ɗaya. Tabbatar cewa f(x) = 1/x baya ci gaba a kan (0,1) amma yana kan [0.5, 2].
learnUni_mathematics_f5_task: ε-δ iyaka da ci gaba || Karamci da IVT
learnUni_mathematics_f5_tp0: Ci gaban Uniform da haɗin kai
learnUni_mathematics_f5_tp1: Abstract Algebra || Abstract algebra yana haɓaka ayyukan ƙididdiga zuwa ƙayyadaddun tsari: ƙungiyoyi (aiki ɗaya), zobe (ayyukan ayyuka biyu), da filayen (ayyukan yi biyu tare da inverses). Wannan yana haɗa rarrabuwar lissafin lissafi kuma yana ƙarfafa cryptography na zamani (masu lanƙwasa masu lanƙwasa akan filaye masu iyaka) da kimiyyar lissafi (ƙungiyoyin simmetry a cikin ilimin kimiyyar lissafi).
learnUni_mathematics_f5_tp2: Ƙungiya axioms: rufewa (a★ b ∈ G), haɗin gwiwa ((a★b) ★ c = a★ (b★c)), ainihi (e★a = a), saba (a★a⁻¹ = e). Misalai: (ℤ+), (ℚ\{0},×), rukunin dihedral Dₙ (symmetries na n-gon).
learnUni_mathematics_f6_name: Ka'idar Lagrange: idan H rukuni ne na rukunin G, to |H| raba |G|. Ƙarfafawa: tsari na kowane abu yana raba |G|. Ƙungiya na yau da kullun suna ba da izinin gina ƙungiyar ƙididdiga ta G/N.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_desc: Ka'idar ringi: (R+,×) inda (R+) ƙungiya ce ta abelian, × tana haɗin gwiwa da rarrabawa. Ƙungiyoyin haɗin gwiwa (babu masu rarraba sifili). Abubuwan da suka dace sun haɗa ƙungiyoyin ƙungiyoyi don zoben. Babban manufa yanki (PIDs): kowane manufa ta hanyar kashi ɗaya.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp0: Group axioms: closure (a★b ∈ G), associativity ((a★b)★c = a★(b★c)), identity (e★a = a), inverse (a★a⁻¹ = e). Examples: (ℤ,+), (ℚ\{0},×), dihedral group Dₙ (symmetries of n-gon).
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp1: Lagrange's theorem: if H is a subgroup of finite group G, then |H| divides |G|. Corollary: order of any element divides |G|. Normal subgroups allow quotient group construction G/N.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp2: Ring theory: (R,+,×) where (R,+) is abelian group, × is associative and distributive. Integral domains (no zero divisors). Ideals generalise subgroups for rings. Principal ideal domains (PIDs): every ideal generated by one element.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp3: Filaye: kowane kashi mara sifili yana da juzu'i mai yawa. Misalai: ℚ, ℝ, ℂ, da iyakacin filayen 𝔽_p = ℤ/pℤ (p prime). Ƙayyadaddun filayen suna arfafa ɓoyayyen AES da lambobin gyara kuskure.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp4: Ka'idar Galois: tana haɗa tushen polynomials zuwa ka'idar rukuni. Ƙungiyar Galois na wani nau'in nau'in nau'i na nau'i na nau'in nau'i na nau'in nau'i na nau'i na nau'i-nau'i na tushen sa. Za'a iya warware yawan adadin yawan jama'a ta masu tsattsauran ra'ayi idan ƙungiyar Galois ƙungiya ce mai warwarewa - ta bayyana rashin warware ma'aunin digiri≥5 gabaɗaya.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_task: Tabbatar da cewa ℤ₆ ƙarƙashin ƙari rukuni ne. Nemo duk ƙananan ƙungiyoyi kuma tabbatar da ka'idar Lagrange. Tabbatar da ℤ₂×ℤ₃ ≅ ℤ₆ ta hanyar nuna isomorphism bayyananne. Sannan nuna ℤ₂×ℤ₂ ≇ ℤ₄ ta hanyar nemo wata kadara da ta banbance su.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_name: Ƙididdigar ƙididdiga tana ƙaddamar da ƙididdiga zuwa ayyuka na madaidaicin madaidaici. Ayyukan Holomorphic (masu rikitarwa-masu bambanta) ba su da iyaka mara iyaka kuma suna ɓoye bayanan duniya a cikin bayanan gida. Muhimman ka'idar Cauchy, ragowar lissafin lissafi, da taswira na yau da kullun sun sa ya zama mai ƙarfi a cikin ilimin kimiyyar lissafi, injiniyanci, da ka'idar lamba.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_desc: Bambanci mai rikitarwa: f'(z) = lim_{h→0} [f(z+h) -f(z)]/h (h ∈ ℂ). Cauchy-Riemann equations: idan f = u+iv holomorphic ne to ∂u/∂x = ∂v/∂y da ∂u/∂y = -∂v/∂x.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp0: Ka'idar haɗin kai ta Cauchy: don holomorphic f ciki da kuma a kan sauƙi rufaffiyar kwane-kwane C, ∮_C f(z) dz = 0. Tsarin Cauchy: f(z₀) = (1/2πi) ∮_C f(z)/(z−z₀) dz.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp1: Jerin Taylor da Laurent: Ayyukan holomorphic suna faɗaɗa azaman jerin wutar lantarki. Jerin Laurent yana ba da damar iko mara kyau - mahimmanci kusa da keɓaɓɓen ɓangarorin (sanduna, mahimmancin singularities).
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp2: Ragowar ka'idar: ∮_C f(z) dz = 2πi × Σ Res(f, zₖ) ga duk sandar zₖ cikin C. Rago a cikin sauki z₀: Res = lim_{z→z₀} (z−z₀) f(z). Ana amfani da shi don kimanta abubuwan haɗin kai ta zahiri ta zaɓin kwane-kwane mai wayo.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp3: Taswirar daidaitattun taswira: ayyuka na holomorphic tare da kusurwoyi marasa sifili masu kiyayewa a gida. Möbius yana canza taswirar da'ira/layi zuwa da'ira/layi. An yi amfani dashi a cikin motsin ruwa, electrostatics, da zane-zane.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp4: Tabbatar f(z)=z² holomorphic ne ta hanyar daidaitattun Cauchy-Riemann. Yi lissafta ∮_{|z|=2} dz/(z²−1) ta amfani da ragowar ka'idar: nemo sanduna, duba wanda ke cikin |z|=2, lissafta ragowar, sannan a yi amfani da ka'idar. Tabbatarwa ta ɓangaren juzu'i.
learnUni_physics_f2_name: Daidaiton Maxwell yana haɗa wutar lantarki, maganadisu, da na'urorin gani zuwa cikin kyakkyawan tsari ɗaya. Suna tsinkayar igiyoyin lantarki da ke tafiya a c, suna bayyana radiyo, kuma sun zama tushen duk injiniyan lantarki. Fahimtar su a matakin ƙididdiga na vector alama ce ta ilimin kimiyyar lissafi.
learnUni_physics_f2_desc: Daidaiton Maxwell: ∇·E = ρ/ε₀, ∇·B = 0, ∇×E = -∂B/∂t, ∇×B = μ₀(J + ε₀∂E/∂t). Tare suna haɗa dukkan abubuwan al'amuran lantarki na zamani.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp0: Maxwell's equations: ∇·E = ρ/ε₀, ∇·B = 0, ∇×E = −∂B/∂t, ∇×B = μ₀(J + ε₀∂E/∂t). Together they unify all classical electromagnetic phenomena.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp1: Wutar lantarki: a cikin sarari kyauta, E da B suna gamsar da ∇²E = μ₀ε₀∂²E/∂t², yana ba da saurin kalaman c = 1/√(μ₀ε₀) ≈ 3 × 10⁸ m/s. Haske shine igiyar wutan lantarki.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp2: Poynting vector S = (1/μ₀) E×B: shugabanci da adadin kwararar makamashin lantarki. Matsin Radiation: Raƙuman ruwa na EM suna ɗaukar lokacin p = U/c.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp3: Yanayin iyaka a musaya na kayan abu: tangential E da na al'ada B suna ci gaba. Ƙayyade tunani da refraction (Fresnel equations bada amplitudes; Snell ta dokar bada kusura).
learnUni_physics_f2_kp4: Fadada igiyoyi masu yawa: nesa da rarraba caji, filayen suna mamaye manyan sharuɗɗan - monopole (1/r²), dipole (1/r³), quadrupole (1/r⁴). Oscillating dipoles yana haskaka raƙuman ruwa na EM - tushen eriya.
learnUni_physics_f2_task: An fara daga ma'auni na Maxwell a cikin vacuum (ρ=0, J=0), sami ma'auni na electromagnetic wave don E. Nuna c = 1/√(μ₀ε₀). Sa'an nan kuma rubuta filayen don motsin jirgin sama yana yaduwa a cikin z-direction kuma nuna cewa E, B, da k sun kasance daidai da juna kuma |E|/|B| = c.
learnUni_physics_f2_tp1: EM taguwar ruwa da Poynting vector
learnUni_physics_f3_desc: Makanikai na ƙididdiga suna samun macroscopic thermodynamics daga halayen ƙididdiga na ƙananan ƙwayoyin cuta. Rarraba Boltzmann, aikin bangare, da entropy azaman log na microstates suna haɗa ilimin kimiyyar atomic zuwa abubuwan yanayin zafi na yau da kullun - daga baƙar fata-baƙar fata zuwa canjin lokaci.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp0: Rarraba Boltzmann: yiwuwar microstate tare da makamashi E shine P ∝ e ^ {-E/k_BT}. Mafi girman zafin jiki yana ba da damar zama manyan jihohin makamashi. Wannan ma'auni guda ɗaya yana ƙarƙashin sunadarai, astrophysics, da ilmin halitta.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp1: Aikin bangare Z = Σᵢ e^{-βEᵢ} (β=1/k_BT). Makamashi kyauta F = -k_BT ln Z. Duk nau'ikan thermodynamic sun biyo baya: ⟨E⟩ = -∂ln Z/∂β, entropy S = -∂F/∂T, matsa lamba P = -∂F/∂V.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp2: Boltzmann entropy: S = k_B ln Ω (Ω = adadin microstates). Doka ta biyu: Ω yana ƙaruwa ba zato ba tsammani → S koyaushe yana ƙaruwa cikin keɓantattun tsarin. Kibiya na lokaci yana fitowa daga ƙididdiga.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp3: Ƙididdigar ƙididdiga: bosons suna biyayya ga rarraba Bose-Einstein (barbashi da yawa a kowace jiha → superfluidity, lasers, Bose-Einstein condensate). Fermions suna yin biyayya ga Fermi-Dirac (ɗaya a kowace jiha → tsarin lantarki na ƙarfe, farin dwarfs, taurarin neutron).
learnUni_physics_f3_kp4: Canje-canje na lokaci: a cikin matsanancin zafin jiki Tc, oda siga tsalle (tsari na farko) ko ya tashi ci gaba (tsari na biyu). Ising model yana kama feromagnetism. Kusa da mahimmin mahimmin batu: Dokokin sikeli na duniya, tsayin daidaitawa daban-daban, azuzuwan duniya.
learnUni_physics_f3_task: Samar da aikin bangare don tsarin matakai biyu (makamashi 0 da ε). Nemo ⟨E⟩, C_V = ∂⟨E⟩/∂T, da entropy S. Sketch C_V vs. T (Schottky peak). Fassara kololuwar jiki. Aiwatar da ma'aunin Boltzmann don ƙididdige juzu'in ƙwayoyin ƙwayoyin cuta a cikin yanayi mai daɗi a T = 300 K idan ε = 0.025 eV.
learnUni_physics_f3_tp1: Entropy da doka ta biyu || Ƙididdigar ƙididdiga da sauye-sauyen lokaci
learnUni_physics_f4_desc: Makanikan ƙididdigewa shine mafi kyawun gwajin ka'idar jiki, daidai zuwa wurare 12 na ƙima a cikin hasashen QED. Yana maye gurbin yanayin yanayin al'ada tare da ayyukan raƙuman ruwa da ke tasowa a ƙarƙashin lissafin Schrödinger kuma yayi bayanin atoms, ƙwayoyin cuta, lasers, semiconductor, da na'urorin MRI. Hakanan yana da daure kai a falsafa.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp0: Wavefunction ψ(x,t): |ψ|² shine yuwuwar yuwuwar yawa. Daidaitawa: ∫|ψ|² dx = 1. Juyin Halitta: iℏ ∂ψ/∂t = Ĥψ. Jihohi masu tsayayye: Ĥψ_n = E_n ψ_n — eigenstates makamashi.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp1: Rijiyar murabba'i mara iyaka: ψ_n = √(2/L) zunubi(nπx/L), E_n = n²π²ℏ²/(2mL²). Matsakaicin adadin kuzari - yayi bayanin nau'in atomic. Ƙarfin sifili E₁> 0 ko da a T=0.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp2: Quantum harmonic oscillator: E_n = (n+½)ℏω, n=0,1,2,...Masu haɓakawa / rage yawan masu aiki â±. Jihar ƙasa tana da Gaussian wavefunction. Model jijjiga kwayoyin halitta da adadin filin.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp3: Hydrogen atom: yuwuwar yuwuwar Coulomb mai ma'ana. Maganganun da aka yi wa laƙabi ta ƙididdige lambobi n (makamashi), l (ƙaramar angular), m (magnetic). Siffofin Orbital (s, p, d, f) suna ƙayyade haɗin gwiwar sinadaran.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp4: Entanglement da Bell's theorem: za a iya danganta barbashi biyu ta hanyoyin da ba za a iya bayyana su ta hanyar ɓoyayyun maɓallan gida ba. Rashin daidaiton kararrawa an keta ta gwaji - ya tabbatar da rashin wurin injiniyoyin adadi. Tushen don ƙididdigar ƙididdiga.
learnUni_physics_f4_task: Warware murabba'in 1D mara iyaka da kyau: rubuta ψ_n da E_n. Yi lissafin E₁ don lantarki a cikin L = 1 nm rijiyar. Ana shirya barbashi a cikin ψ = (1/√2)(ψ₁ + ψ₂). (a) Shin wannan yanayin eigenstate ne na makamashi? (b) Lissafi ⟨E⟩. (c) Bayyana yadda ⟨x⟩ ke tasowa cikin lokaci. (d) Bayyana abin da ke faruwa lokacin da kuka auna makamashi.
learnUni_physics_f5_desc: Na'urorin gani na zamani suna ɗaukar haske duka a matsayin igiyar wutan lantarki (wave optics) da kuma azaman photons (quantum optics). Wave optics yana bayanin tsangwama, diffraction, da polarization daidai. Photonics - kimiyya da fasaha na samar da photon da sarrafawa - suna tallafawa lasers, fibres na gani, ƙwayoyin rana, da fasahar ƙididdiga masu tasowa.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp0: Wave Optics: tsangwama da rarrabuwar kawuna sun taso daga ka'idar Huygens-Fresnel (kowane batu na gaban igiyar ruwa shine tushen na biyu). Tsaga biyu na matashi yana ba da tazarar gezawa Δy = λL/d.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp1: Fourier optics: ruwan tabarau yana yin sauyi na Fourier a cikin jirgin sama mai zurfi. Tace sararin samaniya - toshe wasu mitoci na sararin samaniya - shine tushen sarrafa hoto da ƙaramin gani.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp2: Laser physics: juyewar yawan jama'a da aka samu ta hanyar famfo na gani ko lantarki. Fitarwa mai kuzari yana haifar da daidaituwa, monochromatic, haske na jagora. Cavities na Laser zaɓi hanyoyi. Aikace-aikace: tiyata, lidar, tweezers na gani, duban lamba.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp3: Fibres na gani: jimlar tunani na ciki (kwana> kusurwa mai mahimmanci θ_c = arcsin(n₂/n₁)) yana kama haske a cikin ainihin. Zaɓuɓɓuka guda ɗaya don sadarwa mai tsayi; Multi-yanayin don gajeriyar nisa. Attenuation ~ 0.2 dB/km a 1550 nm.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp4: Quantum optics: statistics na photon (daidaitacce vs. thermal vs. matsi haske), tushen hoto guda, nau'i-nau'i na photon da aka makale (ta hanyar jujjuyawar juzu'i na kwatsam). Aikace-aikace: rarraba maɓalli na ƙididdigewa (ƙa'idar BB84), ƙididdiga ta wayar tarho.
learnUni_physics_f5_task: Ana haska madaidaicin grating tare da layin 500/mm ta hasken λ=600 nm. Nemo kusurwoyi don m=1 da m=2 umarni diffraction. Yi ƙididdige ikon warwarewa R = mN don N = layukan 1000. Sannan zana fiber na gani tare da core n₁=1.50 da cladding n₂=1.45: nemo mahimmin kusurwa da buɗaɗɗen lamba NA = √(n₁²−n₂²).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_desc: Chemistry na jiki ya shafi kimiyyar lissafi - thermodynamics, kinetics, injiniyoyin ƙididdiga - ga tsarin sinadarai. Yana bayyana dalilin da yasa halayen ke faruwa (thermodynamics), yadda sauri suke tafiya (kinetics), da abin da ke ƙayyade tsarin kwayoyin halitta (kwayoyin sunadarai). Ita ce kashin bayan ilmin sinadarai.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp0: Gibbs makamashi kyauta: ΔG = ΔH - TΔS. ΔG <0: kwatsam; ΔG> 0: maras lokaci; ΔG = 0: daidaito. A daidaito: ΔG° = -RT ln K.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp1: Chemical Kinetics: rate = k[A]ᵐ[B]ⁿ. oda na farko: t₁/₂ = ln2/k. Daidaiton Arrhenius: k = Ae^ {-Ea/RT}. Ka'idar jihar canji: ƙimar da aka ƙaddara ta ΔG‡ (Gibbs makamashi na yanayin canji).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp2: Molecular orbital theory: atomic orbitals hade (LCAO) don samar da haɗin gwiwa (ƙananan makamashi) da antibonding (mafi girma makamashi) MOs. Odar ƙulli = ½ (abin da aka haɗa - antibonding electrons).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp3: Spectroscopy: UV-Vis (Beer-Lambert: A = εcl, sauye-sauye na lantarki), IR (girgizawar kwayoyin halitta - alamun yatsa na rukuni), NMR (yanayin da ake amfani da makaman nukiliya suna ba da haɗin kai da stereochemistry), ƙayyadaddun ƙayyadaddun (kwayoyin kwayoyin halitta da rarrabuwa).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp4: Kayayyakin haɗin gwiwa (dangane da adadin ƙwayoyin solute, ba ainihi): Matsayi mai tafasa (ΔT_b = K_b m), damuwa mai daskarewa (ΔT_f = K_f m), matsa lamba osmotic (Π = MRT). Ana amfani dashi a cikin osmometry da cryoscopy.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_task: Don amsawar N₂ + 3H₂ → 2NH₃ a 298 K, ΔH ° = -92 kJ / mol da ΔS ° = -198 J/mol·K. (a) Ƙididdige ΔG ° da K. (b) Shin abin da ya faru ba zai faru ba a 298 K? ku 600k? (c) Fassara yadda zafin jiki da matsa lamba ke shafar yawan amfanin ƙasa a cikin tsarin Haber. Yi alaƙa da ƙa'idar Le Chatelier.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_tp2: Spectroscopy da ka'idar orbital na kwayoyin halitta
learnUni_chemistry_f1_desc: Jami'ar Organic Chemistry tana nazarin hanyoyin amsawa a matakin electron, stereochemistry, tsarin haɗawa, da canje-canjen ƙungiyar aiki. Jagora yana da mahimmanci ga ilimin harhada magunguna, kimiyyar kayan aiki, nazarin halittu, da ilimin halitta.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp0: Kibiya mai lanƙwasa tsari: cikakkun kibiyoyi suna nuna motsi biyu na lantarki (nucleophile zuwa electrophile). Kibiyoyi masu rabin kai suna nuna tsattsauran ra'ayi. Dole ne kowace kibiya ta fara daga tushen lantarki (biyu ko haɗin gwiwa).
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp1: Tsarin SN2: Haɗin kai hari na baya-baya mataki ɗaya → jujjuyawar daidaitawa (juyarwar Walden). Favored: karfi nucleophile, primary substrate, polar aprotic sauran ƙarfi (DMF, DMSO, acetone).
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp2: Tsarin SN1: matakai biyu ta hanyar matsakaicin carbocation. Abubuwan da aka fi so: substrate, mai ƙarfi na polar protic (ruwa, ethanol). Rate = k[substrate] kawai. Yana ba da launin fata.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp3: Stereochemistry: cibiyoyin chiral, enantiomers, diastereomers. Dokokin Cahn-Ingold-Prelog (CIP) sun sanya tsarin R/S. Ayyukan gani da aka auna ta hanyar polarimetry. Thalidomide: R-enantiomer therapeutic, S-enantiomer teratogenic - muhimmancin stereochemical tsarki.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp4: Binciken Retrosynthetic (Corey): tsarin haɗin kai a baya - gano abubuwan da aka cire (warkar da maɓalli) don fallasa kayan farawa masu samuwa. Kare dabarun rukuni, hulɗar ƙungiyoyi masu aiki, da bin diddigin yanayin iskar shaka sune manyan ƙwarewa.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_task: Bayar da cikakken tsari tare da kibiyoyi masu lanƙwasa don: (a) SN2 amsa na (R) -2-bromobutane tare da NaOH - nuna tsarin samfurin, (b) SN1 amsa na (CH₃) ₃CBr tare da ruwa - nuna carbocation, racemisation, da duka stereoisomers na samfurin. Bayyana dalilin da yasa ma'auni ɗaya ba zai iya jurewa duka hanyoyin biyu lokaci guda ba.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_tp0: Hanyoyin amsawa da kibiyoyi masu lanƙwasa
learnUni_chemistry_f2_desc: Inorganic sunadarai ya ƙunshi haɗin gwiwar sunadarai, organometallics, m-state kayan, da bioinorganic sunadarai. Ƙarfe-ƙarfe tare da wadataccen sinadarai na d-orbital suna haifar da haɓaka masana'antu, kayan aiki, da mahimman hanyoyin nazarin halittu.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp0: Rukunin daidaitawa: Ƙarfe na tsakiya + ligands (Bassan Lewis yana ba da gudummawar nau'ikan lantarki). Tasirin Chelate: polydentate ligands (EDTA) suna samar da ƙarin barga masu ƙarfi fiye da na monodentate - fa'idar thermodynamic daga entropy.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp1: Ka'idar filin Crystal (CFT): d-orbitals sun rabu a cikin filin ligand. Rarraba Octahedral Δ_o yana raba t₂g (ƙananan) da e_g (mafi girma). Ƙarfafan filayen filayen (CN⁻, CO) → manyan Δ_o → ƙananan juzu'i. Filin rauni (F⁻, H₂O) → ƙaramin Δ_o → babban juyi.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp2: Launi da maganadisu daga CFT: sauye-sauyen d-d suna ɗaukar haske mai gani → ƙarin launi da aka lura. Maɗaukakin maɗaukaki masu ƙarfi sune paramagnetic (waɗanda ba a haɗa su da lantarki); low-spin ne diamagnetic.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp3: Organometallic sunadarai: karfe-carbon bond (karfe carbonyls M (CO) ₙ, metallocenes, Wilkinson ta kara kuzari [RhCl (PPh₃)₃] don hydrogenation). Dokar 18-electron ta annabta kwanciyar hankali na organometallic complexes.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp4: Bioinorganic sunadarai: Fe a cikin haemoglobin (reversible O₂ dauri), Fe-S gungu (canja wurin lantarki), Zn a cikin carbonic anhydrase, Mg a cikin chlorophyll (photosynthesis), Cu cikin cytochrome c oxidase (numfashi), Co a cikin Vitamin B₁₁.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_task: Zana zanen tsagawar octahedral don [Fe(CN)₆]³⁻ da [Fe(H₂O)₆]³⁺. Sanya electrons ta amfani da CFT, ƙayyade yanayin juyi da adadin electrons ɗin da ba a haɗa su ba ga kowane. Yi hasashen abin da ke ɗaukar haske mai ƙarfi da dalili. Yi ƙididdige yanayin oxidation na Fe a cikin kowane hadaddun kuma gano ligands a matsayin filin ƙarfi ko rauni ta amfani da jerin spectrochemical.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_desc: Chemistry na nazari yana ba da kayan aikin don gano abubuwa da auna ma'aunin su a cikin hadadden matrices. Dabarun nazari na zamani - HPLC, GC-MS, NMR, shayarwar atomic - suna da makawa a cikin magunguna, sa ido kan muhalli, amincin abinci, binciken bincike, da bincike na asibiti.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp0: Binciken Titrimetric: acid-base, complexometric (EDTA), redox, da hazo titration. Gano ƙarshen ƙarshen: alamomi, pH mita, conductimetry, potentiometry. Madaidaitan mafita, ƙa'idodi na farko, da na baya-titration.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp1: Chromatography: Tsayayyen lokaci yana jinkirta sassa daban-daban. GC (analytes maras tabbas, ganowar thermal), HPLC (marasa canzawa, UV / fluorescence / ganowar MS), IC (musanya ion), SFC (ruwa mai ƙarfi). Resolution R = 2(t₂-t₁)/(w₁+w₂).
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp2: Mass spectrometry: electron ionisation (EI) yana samar da cations masu tsattsauran ra'ayi waɗanda ke rarrabuwa a zahiri. Babban ƙuduri MS yana ba da ainihin dabarar kwayoyin halitta. LC-MS/MS yana ba da zaɓi don hadadden matrices na halitta.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp3: NMR spectroscopy: ¹H NMR: canjin sinadarai (δ, ppm) yana nuna yanayi, haɗawa (J, Hz) yana nuna haɗin H kusa, haɗin kai yana ba da rabon nau'ikan H. ¹³C NMR da fasaha na 2D (COSY, HMBC, NOESY) sun ƙayyade cikakken tsarin 3D.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp4: Ingantacciyar hanyar: iyaka na ganowa (LOD), iyakacin ƙididdigewa (LOQ), layi (R²), daidaito (% dawo da), daidaici (RSD%), zaɓi (babu tsangwama), ƙarfi (wanda za'a iya sakewa a cikin labs). Ana buƙata don ƙaddamar da tsari (FDA, EMA).
learnUni_chemistry_f3_task: Wani fili wanda ba a sani ba yana nuna: MW = 122 ta MS; IR: m OH shimfidawa 3200-3500, carbonyl 1680 cm⁻¹; ¹H NMR: δ 7.8 (d, 2H), 7.5 (d, 2H), 3.9 (s, 3H). Bada tsari. Tabbatar da kowane kallon kallo. Sannan bayyana yadda zaku inganta hanyar HPLC don ƙididdige wannan fili a cikin kwamfutar hannu na magunguna.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_tp1: Mass spectrometry da NMR || Tabbatar da hanyar
learnUni_chemistry_f4_name: Biochemistry yana nazarin tsarin sinadarai na rayuwa - catalysis enzyme, hanyoyin rayuwa, kwafin DNA, da siginar salula. Yana gadon ilmin sunadarai da magani: fahimtar kinetics enzyme yana ba da damar ƙirar ƙwayoyi; fahimtar metabolism yana bayyana makasudin magance ciwon sukari, ciwon daji, da kiba; Biochemistry na DNA yana tallafawa gyaran halittar CRISPR.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_desc: Enzyme Kinetics: Michaelis-Menten equation v = Vmax [S]/(Km+[S]). Km: maida hankali a cikin rabin-mafi girman gudu - yana nuna alaƙar sinadari na enzyme. Vmax: matsakaicin ƙimar a saturating substrate. Lineared by Lineweaver-Burk mãkirci (1/v vs. 1/[S]).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp0: Enzyme hanawa: gasa (mai hanawa yana ɗaure wurin aiki, yana ƙara bayyana Km, Vmax baya canzawa); marasa gasa (mai hanawa yana ɗaure wani wuri, yana rage Vmax, km ba canzawa); irreversible (covalent - aspirin acetylates COX dindindin).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp1: Metabolism: catabolism (glucose → 2 pyruvate via glycolysis, 2 ATP; Krebs sake zagayowar 2 ATP; oxidative phosphorylation ~ 32 ATP via proton gradient a fadin ciki mitochondrial membrane). Jimlar ≈36 ATP kowace glucose.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp2: DNA biochemistry: heliks biyu da aka daidaita ta hanyar haɗin tushe na Watson-Crick (A: T, G: C) da tari mai tushe (π-π hulɗar). Kwafiwar DNA Semi-Conservative: DNA polymerase yana ƙara 5'→3', yana buƙatar firamare (RNA). Kuskuren kuskure ~1 cikin 10⁹ bayan karantawa.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp3: Tsarin furotin da nadawa: na farko (jerin amino acid) → sakandare (α-helix: H-bonds i zuwa i + 4; β-sheet: layi daya ko anti-parallel strands) → babba (3D fold, hydrophobic rushewa) → quaternary (subunits da yawa). Chaperones suna taimakawa nadawa; rashin kuskure yana haifar da cututtuka (Alzheimer, Parkinson, cututtuka na prion).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp4: Enzyme yana da km = 2 mM da Vmax = 60 μmol/min. (a) Lissafi v a [S] = 1, 2, 6 mM. (b) Zana makircin Michaelis-Menten da Lineweaver-Burk don duka jihohin da ba a hana su ba da gasa (mai hanawa ya ninka kusan Km). (c) Ƙirar ƙwayoyi: ba da shawarar yadda ilimin ginshiƙan wurin aiki na enzyme zai iya jagorantar ƙira na mai hana analog-jihar canji.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_tp0: Metabolism da samar da ATP || DNA da tsarin gina jiki || Ecology & Kiyaye Halittu
learnUni_chemistry_f4_tp1: Ilimin ilimin halittu na jami'a yana aiki da ƙididdiga masu ƙididdigewa ga haɓakar yawan jama'a, hulɗar jinsin, da aikin yanayin muhalli. Ilimin halitta na kiyayewa yana amfani da ka'idar muhalli - mafi ƙarancin yawan jama'a, ƙirar ajiyar ƙasa, ilimin halittu - don kare bambancin halittu a cikin duniyar da ke fuskantar saurin canjin muhalli.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_tp2: Samfuran yawan jama'a: haɓakar logistic dN/dt = rN(1-N/K) inda r shine ainihin ƙimar haɓaka kuma K yana ɗaukar ƙarfi. Matsakaicin yawan amfanin ƙasa mai ɗorewa (MSY) da aka girbe a N = K/2 inda dN/dt ya fi girma.
learnUni_biology_f2_name: Lotka-Volterra mafarauta-mafarauta samfurin: dN/dt = rN-aNP ( ganima); dP/dt = baNP-mP (predator). Yawan jama'a suna yin oscillate a cyclically - wanda bayanan hare-lynx ya nuna. Binciken kwanciyar hankali ta hanyar eigenvalues ​​na Jacobian.
learnUni_biology_f2_desc: University ecology applies quantitative models to population dynamics, species interactions, and ecosystem function. Conservation biology uses ecological theory — minimum viable populations, reserve design, corridor ecology — to protect biodiversity in a world undergoing rapid environmental change.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp0: Population models: logistic growth dN/dt = rN(1−N/K) where r is intrinsic rate of increase and K is carrying capacity. Maximum sustainable yield (MSY) harvested at N = K/2 where dN/dt is maximum.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp1: Lotka-Volterra predator-prey model: dN/dt = rN−aNP (prey); dP/dt = baNP−mP (predator). Populations oscillate cyclically — demonstrated by hare-lynx data. Stability analysis via eigenvalues of Jacobian.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp2: Biogeography Island (MacArthur & Wilson): S_eq daga ma'auni na shige da fice (raguwa tare da S) da bacewa (ƙara tare da S). Mafi girma, tsibiran da ke kusa suna da wadatar jinsuna mafi girma → muhawarar SLOSS a ƙirar ajiya.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp3: Ka'idar Metapopulation (Levins): cibiyar sadarwar jama'ar gida ta haɗe ta hanyar tarwatsawa. Faci da aka shagaltar da juzu'i p ya samo asali: dp/dt = cp(1-p) - ep. Matsakaicin zama mai mahimmanci wanda ke ƙasa wanda ba makawa ba zai yiwu ba.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp4: Kiyaye Genomics: Kayan aikin Halittar Jama'a (FST, Ingantacciyar Girman Yawan Jama'a Ne, Inbreeding Coefficient F) suna gano bambancin yawan al'ummomi, auna kwararar kwayoyin halitta, da gano bakin ciki a cikin shirye-shiryen kiwo.
learnUni_biology_f2_task: Yawan Wolves 200 (K=1000, r=0.3/yr) ana girbe kowace shekara. (a) Yi ƙididdige ƙimar haɓakar yawan jama'a a N=200 kuma a MSY. (b) Wane girbi na shekara-shekara ya yi daidai da ƙimar girma a MSY? (c) Yawan jama'a na biyu a tsibirin makwabta yana da Ne=15 - menene haɗarin wannan ke fuskanta, kuma waɗanne ayyukan kiyayewa ne suka dace?
learnUni_biology_f2_tp2: Tarihin rayuwar tsibiri da ilimin genomics na kiyayewa
learnUni_biology_f3_name: Kwayoyin Halitta & Kwayoyin Halitta || Halittar kwayar halitta a matakin jami'a tana bincikar siginar sigina, zagayowar tantanin halitta, epigenetics, da hanyoyin ƙwayoyin cuta. Ilimin kwayoyin halitta na zamani - PCR, cloning gene, RNA-seq, CRISPR - yana ba da kayan aikin karantawa, rubutawa, da gyara kwayoyin halitta. Waɗannan fasahohin suna canza magani, aikin gona, da kimiyyar asali.
learnUni_biology_f3_desc: Tsarin sake zagayowar salula: cyclins da CDKs (kinases masu dogaro da cyclin) suna fitar da mizanin sake zagayowar salula. Masu hana CDK (p21, p27) suna aiki azaman birki. Rb tumor suppressor sequesters E2F ma'aunin rubutu har sai phosphorylated ta Cyclin D-CDK4/6.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp0: Hanyoyin watsa siginar sigina: RTK (mai karɓa tyrosine kinase) kunnawa → RAS/MAPK cascade → phosphorylation factor transcription → canjin yanayin magana. Hanyar PI3K/Akt/mTOR: girma da rayuwa. Dukansu sau da yawa suna canzawa a cikin ciwon daji.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp1: Epigenetics: Canje-canje na gado a cikin maganganun kwayoyin halitta ba tare da canjin jerin DNA ba. gyare-gyaren tarihi (acetylation - mai aiki; methylation - dogara ga mahallin), DNA methylation (CpG methylation silences genes), gyaran chromatin. Epigenetic reprogramming a embryogenesis da ciwon daji.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp2: RNA ilmin halitta: splicing (spliceosomes cire introns), madadin splicing (daya gene → mahara proteins - ~ 95% na bil'adama genes an madadin spliced), wadanda ba codeing RNA (miRNA shiru mRNA, lncRNA regulates chromatin), ribozymes.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp3: CRISPR-Cas9: jagora RNA yana jagorantar Cas9 zuwa jeri mai niyya (kusa da jerin PAM). Cas9 ya raba igiyoyi biyu. Gyara ta NHEJ (kuskure → knockout) ko HDR (samfurin → daidaitaccen gyara). Aikace-aikace: ilimin halittar jiki, aikin gona, bincike na asali, bincike.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp4: Kwayar cutar kansa tana da: (1) maye gurbi na RAS, (2) gogewar halittar Rb, (3) maye gurbin p53. Bincika sakamakon ƙwayoyin cuta na kowane maye gurbi ta hanyar zagayowar tantanin halitta da hanyoyin sigina. Gano: wane wurin bincike ya gaza ga kowane, menene sakamakon yaɗuwar tantanin halitta, da dabarun warkewa guda biyu waɗanda ke niyya ga waɗannan lahani.
learnUni_biology_f3_tp0: Canja wurin sigina da ciwon daji
learnUni_biology_f3_tp1: Epigenetics da CRISPR || Kimiyyar Neuroscience || Neuroscience bridges molecular biology, physiology, and psychology to explain how the brain generates behaviour. Daga tashoshin ion zuwa da'irori na jijiyoyi zuwa sani, yana ɗaya daga cikin mafi rikitarwa da iyakoki masu ban sha'awa a cikin ilmin halitta. Cututtukan jijiyoyi suna shafar 1 a cikin mutane 6 a duniya - fahimtar su yana buƙatar zurfin ilimin tsarin kwakwalwa da aiki.
learnUni_biology_f4_desc: Neuroscience bridges molecular biology, physiology, and psychology to explain how the brain generates behaviour. From ion channels to neural circuits to consciousness, it is one of the most complex and exciting frontiers in biology. Neurological diseases affect 1 in 6 people globally — understanding them requires deep knowledge of brain structure and function.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp0: Matsakaicin aiki: ƙaddamar da kofa yana buɗe tashoshin Na⁺ mai ƙarfin lantarki (da sauri depolarisation zuwa +40 mV) → rashin kunna tashoshi Na⁺ + buɗe tashoshin K⁺ (sakewa) → hyperpolarisation (lokacin raguwa). Duk-ko-ba komai, yana yaduwa ba tare da raguwa ba tare da axon.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp1: Synaptic watsawa: Ca²⁺ shigar da ruwa yana haifar da SNARE-matsakaici vesicle fusion → neurotransmitter release → postsynapti receptor daurin. Masu karɓa na Ionotropic (AMPA, GABA_A): saurin ion mai sauri. Metabotropic receptors (mGluR, β-adrenergic): jinkirin G-protein cascades.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp2: Plasticity Synaptic: LTP (ƙarfin ƙarfi na dogon lokaci) - Mai gano daidaituwa na mai karɓa na NMDA (yana buƙatar duka ɗaurin glutamate DA depolarisation postsynaptic) → shigar da mai karɓar AMPA → ƙara ƙarfin synaptic. Tushen kwayoyin halitta na koyo da ƙwaƙwalwa.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp3: Ƙwayoyin jijiyoyi: excitatory (glutamatergic) da inhibitory (GABAergic) neurons suna haifar da da'irori masu maimaitawa. Ma'auni na E/I: rushewa yana haifar da farfaɗo (ƙaramar tashin hankali) ko maganin sa barci (hani mai yawa). Oscillations (theta, gamma) suna ɓoye bayanai da daidaita sassan kwakwalwa.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp4: Hanyoyin cututtuka na jijiyoyi: Alzheimer's (amyloid-β plaques ya rushe watsawar synaptic; tau hyperphosphorylation destabilises microtubules → mutuwar neuronal), Parkinson's (dopaminergic neuron loss in substantia nigra; α-synuclein Lewy jikin), Huntington's (polyglutamine striaction in neurodeng protein →re protein genetting .
learnUni_biology_f4_task: Kuna yin rikodin daga neuron hippocampal. Matsakaicin haɓakawa na presynaptic neuron yana haifar da LTP. Bayyana mataki-mataki abubuwan da suka faru na ƙwayoyin cuta: Kunna mai karɓar NMDA, Siginar Ca²⁺, kunna CaMKII, AMPA phosphorylation mai karɓa da sakawa, da canje-canjen tsari na dogon lokaci. Sannan bayyana dalilin da yasa toshe masu karɓar NMDA ke hana samuwar LTP.
learnUni_biology_f4_tp1: Synaptic filastik da LTP || Matsalolin jijiya da cututtukan jijiya
learnUni_biology_f5_name: Immunology shine nazarin hanyoyin kariya na jiki. Tsarin garkuwar jiki yana nuna wariya daga wanda ba kai ba, yana lalata ƙwayoyin cuta da ƙwayoyin cutar kansa, kuma yana haifar da ƙwaƙwalwar rigakafi. Dysregulation yana haifar da cututtuka na autoimmune, rashin lafiyar jiki, da rashin ƙarfi. Magungunan rigakafi na zamani - masu hana wuraren bincike, ƙwayoyin CAR-T, rigakafin mRNA - suna canza magani.
learnUni_biology_f5_desc: Innate rigakafi: masu karɓar ƙirar ƙira (PRRs, misali masu karɓa-kamar masu karɓa) suna gano alamu masu alaƙa da ƙwayoyin cuta (PAMPs). Kunna NF-κB → cytokines mai kumburi (IL-6, TNF-α, IL-1β). Haɓaka cascade opsonises da lyses pathogens.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp0: Kwayoyin rigakafi masu dacewa: Kwayoyin gabatar da antigen (kwayoyin dendritic, macrophages) suna aiwatar da antigens da kuma gabatar da peptides akan MHC I (zuwa CD8⁺ cytotoxic T Kwayoyin) ko MHC II (zuwa CD4⁺ mataimaki T Kwayoyin). Zaɓin clonal da faɗaɗa takamaiman ƙwayoyin lymphocytes na antigen.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp1: Kunna ƙwayoyin B da ƙwayoyin rigakafi: T-dogara kunnawa yana buƙatar sel T masu taimako (mu'amala CD40L-CD40 + cytokines). Halin cibiyar Germinal: hypermutation somatic + kusanci maturation + canza aji (IgM → IgG, IgA, IgE). Kwayoyin ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya B suna dawwama shekaru da yawa.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp2: Haƙuri na rigakafi da kai-kai: Haƙuri na tsakiya - sel T autoreactive da aka goge a cikin thymus (zaɓi mara kyau). Haƙuri na gefe - Kwayoyin T masu daidaitawa (Tregs) suna kashe ƙwayoyin autoreactive. Rashin gazawa: tsarin lupus erythematosus, rheumatoid arthritis, nau'in ciwon sukari na 1.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp3: Ciwon daji na rigakafi: PD-1/PD-L1 masu hana masu hana ƙwayar cuta sun toshe ƙaurawar ƙwayar cuta → T cell reactivation (pembrolizumab, nivolumab - Nobel Prize 2018). CAR-T cell far: Injiniyan T Kwayoyin haƙuri tare da chimeric antigen receptor mai niyya antigen tumor - martani mai ban mamaki a cikin cutar sankarar cell B.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp4: Majiyyaci yana gabatar da cututtukan ƙwayoyin cuta masu maimaitawa da ƙananan matakan immunoglobulin. Jini na gefe yana nuna ƙwayoyin B ba su nan amma ƙwayoyin T na al'ada. Gano raunin rigakafi (X-linked agammaglobulinemia - maye gurbin BTK). Bayyana tushen kwayoyin: yadda BTK ke yawan yin sigina yayin haɓakar ƙwayoyin B, abin da ke faruwa ba daidai ba, da kuma yadda aikin jiyya na immunoglobulin (IVIG) ke aiki.
learnUni_biology_f5_task: Ƙunƙarar rigakafi da sanin ƙirar ƙira
learnUni_biology_f5_tp0: Kwayoyin rigakafi masu daidaitawa da ƙwayoyin B || Haƙuri, autoimmunity, da ciwon daji immunotherapy
learnUni_computer_science_f2_desc: Algorithms da tsarin bayanai sune tushen ka'idar kimiyyar kwamfuta. Tsarin bayanan da ya dace yana sa algorithm mai inganci; wanda ba daidai ba ya sa ya zama mara amfani. Binciken Big-O, algorithms jadawali, da shirye-shirye masu ƙarfi sune kayan aikin yau da kullun kowane injiniyan software dole ne ya kware.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp0: Big-O: O (1) akai-akai, O (log n) bincike na binary, O(n) duban layi, O(n log n) nau'in hade, O(n²) nau'in kumfa, O (2ⁿ) ma'auni. Ω (mafi kyawun shari'ar), Θ (daure mai tsayi). Amortized bincike don tsauri tsararru.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp1: Tsarin mahimmanci: tsararru (O (1) damar), jeri mai alaƙa (O (1) saka kai), tebur hash (matsakaicin O (1) duk ops), BST (O (log n) daidaitacce), tsiri (O (log n) saka/ cirewa), gwada (ayyukan prefix kirtani).
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp2: Algorithms Graph: BFS (mafi guntun hanya mara nauyi, O (V + E)), DFS (ganowar sake zagayowar, nau'in topological), Dijkstra (mafi girman hanya mai nauyi, O ((V + E) log V)), Bellman-Ford (ma'aunin nauyi, O (VE)), Floyd-Warshall (duk nau'i-nau'i, O (V³)).
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp3: Tsare-tsare mai ƙarfi: mafi kyawun tsarin ƙasa + matsalolin da ke tattare da juna. Memoisation (sama-kasa) vs. tabulation (kasa-sama). Matsalolin gargajiya: 0/1 Knapsack, LCS, Gyara Nisa, Matsalolin Sarkar Matrix, Canjin Tsabar kudi.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp4: NP-cikawar: P (wanda za'a iya warwarewa-lokacin polynomial), NP (mai tabbatarwa lokaci-polynomial). Matsalolin NP-cikakke (SAT, TSP, Clique) - ba a san algorithm na polynomial ba. Ka'idar Cook-Levin: SAT ya cika NP. Ragewa yana tabbatar da NP-taurin.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_task: Aiwatar da Algorithm Dijkstra (pseudocode tare da layin fifiko) akan jadawali mai lamba 6. Guda shi mataki-mataki, yana nuna tebur mai nisa da yanayin layin fifiko a kowane juzu'i. Tabbatar da wahalar lokaci O((V+E)log V). Sannan bayyana: idan jadawali yana da gefuna mara kyau, me yasa Dijkstra ya kasa, kuma ta yaya Bellman-Ford yake kula da su?
learnUni_computer_science_f2_tp1: Algorithms na Graph || Tsare-tsare mai ƙarfi da cikawar NP
learnUni_computer_science_f3_name: Tsarukan aiki sune Layer software tsakanin hardware da aikace-aikace - sarrafa matakai, ƙwaƙwalwa, ajiya, da tsaro. Fahimtar abubuwan ciki na OS yana ba ku damar rubuta ingantaccen, lambar lokaci ɗaya, fahimtar aikin tsarin, da ƙira amintattun tsarin rarrabawa.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_desc: Tsari vs. zaren: tsari yana da nasa adireshin sarari da albarkatun; zaren suna raba sararin adireshin tsari. Canjin yanayi: OS yana adanawa/mayar da jihar CPU (masu rijista, PC, ma'anar tari). Tsara Tsara: FCFS, SJF, Round Robin, fifiko, Multilevel Queue.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp0: Hatsari na daidaitawa: yanayin tsere, kulle-kulle (Sharuɗɗan Coffman: ware juna, riƙe-da-jira, babu riga-kafi, jira madauwari), yunwa, kullewa. Aiki tare: mutex, semaphore, duba (masu canjin yanayi), makullai-rubutu.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp1: Gudanar da ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya: paging - raba sararin adireshi na kama-da-wane zuwa ƙayyadaddun shafukan da aka tsara zuwa firam na zahiri ta hanyar tebur shafi. TLB yana adana fassarorin kwanan nan. Algorithms na maye gurbin shafi: FIFO, LRU, Agogo (zama ta biyu). Rarraba lokacin aiki saiti> RAM.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp2: Tsarin fayil: Layer VFS (Tsarin Fayil na Farko) don ɗaukar hoto. Inodes: metadata fayil + maki toshe bayanai. Yin jarida (ext4, NTFS) don daidaiton haɗari. Bishiyoyin B da aka yi amfani da su a cikin HFS+, NTFS don firikwensin directory. Matakan RAID 0,1,5,6 - yin aiki da sake-sayen cinikin.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp3: Tsarin tsaro: Kariyar zobe (yanayin mai amfani vs. kernel yanayin, syscalls a matsayin iyaka mai sarrafawa), ikon tushen damar iko, ikon amfani da tilas (SELinux/AppArmor), hypervisors (nau'in 1 bare karfe: VMware ESXi, Xen; nau'in 2 da aka shirya: VirtualBox). Kwantena (Docker) suna amfani da ƙungiyoyi da wuraren suna - ba VMs na gaskiya ba.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp4: Hanyoyi uku suna raba albarkatun R1 da R2. P1: yana riƙe da R1, yana buƙatar R2. P2: yana riƙe da R2, yana buƙatar R1. P3: yana buqatar duka biyun. (a) Zana jadawali rabon albarkatun kuma gano makullin. (b) Nuna yanayin lafiya ta amfani da Algorithm na Banki: Max=[R1:2,R2:1], [R1:1,R2:2], [R1:2,R2:2]; Akwai=[R1:1,R2:1]. Nemo amintaccen jerin kisa. (c) Ba da shawarar yarjejeniya don hana wannan ƙulli.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_tp1: Gudanar da ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya da ƙwaƙwalwar ajiyar ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya || Tsarin fayil da tsaro na OS
learnUni_computer_science_f4_name: Injiniyan software yana amfani da tsare-tsare hanyoyin don gina abin dogaro, mai kiyayewa, mai iya daidaita software. Ayyukan zamani - Agile, DevOps, microservices, CI/CD - sun canza yadda ake isar da software. Mahimman dabarun injiniya - buƙatu, gine-gine, gwaji, da tsaro - suna da mahimmanci ba tare da la'akari da hanya ba.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_desc: Agile (Scrum, XP, Kanban): gyare-gyaren sati 2 na maimaitawa, tsayuwar yau da kullun, juzu'i na sprint, gyaran baya. DevOps: haɓakawa da ayyukan haɗin gwiwa; Bututun CI/CD (GitLab CI, Jenkins, GitHub Actions) ginawa, gwadawa, turawa akan kowane alƙawari.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp0: Tsarin gine-gine na software: lebur (UI → dabaru na kasuwanci → samun damar bayanai), microservices (ayyukan turawa masu zaman kansu tare da nasu bayanan bayanai, sadarwa ta hanyar REST/gRPC/saƙon), abubuwan da aka kora (sabis ɗin suna amsa abubuwan da suka faru - Kafka, RabbitMQ), CQRS + Event Sourcing.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp1: Tsarin ƙira (GoF): Ƙirƙirar (Singleton, Factory, Mai Ginewa, Samfura), Tsarin ( Adafta, Mai Ado, Facade, Wakili), Halayyar (Mai lura, Dabarun, Umurni, Hanyar Samfura, Iterator). Sanin lokacin da za a nema - kar a wuce gona da iri.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp2: Dabarun gwaji: naúrar (sauri, ware - abin dogara), haɗaka (yawan abubuwan haɗin gwiwa), kwangila (daidaituwar API), tsarin (ƙarshen zuwa-ƙarshen), karɓa (tabbacin labarin mai amfani). TDD: ja-kore-refactor. Gwajin maye gurbi yana tabbatar da ingancin gwaji.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp3: Tsaro a cikin injiniyan software (OWASP Top 10): allura (SQL, umarni), karɓaɓɓen tabbaci, XSS, nassoshin abu kai tsaye mara tsaro, kuskuren tsaro. Samfuran Barazana (STRIDE), amintaccen bitar lambar, duban raunin dogaro (Snyk, Dependabot).
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp4: Zana aikace-aikacen raba keke: (a) Rubuta labarun masu amfani guda 5 tare da sharuɗɗan karɓa. (b) Zana zane-zanen gine-ginen C4 (yanayin, ganga, matakan sassa). (c) Gano ƙirar ƙira guda 3 da aka yi amfani da su kuma ku gaskata. (d) Rubuta gwaje-gwajen naúrar (pseudocode) don aikin 'ƙididdige fare' wanda ke rufewa: farashin farashi, farashin farashi, ƙaramar kuɗin fasinja, da shari'o'in gefen (nisa sifili, abubuwan shigar mara kyau). (e) Gano haɗarin tsaro 3 na OWASP da raguwa.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_task: Agile, DevOps, da CI/CD || Tsarin gine-gine da ƙirar ƙira
learnUni_computer_science_f4_tp1: Koyon Injin & AI || Koyon inji (ML) yana ba da damar tsarin koyo daga bayanai. Zurfafa ilmantarwa - hanyoyin sadarwa na jijiyoyi tare da yadudduka da yawa - sun haifar da ci gaba a hangen nesa, harshe, da wasanni. Fahimtar ka'idar ML (banbancin-banbancin, girman VC, daidaitawa) da aiki (PyTorch, daidaitawar hyperparameter, turawa) yanzu babban ƙwarewa ne a kimiyyar kwamfuta.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_tp2: Koyon kulawa: rage girman hasara L(θ) akan bayanan horo ta hanyar zuriyar gradient θ ← θ - α∇L. Stochastic gradient zuriyar (SGD), Adam optimiser. Daidaitawa: L2 (lalacewar nauyi, raguwar ma'auni), L1 (sparsity), dropout (da bazuwar sifili neurons yayin horo).
learnUni_computer_science_f5_name: Gine-gine na cibiyar sadarwa na jijiyoyi: cikakkiyar haɗi (mai yawa), juzu'i (CNN - raba nauyi, bambancin fassarar - manufa don hotuna), maimaita (RNN, LSTM, GRU - bayanan jeri), tsarin kulawa (Transformer - hankalin kai, O (n²) hadaddun, amma daidaitacce).
learnUni_computer_science_f5_desc: Bambance-bambancen ciniki-kashe: kuskuren horo ≈ son zuciya²; kuskuren gwaji - kuskuren horo ≈ bambance-bambance. Ƙarƙashin dacewa: babban son rai (samfurin ma mai sauƙi). Over-fitting: babban bambanci (samfurin yana tunawa da bayanan horo). Tsarin tsari, ƙarin bayanai, da samfura masu sauƙi suna magance wuce gona da iri.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp0: Ƙimar da ta wuce daidaito: don azuzuwan da ba su da daidaituwa - daidaito (TP/TP+FP), tuno (TP/TP+FN), F1 = 2PR/(P + R), AUC-ROC (yankin da ke ƙarƙashin yanayin yanayin aiki mai karɓa). Ƙimar giciye-ninka yana ba da ƙaƙƙarfan ƙima.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp1: Samfuran tushe da alhakin AI: manyan nau'ikan yare (GPT, BERT) an riga an horar da su akan ɗimbin bayanai, daidaitacce don takamaiman ayyuka. Hallucination, son zuciya, da rashin amfani da su babban haɗari ne. Dokar EU AI (2024) tana rarraba tsarin AI ta hanyar haɗari kuma tana sanya buƙatu don aikace-aikacen haɗari mai girma.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp2: Bias-variance trade-off: training error ≈ bias²; test error − training error ≈ variance. Under-fitting: high bias (model too simple). Over-fitting: high variance (model memorises training data). Regularisation, more data, and simpler models address over-fitting.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp3: Evaluation beyond accuracy: for imbalanced classes — precision (TP/TP+FP), recall (TP/TP+FN), F1 = 2PR/(P+R), AUC-ROC (area under receiver operating characteristic curve). k-fold cross-validation gives robust generalisation estimate.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp4: Foundation models and responsible AI: large language models (GPT, BERT) pre-trained on vast data, fine-tuned for specific tasks. Hallucinations, bias, and misuse are serious risks. EU AI Act (2024) classifies AI systems by risk and imposes requirements for high-risk applications.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_task: Kuna gina rabe-raben ra'ayi (tabbatacce / mara kyau). Daidaiton horo: 97%; ingancin inganci: 68%. (a) Gano matsalar. (b) Jerin dabaru 4 don gyara shi. (c) Saitin bayanan ku yana da inganci 90% - ƙididdige daidaito, daidaito, tunawa, da F1 idan kun rarraba komai a matsayin tabbatacce. Me yasa F1 shine mafi kyawun awo? D
learnUni_computer_science_f5_tp0: Koyarwar hanyar sadarwar jijiyoyi da haɓakawa
learnUni_economics_f1_desc: Microeconomics yana nazarin yanke shawara ta gidaje, kamfanoni, da kasuwanni. Ka'idar mabukaci da tabbataccen tsari, tsarin kasuwa daga cikakkiyar gasa zuwa gasa, abubuwan waje, da ka'idar wasa suna ba da ainihin kayan aikin nazari don fahimtar farashin, sakamakon kasuwa, da tasirin jin daɗin manufofin.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp0: Ka'idar mabukaci: haɓaka amfanin amfani dangane da ƙarancin kasafin kuɗi. A mafi kyawu: MU_x/P_x = MU_y/P_y (madaidaicin mai amfani a kowace laban). Ƙunƙarar sha'awa + layin kasafin kuɗi → yanayin yanayin tangency MRS = rabon farashi.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp1: Ka'idar mai ƙarfi: haɓaka riba inda MR = MC. Cikakken gasa: P = MR = MC a cikin ma'auni mai tsayi, ribar tattalin arziki sifili. Gudun gajere: rufewa idan P <min(AVC).
learnUni_economics_f1_kp2: Tsarin kasuwa: keɓantacce (MR <P, asarar nauyi = asarar jin daɗi, keɓantacce na halitta wanda aka tsara ta hanyar farashin farashi ko ƙari); oligopoly (Cournot - gasar yawan yawa, Bertrand - gasar farashin → farashin farashi na gefe).
learnUni_economics_f1_kp3: Abubuwan waje da kayan jama'a: waje mara kyau → wuce gona da iri (harajin Pigouvian = MEC ya gyara). Kyakkyawan waje → rashin samarwa (gyaran tallafin). Kayayyakin jama'a: wanda ba'a keɓancewa + mara kishiya → Matsalar mahayi kyauta → ƙasa da kasuwa.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp4: Ka'idar wasa: Nash ma'auni (babu karkatacciyar riba guda ɗaya). Matsalolin fursunoni: babban dabarar tana haifar da sakamako mara kyau na Pareto. Wasannin maimaitawa: haɗin gwiwa mai dorewa ta hanyar dabarun jawo idan ragi ya isa sosai. Ka'idar gwanjo: farashi na farko (bayar da ƙimar ƙasa), farashi na biyu/Vickrey (mafi rinjayen dabarun bayar da ƙimar gaskiya).
learnUni_economics_f1_task: Kamfanonin jiragen sama biyu suna fafatawa akan hanya. Kowannensu na iya saita Maɗaukaki ko Ƙananan farashi. Matrix Payoff (ribar £m): {H,H}=(10,10), {H,L}=(2,15), {L,H}=(15,2), {L,L}=(5,5). (a) Nemo ma'aunin Nash. (b) Shin Pareto ya fi kyau? (c) Idan an maimaita wasan har abada, yaushe ne za a iya dorewar haɗin gwiwa (samuwar yanayin rangwame δ)? (d) Yaya dokar gasar ke kallon daidaita farashin jiragen sama?
learnUni_economics_f2_desc: Econometrics yana ba da kayan aikin ƙididdiga don gwada ka'idodin tattalin arziki da ƙididdige alaƙar alaƙa daga bayanan lura. Ƙaddamarwar OLS, masu canji na kayan aiki, da hanyoyin bayanan panel sune masu aiki. Juyin juyi na gaskiya na zamani yana jaddada ƙwaƙƙwaran gano illolin da ke haifarwa ta amfani da gwaje-gwajen yanayi.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp0: OLS: rage girman Σεᵢ² don kimanta β̂ = (X'X)⁻¹X'y. Gauss-Markov: OLS BLUE ne a ƙarƙashin babu endogeneity, ɗan luwaɗi, babu cikakken multicollinearity. Rashin son zuciya: E[β̂] = β. Daidaitawa: β̂ →_p β as n → ∞.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp1: Ƙarshen Ƙarshe: E[ε|X] ≠ 0 saboda ƙetare m son rai, juyar da dalili, ko kuskuren auna → OLS son zuciya da rashin daidaituwa. Maganin IV: nemo kayan aikin Z da ke da alaƙa da X (dacewar: Cov(Z,X) ≠ 0) amma ba tare da ε (banda: Cov(Z,ε) = 0).
learnUni_economics_f2_kp2: Bayanan panel: Yᵢₜ = α + βXᵢₜ + μᵢ + εᵢₜ. Kafaffen sakamako (a cikin mai ƙididdigewa): yana kawar da ɓangarorin lokaci ba tare da lura da yanayin μ. Tasirin bazuwar: mafi inganci idan μᵢ ba shi da alaƙa da X (gwaji: Hausman). Bambanci na farko: Δyᵢₜ = βΔxᵢₜ + Δεᵢₜ.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp3: Bambanci-in-bambance-bambance (DiD): kwatanta jiyya da ƙungiyoyin kulawa kafin / bayan canjin manufofin. β_DiD = (Ȳ_{maganin, post} - Ȳ_{maganin, pre}) - (Ȳ_{control, post} - Ȳ_{control, pre}). Mahimmin zato: dabi'u masu kama da juna (babu jiyya, da ƙungiyoyin biyu sun samo asali iri ɗaya).
learnUni_economics_f2_kp4: Kashewar koma baya (RD): Ana ba da magani bisa ko mai canzawa mai gudana ya ketare kofa. Yana kwatanta sakamako sama da ƙasa da yanke - bazuwar gida. Sharp RD: duk sun haye bakin kofa. Fuzzy RD: kawai wasu - amfani da azaman kayan aiki.
learnUni_economics_f2_task: Kuna son kimanta tasirin ilimin jami'a akan samun kuɗi. OLS yana ba da β̂ = 0.08 (8% ƙimar albashi a kowace shekara na ilimi). (a) Me yasa OLS mai yiwuwa ba ta da son zuciya? (b) Ba da shawarar kayan aiki - bayyana dalilin da yasa ya gamsu da dacewa da ƙuntatawa. (c) Bayyana dabarun DiD ta amfani da gwaji na halitta (misali canjin kuɗin koyarwa) tare da zato daidai gwargwado. (d) Fassara tsarin dakatar da koma baya a kusa da iyakar cancantar tallafin karatu.
learnUni_economics_f3_desc: Tattalin Arziki na ɗabi'a yana haɗar fahimtar tunani cikin nazarin tattalin arziki. Mutane ba su da cikakkiyar ma'ana - sun kasance masu hasara, masu halin yanzu, suna tasiri ta hanyar tsarawa da ƙa'idodin zamantakewa. Waɗannan ɓangarorin ana iya tsinkaya da tsari, suna ba da damar ƙirƙira ingantacciyar manufa ta hanyar nudges da zaɓin gine-gine.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp0: Ka'idar Prospect (Kahneman & Tversky, 1979): mutane suna kimanta sakamako dangane da batun tunani. Ayyukan ƙima: concave don riba (ƙiyayyar haɗari), convex don asara (neman haɗari), mafi girman asara fiye da riba (λ ≈ 2 - asarar ƙiyayya).
learnUni_economics_f3_kp1: Yin nauyi mai yuwuwa: mutane masu kiba ƙananan yuwuwar (yana bayyana irin caca da inshora) da ƙananan ƙima mai girma. Tarin ka'idar hangen nesa tana sarrafa abubuwan caca.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp2: Ƙimar halin yanzu: rangwamen quasi-hyperbolic U = u₀ + βΣδᵗuₜ tare da β <1. Yana haifar da rashin daidaituwa na lokaci - tsare-tsaren da aka yi yanzu ba za a bi ba. Yayi bayanin yawan cin abinci, rashin ceto, jinkirtawa. Sophisticates sun san cewa suna son zuciya; butulci ba - daban-daban manufofin manufofin.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp3: Ka'idar Nudge (Thaler & Sunstein, 2008): tsarin gine-ginen zaɓi yana tsara yanke shawara ba tare da hana 'yanci ba. Dokokin da aka saba (yi rajista kai tsaye na fansho), saƙonnin al'ada na zamantakewa ('mafi yawan gidaje suna biya akan lokaci'), da sauƙaƙawa suna rage shinge ga kyawawan halaye.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp4: Gwajin tattalin arziki da RCTs: gwajin gwajin gwaji a cikin saitunan sarrafawa. Gwaje-gwajen filin (RCTs) gwajin shiga tsakani a ma'auni. Randomistas (Banerjee, Duflo - Nobel 2019) ya kawo sauyi ga tattalin arziƙin ci gaba ta hanyar gwada takamaiman saɓani.
learnUni_economics_f3_task: Samfuran mutum mai son zuciya (β=0.7, δ=0.95) yana yanke shawarar yin motsa jiki a yau (farashin c=5 kayan aiki) don fa'ida ta gaba (B=10 abubuwan amfani da aka samu mako mai zuwa). (a) Shin mutum yana shirin motsa jiki a ranar Lahadi? (b) Sa’ad da Litinin ta zo, suna motsa jiki da gaske? (c) Bayyana rashin daidaiton lokaci. (d) Zana na'urar sadaukarwa don taimaka musu, da kwatanta ta da hukuncin hukuncin kuɗi.
learnUni_economics_f3_tp0: Ka'idar hangen nesa da ƙin asara
learnUni_economics_f3_tp1: Son zuciya na yanzu da rashin daidaituwar lokaci
learnUni_economics_f3_tp2: Nudge theory da gwaji tattalin arziki
learnUni_economics_f4_desc: Harkokin tattalin arziki na ci gaba yana nazarin abubuwan da ke haifar da talauci da manufofin da ke inganta wadata. Tattalin arzikin ci gaban zamani ya tashi daga manyan ka'idoji zuwa ga ƙwaƙƙwaran shaida mai ƙarfi akan takamaiman saɓani - ta amfani da RCTs, gwaje-gwajen yanayi, da manyan bayanai. Filin ya haɗa da haɓaka, cibiyoyi, lafiya, ilimi, da rashin daidaito.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp0: Samfurin girma maras nauyi: Y = AK^α L^{1−α}. Tsayayyen yanayi: zuba jari = raguwa; Adadin ajiyar kuɗi da haɓakar jama'a sun ƙayyade rabon K/L. Ragewar dawowa → haduwar yanayi. Residual A ( jimlar yawan yawan aiki) yana haifar da ci gaba mai tsayi - amma yana da fice a cikin Solow.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp1: Ƙarshen haɓaka (Romer 1990): ilimin K̃ yana shiga samarwa ba tare da raguwa ba. Sashin R&D yana samar da sabbin dabaru. Ilmin zubewar ilimi (wanda ba kishiya ba, wani bangare ba a cire shi) → rashin samar da sabbin abubuwa ba tare da kariya ta IP ko tallafin R&D ba.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp2: Cibiyoyi da haɓaka (Acemoglu & Robinson): cibiyoyi masu haɗaka (haƙƙin mallaka, tsarin doka, kasuwanni masu gasa) suna haɓaka haɓaka. Cibiyoyi masu ban sha'awa (gadon mulkin mallaka - mace-macen mazaunan da suka tsara cibiyoyin mulkin mallaka) suna kama kasashe cikin talauci. Tarihi al'amura - dagewa.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp3: RCTs a cikin haɓakawa: Duflo & Banerjee (Abdul Latif Jameel Poverty Action Lab, J-PAL) suna amfani da RCTs don kimanta ƙayyadaddun ayyukan aiki - deworming, microcredit, canja wurin kuɗi na sharadi, nudges taki. Sakamakon sau da yawa abin mamaki - ka'idar ba tare da yaudarar bayanai ba.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp4: Tarkon talauci da CCTs: tarkon talauci yana tasowa ne daga ƙayyadaddun farashi na saka hannun jari (ilimi, lafiya, takin zamani) waɗanda gidaje masu karamin karfi ba za su iya iyawa ba, yana hana samun albarkatu. Canje-canjen tsabar kuɗi (Mexico's Oportunidades, Bolsa Família na Brazil) yana ba da sharadi na samun kudin shiga akan halartar makaranta da kiwon lafiya - karya tarkon tare da auna tasirin dogon lokaci.
learnUni_economics_f4_task: Kwatanta Koriya ta Kudu da Najeriya: dukkansu suna da matakan samun kudin shiga iri ɗaya (~$300 GDP/capita) a 1960. A 2023 Koriya ta Kudu tana da ~ $33,000, Najeriya ~ $2,100. Amfani da (a) Samfurin Solow - menene tanadi da bambance-bambancen babban ɗan adam ke bayyana rarrabuwa? (b) Samfurin Romer - ta yaya ƙarfin ƙirƙira ke da mahimmanci? (c) Acemoglu & Robinson - kwatanta tarihin mulkin mallaka da hanyoyin cibiyoyi. Ƙarshe da shawarwari guda ɗaya na tushen shaida ga Najeriya, yana ambaton RCT mai dacewa.
learnUni_economics_f4_tp0: Samfurin ci gaba na ƙasa da ƙasa
learnUni_economics_f4_tp1: Cibiyoyi da cigaba || RCTs, CCTs, da tarkon talauci
