learnUni_economics_f4_tp2: Tsarin Mulki & Dokokin Jama'a || Dokar tsarin mulki ta bayyana dangantakar dake tsakanin kasa da mutane, da kuma tsakanin sassan gwamnati. Dokar jama'a ita ce ke tafiyar da ikon gwamnati. Fahimtar ka'idodin tsarin mulki - raba iko, bin doka, haƙƙin asali - shine tushen duk nazarin shari'a da zama ɗan ƙasa na dimokuradiyya.
learnUni_law_f0_name: Kundin tsarin mulki: ana iya daidaita shi (Amurka, Jamus, Faransa - takarda guda ɗaya da aka rubuta) ko ba a ƙididdige su ba (Birtaniya - dokar ƙa'ida, dokar gama-gari, da tarurruka). Matsayi na ƙa'idodi: ƙa'idodin tsarin mulki sun yi galaba akan dokokin yau da kullun.
learnUni_law_f0_desc: Rarraba iko (Montesquieu): majalisa (Majalisa/Majalisa), zartarwa (gwamnati/shugaban kasa), shari'a (kotu). Dubawa da ma'auni suna hana tattara ƙarfi. Bita na Shari'a: Kotuna na iya soke dokokin da ba su dace da tsarin mulki ba.
learnUni_law_f0_kp0: Doka (Dicey): babu wanda ya fi karfin doka; hukunci kawai don keta madaidaicin doka; daidai damar zuwa kotuna. A aikace: 'yancin kai na bangaren shari'a, haramcin tsarewa ba bisa ka'ida ba (habeas corpus), daidaiton aikin gwamnati.
learnUni_law_f0_kp1: Hakkoki na asali: Yarjejeniya ta Turai kan Haƙƙin Dan Adam (Matsaloli 2-14: Haƙƙin rayuwa, haramta azabtarwa, shari'a ta gaskiya, keɓewa, 'yancin faɗar albarkacin baki, haramta wariya). Horizontal vs. aikace-aikacen haƙƙin tsaye.
learnUni_law_f0_kp2: Tsarin tsarin mulki na EU: fifiko na dokar EU (Costa v. ENEL, 1964), tasirin kai tsaye (Van Gend en Loos, 1963), ka'idar daidaituwa, haɗin gwiwa. Bayan-Brexit: Burtaniya ba ta ƙarƙashin dokar EU.
learnUni_law_f0_kp3: Yi nazarin matsayin tsarin mulki na tsarin shari'a mai zaman kansa a cikin dimokuradiyya. Yin amfani da misalai daga tsarin shari'a daban-daban guda uku (Birtaniya, Amurka, Jamus), kwatanta: yadda ake kare yancin kai na shari'a, iyakokin nazarin shari'a, da kuma shari'a ɗaya inda kotuna suka yanke ko iyakance aikin zartarwa. Auna ko nazarin shari'a ya dace da halaccin dimokuradiyya.
learnUni_law_f1_desc: Dokar kwangila tana gudanar da yarjejeniyoyin da suka dace da doka. Yana ƙayyade lokacin da aka kulla kwangila, abin da ya wajaba a yi, abin da zai faru idan ba a cika wajibai ba (raguwa), da kuma hanyoyin da za a iya samu. Dokar kwangilar tana ƙulla kasuwanci, aiki, da yawancin alaƙar doka tsakanin ƙungiyoyi masu zaman kansu.
learnUni_law_f1_kp0: Abubuwan da ke cikin kwangila mai inganci: tayin (tabbatacciyar shawara da za a ɗaure a kan yarda), yarda (ba tare da wata shakka ba, daidai da tayin - mulkin 'mirror image'), la'akari (wani abu na darajar musayar - la'akari da baya ba la'akari ba), niyya don ƙirƙirar dangantakar doka.
learnUni_law_f1_kp1: Sharuɗɗan kwangila: ƙayyadaddun sharuɗɗan (an bayyana a sarari), sharuɗɗan da aka bayyana (wanda ke nufin doka - Dokar Tallace kayayyaki; ko ta kotu - gwajin ingancin kasuwanci). Sharuɗɗa (ƙetare yana ba da damar ƙarewa + lalacewa), garanti (keɓan yana ba da damar lalacewa kawai), sharuɗɗan da ba su da tushe (maganin ya dogara da sakamakon keta).
learnUni_law_f1_kp2: Abubuwan da ke haifar da lalacewa: kuskure (bayanin karya na gaskiya yana haifar da kwangila → rescission + lalacewa), tursasawa (matsi mara izini → maras amfani), tasiri mara kyau (fa'idar rashin adalci da aka ɗauka → maras kyau), kuskure (kuskuren haɗin kai / haɗin kai → maras kyau ko maras amfani).
learnUni_law_f1_kp3: Karya da magunguna: cin zarafi (ƙi yin aiki kafin aiwatarwa → ƙungiya mara laifi na iya karɓa da kai ƙara nan take). Magunguna: lalacewa (na farko - yana sanya ƙungiya marar laifi a matsayi kamar an yi kwangilar kwangila), ƙayyadaddun aiki (daidaitacce - tilasta yin aiki, bayar da shi a inda bai isa ba), umarni, ƙididdiga meruit.
learnUni_law_f1_kp4: Sharuɗɗan keɓancewa: dole ne a haɗa su (sanarwa, sa hannu, ko hanyar mu'amala); fassara sosai (contra proferentem - shubuha ga jam'iyyar da ke dogara da magana); dangane da UCTA 1977 da CRA 2015 (sharuɗɗa marasa ma'ana waɗanda ba za a iya aiwatar da su ba a cikin kwangilar mabukaci).
learnUni_law_f1_task: Wani magini ya faɗi £50,000 don gyara gida. Mai gida ya karba. Yayin aiki, magini ya gano matsalolin tsarin da ba a zata ba kuma yana buƙatar ƙarin £ 70,000. Mai gida ya sanya hannu kan sabuwar yarjejeniya a karkashin matsin lamba. Bayan kammalawa, mai gida ya ƙi biyan ƙarin £20,000. Shawara: (a) shin ainihin kwangilar tana aiki? (b) Shin ana aiwatar da bambance-bambancen? (c) Waɗanne magunguna ne maginin yake da shi? (d) Wane tsaro ne mai gida zai iya ɗauka?
learnUni_law_f1_tp1: Sharuɗɗa da abubuwan da suka dace || Karya da magunguna
learnUni_law_f1_tp2: Dokar Laifuka || Dokar laifuka ta bayyana halin da gwamnati ta haramta kuma ta tanadi hukunta masu laifi. Yana kare daidaikun mutane da al'umma daga cutarwa, yana hana aikata ba daidai ba, yana bayyana la'antar ɗabi'a tare. Fahimtar dokar aikata laifuka na buƙatar ƙware na actus reus, mens rea, kariya, da ƙa'idodin alhakin aikata laifuka.
learnUni_law_f2_name: Abubuwan da ake aikata laifuka: actus reus (aikin da ya aikata laifin - ya haɗa da aikin son rai, tsallakewa inda aikin ya kasance, sakamako, yanayi) da mazaje (tunanin laifi - niyya, rashin hankali, ko sakaci). Ƙa'idar daidaituwa: AR da MR dole ne su zo daidai cikin lokaci.
learnUni_law_f2_desc: Matakan maza suna rea: niyya kai tsaye (manufa ita ce samar da sakamako), niyya ta zahiri (sakamakon wani sakamako mai kama da haka - R v Woolin), rashin taurin kai (Cunningham - ɗaukar haɗari mai hankali), sakaci na haƙiƙa (babban karkata daga ma'aunin mutum mai ma'ana).
learnUni_law_f2_kp0: Kisa: kisan kai (kisan ba bisa ka'ida ba + niyyar kashewa ko haifar da GBH - hukuncin rai na tilas); kisan kai na son rai (raguwar kisa ta hanyar asarar sarrafawa ko raguwar alhaki); kisan kai ba da gangan ba (aikin da ba bisa ka'ida ba ko babban sakaci - babu kisa MR).
learnUni_law_f2_kp1: Kariya: kariyar kai (madaidaicin ƙarfi don tunkuɗe barazanar haramtacciyar hanya - ma'ana amma ba lallai ba ne cikakken hukunci); yarda (iyaka akan abin da za a iya yarda da shi - R v Brown); maye (buguwa na son rai ba kariya ga takamaiman niyya, kariya ta wani bangare zuwa ainihin niyya); hauka (Dokokin M'Naghten - lahani na hankali daga cutar hankali → ba laifi ba saboda rashin hankali).
learnUni_law_f2_kp2: Ƙaddamar da laifuffuka da sa hannu: ƙoƙari (fiye da aikin shiri kawai tare da niyya); makirci (yarjejeniyar aikata wani laifi); ƙarfafawa/taimako (Mummunan Dokar Laifi 2007). Kasuwancin haɗin gwiwa: mahalarta ayyukan ƙungiya suna da alhakin idan sun hango yuwuwar shugaban makarantar zai aikata laifin tare da MR.
learnUni_law_f2_kp3: D da V sun yi yaƙi. D naushi V da nufin haifar da mummunan lahani. V, wanda ba a sani ba ga D, yana da yanayin kwanyar da ba kasafai ba ('kwan kwanyar kwanyar'). V mutu. Shawara D game da alhakin aikata laifuka: (a) Menene sakamakon kisan kai? (b) Shin D yana da MR don kisan kai? (c) Shin ka'idar kwanyar siririn ta shafi dokar laifi? (d) Akwai wani bangare na kariya? Menene yiwuwar sakamako?
learnUni_law_f3_name: Dokokin Duniya || Dokokin kasa da kasa suna tafiyar da dangantaka tsakanin jihohi da kuma, ƙara, daidaikun mutane da ƙungiyoyin ƙasa da ƙasa. Ba kamar dokar cikin gida ba, ba ta da wata hukuma ta tilastawa - bin ka'ida ya dogara da yarda, daidaito, da matsin lamba na duniya. Dokokin kasa da kasa na jama'a sun shafi yarjejeniyoyin, amfani da karfi, ikon mallaka, da yancin ɗan adam.
learnUni_law_f3_desc: Tushen dokokin kasa da kasa (Art. 38 Dokar ICJ): yarjejeniyoyin (daure kan jam'iyyun - pacta sunt servanda - Vienna Yarjejeniyar 1969), dokokin kasa da kasa na al'ada (daidaitaccen aiki na jihar + ra'ayi juris - dauri akan duk jihohi), ka'idodin doka na gaba ɗaya, da yanke shawara na shari'a / rubuce-rubucen ilimi (tushen tushe).
learnUni_law_f3_kp0: Mulkin Jiha: ƙa'idar cewa jihohi suna da iko mafi girma a cikin yankinsu kuma suna daidai da dokokin ƙasa da ƙasa. Rashin shiga tsakani: Wajibi ne kada a tsoma baki cikin harkokin cikin gida na wasu jihohi - rukunan da alhakin Kariya (R2P) ya ruguje.
learnUni_law_f3_kp1: Amfani da karfi: Mataki na 2 (4) Yarjejeniya ta Majalisar Dinkin Duniya ta hana barazana ko amfani da karfi ga kowace kasa. Banbance: Kariyar kai (Mataki na 51 - dole ne ya zama dole kuma ya dace, an ba da rahoto ga Kwamitin Tsaro) da izinin Majalisar Tsaro (Babi na VII - barazanar zaman lafiya, keta zaman lafiya, aikin zalunci).
learnUni_law_f3_kp2: Dokokin aikata laifuka na ƙasa da ƙasa: Kotunan Nuremberg sun kafa alhakin kowane laifi a ƙarƙashin dokar ƙasa. Dokar Rome (2002) ta ƙirƙiri ICC - hukunce-hukuncen kisan kiyashi, laifuffukan cin zarafin ɗan adam, laifuffukan yaƙi, da zalunci. 'Biyan umarni' ba cikakken tsaro ba ne.
learnUni_law_f3_kp3: Dokar teku (UNCLOS 1982): Tekun yanki (mil mil 12 - cikakken ikon mallaka), yankin tattalin arziki na musamman (200 nm - haƙƙin albarkatun ƙasa), manyan tekuna (bayan ikon ƙasa - 'yancin kewayawa). Ƙudurin jayayya: Kotun Ƙasa ta Duniya don Dokar Teku (ITLOS).
learnUni_law_f3_kp4: Jihar A ta mamaye jihar B, inda ta yi ikirarin kare kai bayan wani harin da aka kai ta yanar gizo wanda ake dangantawa da jami’an leken asiri na B. Bincika: (a) Shin harin yanar gizo ya zama hari da makami a karkashin Mataki na 51? (b) Amsar A ya zama dole kuma daidai ne? (c) Wace rawa kwamitin sulhu na Majalisar Dinkin Duniya zai iya takawa? (d) Shin shugabannin Jiha A za su iya fuskantar tuhumar ICC? Menene dole ne a tabbatar? Bayyana abubuwan da suka dace na yarjejeniya da shari'o'in duniya.
learnUni_law_f3_task: Tushen da batutuwa na dokokin duniya
learnUni_law_f3_tp1: Dokokin laifuka na duniya da UNCLOS || Hanyoyin Shari'a & Shari'a
learnUni_law_f3_tp2: Hanyoyi na shari'a su ne basirar tunani na shari'a: karatun shari'o'i, fassarar dokoki, gina muhawara, da rubutu bisa doka. Shari'a (ka'idar shari'a / falsafar doka) tana nazarin yanayi, tushe, da manufofin shari'a kanta - tambayar ko doka da ɗabi'a sun bambanta, menene ya sa doka ta halalta, da kuma yadda alkalai zasu yanke hukunci mai tsanani.
learnUni_law_f4_name: Dalilin shari'ar shari'a: rabo decisionndi (ka'idar shari'a a kan abin da aka yanke hukunci - ɗaure a kan ƙananan kotuna a ƙarƙashin yanke hukunci), obiter dicta (lalacewar abin da ya faru - lallashi kawai). Rarrabewa (iyakance abin da ya gabata), jurewa (kotu ta gaba ta saba wa shari'ar farko), da tashi (Kotun koli ta bar nata).
learnUni_law_f4_desc: Fassarar doka: ƙa'ida ta zahiri (amfani da ma'anar kalmomi na yau da kullun), mulkin zinariya (guje wa sakamako mara kyau), mulkin ɓarna (abin da ɓarna ne majalisar ta nemi magani - Harka Heydon). Hanyar manufa ta zamani (menene manufar majalisar?). ECHR s.3 HRA 1998: Dole ne a karanta doka daidai da haƙƙoƙin Yarjejeniya har ya zuwa yanzu.
learnUni_law_f4_kp0: Legal positivism (Austin, Hart): doka gaskiya ce ta zamantakewa - ingantattun ƙa'idodin da aka ƙirƙira ta hanyoyin da aka sani, ba tare da la'akari da abubuwan ɗabi'a ba. Hart's 'dokokin amincewa' yana gano ingantaccen doka. Rubutun rabuwar doka/dabi'a.
learnUni_law_f4_kp1: Ka'idar shari'a ta dabi'a: dole ne doka ta dace da ka'idodin ɗabi'a - dokar rashin adalci ba doka ta gaskiya ba ce (lex iniusta non est lex — Aquinas, Fuller's inner morality of law). Dokokin Nazi da kotuna suka yi amfani da su - muhawarar bayan yakin akan ko tabbatar da doka ta ba da damar mugunta.
learnUni_law_f4_kp2: Ronald Dworkin's 'doka a matsayin mutunci': doka ta ƙunshi ba kawai ka'idoji ba amma ka'idoji (haƙƙin daidaita damuwa da girmamawa). Dole ne alkalai su sami 'madaidaicin amsa' guda ɗaya wacce ta dace da shawarar da ta gabata da ɗabi'ar siyasa. Matsaloli masu wuya: ka'idoji, ba dokoki kawai ba, jagorar yanke shawara. Sukar Hart's positivism.
learnUni_law_f4_kp3: Wata doka ta ce 'babu motoci a wurin shakatawa'. Shawarwari ko kowane ɗayan waɗannan an haramta: (a) keke, (b) motar wasan yara, (c) motar asibiti da ke amsa gaggawa, (d) tankin tunawa da yaƙi. Aiwatar da duk ƙa'idodin gargajiya guda uku na fassarar doka. Sa'an nan, ta yin amfani da positivism Hart da Dworkin's dokar a matsayin mutunci, bayyana yadda kowane mai ra'ayi zai fuskanci 'penumbra na rashin tabbas' a cikin mulkin.
learnUni_law_f4_kp4: Ronald Dworkin's 'law as integrity': law contains not just rules but principles (right to equal concern and respect). Judges must find the single 'right answer' that best fits past decisions and political morality. Hard cases: principles, not just rules, guide decisions. Critique of Hart's positivism.
learnUni_law_f4_task: A statute says 'no vehicles in the park'. Advise whether each of these is prohibited: (a) a bicycle, (b) a child's toy car, (c) an ambulance responding to an emergency, (d) a war memorial tank. Apply all three traditional rules of statutory interpretation. Then, using Hart's positivism and Dworkin's law as integrity, explain how each theorist would approach the 'penumbra of uncertainty' in the rule.
learnUni_law_f4_tp0: Shari'ar shari'a da abin da ya gabata || Tafsirin shari'a
learnUni_law_f4_tp2: Jikin Dan Adam || Anatomy shine nazarin tsarin jikin mutum - gabobinsa, kyallen takarda, da tsarinsa. Cikakken ilimin ilimin jiki shine tushen da ba za a iya maye gurbinsa ba na maganin asibiti: ba za ku iya tantancewa ko magance abin da ba za ku iya gani ba. Ilimin jiki na likita yana haɗa babban jikin jiki, ilimin tarihi, ilimin mahaifa, da ilimin jikin mutum.
learnUni_medicine_f0_name: Kalmomin ilimin halitta: jiragen sama (sagittal, coronal, transverse), kwatance (tsakiyar / ta gefe, mafi girma / na baya, gaba / baya, kusanci / nisa), yankuna, da motsi (juyawa / tsawo, satar / ƙarawa, juyawa, pronation / supination).
learnUni_medicine_f0_desc: Tsarin tsarin jiki na zuciya: zuciya yana kwance a cikin mediastinum. Gefen dama (tsarin jini) → zagayawa na huhu. Gefen hagu (oxygenated) → zagayawa na tsari. Jijiyoyin jijiyoyin jini: Saukowa na gaba na hagu (LAD), kewayen hagu (LCx), jijiyoyin jini na dama (RCA). LAD infarct = 'Mai yin gwauruwa'.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp0: Tsarin Musculoskeletal: Kasusuwa 206 a cikin kwarangwal na manya. Haɗuwa: fibrous (sutures), cartilaginous (symphysis pubis), synovial (mafi yawan haɗin gwiwa - hip, gwiwa, kafada). Brachial plexus (C5-T1) yana sarrafa babban gaɓoɓin jiki - raunin tushen jijiya yana haifar da ƙayyadaddun alamu na kasawa.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp1: Ciki viscera: peritoneum (layin parietal bangon ciki; visceral yana rufe gabobin). Gabobin Retroperitoneal (SADPUCKER): glandan suprarenal, aorta, duodenum (2nd-4th), pancreas, ureters, colon (hawan hawa / saukowa), kodan, esophagus, dubura.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp2: Neuroanatomy: 12 jijiyoyi na cranial (I Olfactory, II Optic, III Oculomotor, IV Trochlear, V Trigeminal, VI Abducens, VII Facial, VIII Vestibulocochlear, IX Glossopharyngeal, X Vagus, XI Accessory, XII Hypoglossal). Kashin baya yana ƙare a L1-L2 - huda lumbar a L3-L4.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp3: Majiyyaci yana gabatar da rauni a hannun damansa, hasara na jin zafi a cikin ɗan yatsan yatsa da na tsakiya, da ɓata tsokoki na hannu. Sanya raunin da ya faru a jiki: (a) wace jijiya ta shafa? (b) Ina ciwon yake - a brachial plexus ko kuma jijiya mai suna? (c) Menene wataƙila ya jawo? (d) Wane tsarin jiki ne aka matsa? Haɗa zane mai lakabi na plexus mai dacewa.
learnUni_medicine_f0_task: Jiyya na zuciya da tsokar jiki
learnUni_medicine_f0_tp1: Physiology || Ilimin ilimin halittar jiki ya bayyana yadda tsarin jiki ke aiki - yadda zuciya ke fitar da jini, yadda kodan ke tacewa da sarrafa electrolytes, yadda huhu ke musayar iskar gas, da yadda hormones ke daidaita gabobin da ke nesa. Yana danganta jikin jiki (tsari) zuwa magungunan asibiti (rashin aiki). Physiology shine tushen injina na ganewar asali.
learnUni_medicine_f0_tp2: Physiology na zuciya: Injin Frank-Starling - ƙarar bugun jini yana ƙaruwa tare da ƙarar ƙarar ƙarshen-diastolic (preload) - zuciya ta ƙara haɓaka → babban ƙarfi. Fitarwar zuciya = ƙarar bugun zuciya × bugun jini. Ma'anar matsa lamba na jijiya = fitarwar zuciya × jimlar juriya na gefe.
learnUni_medicine_f1_name: Ilimin ilimin lissafi na numfashi: ƙarar ruwa (500 ml a hutawa), ƙarfin mahimmanci, sararin samaniya (~ 150 ml - hanyoyin iska ba su shiga cikin musayar gas). Samun iska-perfusion (V/Q) daidaitawa: manufa V/Q = 1. Rashin daidaituwa yana haifar da hypoxaemia (ƙananan O₂). Hypercapnia (high CO₂) shine farkon abin motsa numfashi.
learnUni_medicine_f1_desc: Kwayoyin Halitta na Renal: Yawan tacewa na glomerular (GFR al'ada ~ 100 ml / min). Tubular reabsorption (Na⁺, glucose, amino acid) da mugunya (H⁺, kwayoyi). Renin-Angiotensin-Aldosterone System (RAAS): ƙananan hawan jini → renin → Ang II → aldosterone → Na⁺ da ruwa → BP ya tashi.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp0: Endocrine physiology: insulin (β-cell, glucose ta tsokar / mai, glycogen kira, hana gluconeogenesis), glucagon (α-cell, adawa da insulin - glycogenolysis, gluconeogenesis), cortisol (HPA axis - danniya amsa, anti-mai kumburi, tada jini glucose), thyroid hormones (metabolic rate, girma).
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp1: Respiratory physiology: tidal volume (500 mL at rest), vital capacity, dead space (~150 mL — airways not involved in gas exchange). Ventilation-perfusion (V/Q) matching: ideal V/Q = 1. Mismatch causes hypoxaemia (low O₂). Hypercapnia (high CO₂) is the primary respiratory drive stimulus.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp2: Renal physiology: glomerular filtration rate (GFR normal ~100 mL/min). Tubular reabsorption (Na⁺, glucose, amino acids) and secretion (H⁺, drugs). Renin-Angiotensin-Aldosterone System (RAAS): low blood pressure → renin → Ang II → aldosterone → Na⁺ and water retention → BP rises.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp3: Endocrine physiology: insulin (β-cells, glucose uptake by muscle/fat, glycogen synthesis, inhibits gluconeogenesis), glucagon (α-cells, opposes insulin — glycogenolysis, gluconeogenesis), cortisol (HPA axis — stress response, anti-inflammatory, raises blood glucose), thyroid hormones (metabolic rate, growth).
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp4: Neurophysiology: Ayyukan aiki, haɗin gwiwar neuromuscular (acetylcholine → mai karɓar nicotinic → yuwuwar farantin karfe → yuwuwar aiki → ƙwayar tsoka ta hanyar zamiya filament inji). Tsarin juyayi na atomatik: tausayi (yaki / jirgin - noradrenaline) vs. parasympathetic (hutawa / narkewa - acetylcholine).
learnUni_medicine_f1_task: An sami majiyyaci ya rushe tare da BP 80/50, bugun zuciya 120, da numfashi 28 numfashi / min. Gas na jini yana nuna pH 7.25, pCO₂ 30 mmHg, HCO₃⁻ 13 mEq/L. Bincika: (a) Wane irin hargitsi na tushen acid ne wannan? (b) Akwai ramuwa na numfashi? (c) Ƙididdige gibin anion (Na=138, Cl=100, HCO₃=13). (d) Wadanne hanyoyin ilimin lissafi (RAAS, numfashi, koda) zasu kunna cikin sa'o'i masu zuwa zuwa sa'o'i masu zuwa don gyara wannan?
learnUni_medicine_f1_tp0: Physiology na zuciya da na numfashi
learnUni_medicine_f1_tp1: Renal Physiology da RAAS || Endocrine da neurophysiology || Pathology || Pathology shine binciken kimiyya na cututtuka - abubuwan sa (aetiology), hanyoyin (pathogenesis), canje-canjen tsarin (kwayoyin halittar jiki), da sakamakon aiki. Janar Pathology yayi nazarin hanyoyin da aka saba da cututtuka da yawa: kumburi, neoplasia, thrombosis, da degeneration. Kwayoyin cuta na tsari ya shafi waɗannan ga takamaiman gabobin da cututtuka.
learnUni_medicine_f1_tp2: Kumburi: m (minti-kwanaki - canje-canje na jijiyoyin jini, ƙwayar neutrophil, mai shiga tsakani ta histamine, prostaglandins, kinins, complement). Na yau da kullun (watanni - shekaru - macrophages, lymphocytes, fibroblasts - samuwar granuloma a cikin tarin fuka, Crohn, sarcoidosis).
learnUni_medicine_f2_name: Neoplasia: benign (da kyau-bambanta, encapsulated, ba m) vs. m (mara kyau bambance-bambancen, invasive, metastasissing). Alamomin ciwon daji (Hamahan & Weinberg): ci gaba da yaduwa, guje wa masu hana haɓaka girma, tsayayya da mutuwar kwayar halitta, rashin mutuwa mai maimaitawa, angiogenesis, mamayewa / metastasis, rashin zaman lafiyar kwayoyin halitta, kumburi mai haɓaka kumburi.
learnUni_medicine_f2_desc: Thrombosis: Virchow's triad - raunin endothelial (mafi mahimmanci), zubar jini mara kyau (hargitsi ko stasis), da hypercoagulability. Jijiyoyin thrombi: arziƙin platelet, fari. Thrombobi venous (DVT): ja (RBC-fibrin). Ƙunƙarar ƙwayar huhu: DVT gutsuttsura a cikin wurare dabam dabam na huhu.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp0: Raunin salula da mutuwa: ischemia (Rashin ATP → Na⁺/K⁺ famfo gazawar → kumburin cell → necrosis). Apoptosis (mutuwar sel da aka shirya - caspase cascade, tashewar nukiliya, jikin apoptotic - babu kumburi). Necrosis (m, rupture cell → kumburi). Nau'o'in: coagulative, liquefactive (kwakwalwa), caseous (TB), gangrenous.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp1: Atherosclerosis: lipid-kore, cuta mai kumburi na bangon jijiyoyin jini. Kwayoyin kumfa (macrophages engulf oxidised LDL) → fatty streaks → fibrous plaques → rikitarwa plaques (cututtuka, zubar jini, calcification, thrombosis). Abubuwan haɗari: hauhawar jini, hyperlipidemia, shan taba, ciwon sukari, tarihin iyali.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp2: Wani mai shan taba mai shekaru 65 mai nau'in ciwon sukari na 2 yana gabatar da ciwon ƙirji na farawa kwatsam yana haskakawa zuwa hannun hagu, diaphoresis, da hawan ST akan ECG. Troponin I yana da girma sosai. Bayyana: (a) tsarin cututtukan da ke haifar da m MI ta amfani da triad na Virchow da atherosclerosis, (b) abin da ke faruwa da cardiomyocytes bayan mintuna 30, sa'o'i 6, da sa'o'i 24 na ischemia, (c) nau'in necrosis wanda ke haifar da, da (d) jerin kumburi da warkarwa a cikin makonni masu zuwa.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp4: Thrombosis da atherosclerosis || Rauni da mutuwa
learnUni_medicine_f2_task: Pharmacology || Pharmacology yana nazarin yadda magunguna ke hulɗa da tsarin halittu. Pharmacokinetics (abin da jiki ke yi da miyagun ƙwayoyi) da kuma pharmacodynamics (abin da miyagun ƙwayoyi ke yi ga jiki) yana ƙarfafa ƙayyadaddun tsari. Kowane magani yana da mai karɓa, tsari, da bayanin martaba mara kyau wanda dole ne a san shi don amintaccen aikin asibiti.
learnUni_medicine_f2_tp0: Pharmacokinetics - ADME: Absorption (bioavailability F = juzu'i ya kai ga rarrabawar tsarin), Rarraba (ƙarar rarraba Vd = kashi / [plasma], magungunan da ke da alaƙa da furotin suna da ƙananan Vd), Metabolism (mafi yawan ƙwayoyin CYP450 enzymes - sakamako na farko), Kawarwa (Rabin rayuwa t ₁ / . CL 9).
learnUni_medicine_f2_tp1: Pharmacodynamics: kwayoyi suna aiki akan masu karɓa (GPCRs, tashoshin ion, masu karɓar nukiliya, masu haɗin enzyme). Agonist (yana kunna mai karɓa), antagonist (blocks - gasa ko mara gasa). EC50: maida hankali yana haifar da sakamako mafi girma na 50%. Inganci (max sakamako) vs. iko (EC50).
learnUni_medicine_f3_desc: Pharmacology studies how drugs interact with biological systems. Pharmacokinetics (what the body does to the drug) and pharmacodynamics (what the drug does to the body) underpin rational prescribing. Every drug has a receptor, mechanism, and adverse effect profile that must be known for safe clinical practice.
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp0: Pharmacokinetics — ADME: Absorption (bioavailability F = fraction reaching systemic circulation), Distribution (volume of distribution Vd = dose/[plasma], highly protein-bound drugs have low Vd), Metabolism (mostly hepatic CYP450 enzymes — first-pass effect), Elimination (renal half-life t₁/₂ = 0.693×Vd/CL).
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp1: Pharmacodynamics: drugs act on receptors (GPCRs, ion channels, nuclear receptors, enzyme-linked). Agonist (activates receptor), antagonist (blocks — competitive or non-competitive). EC50: concentration producing 50% maximal effect. Efficacy (max effect) vs. potency (EC50).
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp2: Ma'anar masu karɓa na miyagun ƙwayoyi: haɓakar mai karɓa (bayan rashin daidaituwa na yau da kullum - ya bayyana abubuwan da suka faru na sake dawowa), raguwa (bayan ciwon daji na yau da kullum - haƙuri). Rarraba masu karɓa. Bangaren agonists: ingantaccen inganci ko da a wurin zama na 100% mai karɓa - na iya yin aiki azaman masu adawa a gaban cikakken agonist.
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp3: Mahimman nau'o'in miyagun ƙwayoyi: beta-blockers (masu adawa da antagonists a β₁/₂-adrenoceptors - rage yawan zuciya da BP), masu hana ACE (toshe angiotensin canza enzyme → ƙasa da Ang II → vasodilation + ƙasa da aldosterone → rage BP), statins (HMG-CoA reductase → LDL cholesterol rage hanta → L. masu karɓa → ƙananan plasma LDL).
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp4: Maganganun miyagun ƙwayoyi (ADR): Nau'in A (wanda aka ƙara - wanda ake iya faɗi, dogara ga kashi, misali zub da jini tare da warfarin), Nau'in B (m - wanda ba a iya tsammani ba, mai shiga tsakani, misali anaphylaxis tare da penicillin), Nau'in C (amfani na yau da kullum), Nau'in D (jinkiri - carcinogenesis, teratogenesis), Nau'in E (ƙarshen amfani - janyewa). Hanyoyin hulɗar ƙwayoyi: masu haifar da CYP (rifampicin yana rage tasirin maganin hana haihuwa), masu hana CYP (erythromycin yana haɓaka matakan simvastatin → myopathy).
learnUni_medicine_f3_task: An fara majiyyaci tare da fibrillation na atrial akan warfarin (manufa INR 2-3) sannan kuma ya fara kamuwa da cututtukan numfashi da ke buƙatar erythromycin. Bayan makonni biyu INR = 5.8 tare da zubar da jini. Yi bayani: (a) tsarin warfarin da dalilin da yasa ake sa ido akan INR, (b) hulɗar magunguna tare da erythromycin, (c) abin da ake buƙata jiyya a yanzu, (d) waɗanne tsare-tsare na gaba ya kamata a ɗauki. Haɗa ajin magani, mai karɓa/enzyme, da takamaiman sigogin motsi.
learnUni_medicine_f3_tp2: Mahimman nau'o'in magunguna da halayen halayen
learnUni_medicine_f4_desc: Magungunan likitanci yana haɗa jikin mutum, ilimin lissafi, ilimin halittar jiki, da ilimin harhada magunguna cikin kulawar haƙuri. Ɗaukar tarihi da jarrabawar jiki sune ainihin ƙwarewar asibiti waɗanda ke haifar da ganewar asali. Ƙwararru, xa'a na likita, da magungunan shaida sune tushen ingantaccen aikin asibiti.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp0: Tarihin ɗaukar: gabatar da ƙara (PC), tarihin gabatar da ƙararrawa (HPC - SOCRATES: shafin, farawa, hali, radiation, ƙungiyoyi, tsarin lokaci, abubuwan da ke daɗaɗawa / kawar da su, tsanani), tarihin likitancin da ya gabata (PMH), tarihin miyagun ƙwayoyi (DHx), tarihin iyali (FHx), tarihin zamantakewa (SHx - shan taba, barasa, sana'a, dangantaka), nazarin tsarin.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp1: Binciken asibiti: dubawa na gabaɗaya → alamomi masu mahimmanci (BP, HR, RR, SpO₂, zazzabi, GCS) → gwajin ƙayyadaddun tsarin. Hanyar ABCDE don ƙima mai mahimmanci: Hanyar iska, Numfashi, kewayawa, nakasa (neuro), Bayyanawa. Sakamakon NEWS2 don tabarbarewar marasa lafiya.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp2: Medical xa'a (hudu ka'idoji - Beauchamp & Childress): ikon kai (girmama haƙuri hakkin yanke shawara), beneficence (aiki a haƙuri ta mafi kyau sha'awa), ba maleficence (na farko, ba cutarwa - primum ba nocere), adalci (adalci kasafi na albarkatun, daidai jiyya). Rikici tsakanin ka'idoji sun zama ruwan dare a aikace.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp3: Sanarwa izini: yana buƙatar iya aiki (fahimta, riƙewa, aunawa, sadarwa), bayanai (haɗarin kayan aiki, madadin, sakamakon rashin magani), da son rai (babu tilastawa). Dokar Ƙarfin Hankali 2005 (Birtaniya): idan ba ta da ƙarfi, mafi kyawun shawarar ƙungiyar ± ikon lauya mai dorewa.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp4: Magani na tushen shaida (EBM): nazari na yau da kullun + meta-bincike (mafi girman shaida don tambayoyin asibiti), RCTs, nazarin ƙungiyar, nazarin sarrafa shari'a, jerin shari'o'i, ra'ayin ƙwararru. Ƙididdiga mai mahimmanci: tantance ingancin ciki (shin binciken ya gudanar da kyau?), Ingantattun waje (shin sakamakon ya shafi majiyyata?), da mahimmancin asibiti (NNT, girman sakamako).
learnUni_medicine_f4_task: An shigar da wata mace mai shekaru 45 da aka sani da farfadiya a sume. Abokin zaman nata ya ce ba ta sha maganin kashe tari ba tsawon mako guda. Ba ta da ikon lauya kuma ba za ta iya yarda ba. Yin amfani da ƙa'idodi huɗu na ɗabi'ar likitanci da Dokar Ƙarfin Hankali, yin nazari: (a) za a iya ba da magani ba tare da izini ba? (b) Menene tsari mafi kyau? (c) Da zarar ta dawo iya aiki, me ya kamata a tattauna? (d) ta yaya za ku kusanci concordance da magani?
learnUni_psychology_f0_desc: Ilimin halayyar jami'a horo ne na kimiya - yana amfani da hanyoyin gwaji, kididdiga, da shaidun da aka bita na tsara don nazarin hankali da ɗabi'a. Manyan tsare-tsarensa na ka'idar sun bambanta daga ragi na nazarin halittu zuwa ginin zamantakewa. Fahimtar tarihi da falsafar ilimin halin dan adam mahallin mahallin duk binciken da ya biyo baya.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp0: Manyan ra'ayoyi: ilimin halitta (kwakwalwa, kwayoyin halitta, hormones), fahimi (sarrafa bayanai, wakilcin tunani), hali (Skinner - conditioning, operant learning), psychodynamic (Freud - rashin sani, danniya, tsarin tsaro), dan Adam (Maslow, Rogers - aikin kai), zamantakewa (Tajfel, Milgram - tasirin zamantakewa).
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp1: Hanyoyin bincike: gwaji (mai sarrafa IV, ma'auni DV, rikice-rikice na sarrafawa), daidaitawa (ma'auni na dangantaka, r = -1 zuwa +1, ba zai iya haifar da dalili ba), mai lura (naturalistic, mahalarta), nazarin shari'ar (zurfin amma iyakacin iyaka), binciken (manyan samfurori, nuna son kai). Tsakanin vs. tsakanin ƙirar batutuwa.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp2: Tushen ƙididdiga: gwajin mahimmancin hasashe mara kyau (NHST) - p-darajar <0.05 taron (Masu Kifi). Girman tasirin (Cohen's d, η²) - a zahiri mahimmin mahimmanci ko da ba ƙididdiga ba. Rikicin maimaitawa: yawancin binciken da aka saba yi sun kasa yin kwafi (social priming, depletion ego) - buɗewar kimiyya da riga-kafi sune martani.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp3: Da'a (Lambar BPS): yarda da sanarwa, haƙƙin janyewa, kariya daga cutarwa, sirri, ba da labari. Gwajin gidan yari na Stanford (Zimbardo 1971) da kuma nazarin Milgram sun haifar da muhawara mai ɗorewa akan haɗarin bincike mai karɓuwa. Binciken kwamitin IRB/da'a yanzu ya zama tilas.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp4: Tushen halayen halitta: tsarin jin tsoro (CNS + PNS + ANS). Tsarin kwakwalwa: kwakwalwar kwakwalwa (ayyuka masu mahimmanci), tsarin limbic (motsi, ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya - hippocampus, amygdala), basal ganglia (ikon motoci, lada), cortex na cerebral (mafi girma fahimta, hali). Neuroimaging: fMRI (gudanar jini), EEG (lokaci), PET (taswirar neurotransmitter).
learnUni_psychology_f0_task: Mahimman kimanta da'awar 'psychology kimiyya ne'. A cikin amsar ku: (a) ayyana 'kimiyya' ta hanyar amfani da ma'aunin lalata na Popper, (b) tantance matakin da manyan hanyoyin ilimin halin dan Adam suka cika wannan ma'auni, (c) tattauna rikicin kwafi da abin da ya bayyana game da NHST, (d) ba da shawarar gyare-gyaren hanyoyin guda biyu waɗanda za su ƙarfafa ƙwararrun kimiyyar ilimin halin dan Adam.
learnUni_psychology_f1_desc: Ilimin halayyar haɓakawa yana nazarin yadda ɗan adam ke canzawa a tsawon rayuwa - daga haɓakar haihuwa ta hanyar ƙuruciya, ƙuruciya, balaga, girma, da tsufa. Yana nazarin fahimi, zamantakewa, motsin rai, da haɓaka ɗabi'a, da kuma hulɗar da ke tsakanin balaga ilimin halitta da ƙwarewar muhalli.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp0: Matakan haɓaka fahimi na Piaget: sensorimotor (0-2y, dindindin abu), preoperational (2-7y, egocentrism, babu kiyayewa), aikin kankare (7-12y, kiyayewa, jujjuyawar), aiki na yau da kullun (12+y, tunani mara kyau, tunanin tunani).
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp1: Ka'idar zamantakewar zamantakewa ta Vygotsky: Zone of Proximal Development (ZPD) - rata tsakanin abin da yaro zai iya yi shi kadai kuma tare da tsinkaya daga wani mai ilimi. Harshe shine kayan aikin fahimi na farko. Bambance-bambancen da Piaget ya mayar da hankali kan binciken kadaici.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp2: Ka'idar haɗe-haɗe (Bowlby, Ainsworth): jarirai suna ƙirƙirar haɗin haɗin kai na farko mai mahimmanci don haɓakawa. Tsarin yanayi mai ban mamaki yana rarraba abin da aka makala: amintacce (65%), mara tsaro-mai gujewa (20%), rashin tsaro-rashin hankali (15%), rashin tsari. Samfuran aiki na ciki suna jagorantar dangantaka ta gaba.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp3: Ci gaban samari: Asalin Erikson da matakin ruɗani na rawar. Kohlberg ta halin kirki ci gaba: preconventional (sha'awar kai), na al'ada (dokokin zamantakewa), postconventional (ka'idodin duniya). Kwakwalwar matashi: tsarin limbic yana girma kafin cortex na farko - ɗaukar haɗari, rashin ƙarfi na tunani.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp4: Ci gaban manya da tsufa: Matakan Erikson na baya - kusanci da keɓancewa (matashi mai girma), haɓakawa vs. stagnation (baligi na tsakiya), mutunci vs. yanke ƙauna (tsohon balagagge). Tsufawar hankali: saurin sarrafawa ya ragu; hankali na crystallized (ilimin da aka tara) yana tsayawa cikin 70s. Nasarar tsufa: Samfurin SOC na Baltes (zaɓi, ingantawa, ramuwa).
learnUni_psychology_f1_task: An nuna wa yaro dan shekara 4 gilasai biyu tare da ruwa daidai gwargwado, sannan a zuba ruwa daga gilashin daya a cikin gilashin da ya fi tsayi. Yaron ya ce gilashin da ya fi tsayi yana da ruwa da yawa. (a) Wane mataki ne yaron ya shiga? (b) Waɗanne iyakoki na fahimi ne suka bayyana wannan? (c) Ta yaya Vygotsky zai fassara wannan yanayin daban? (d) Zana bincike don gwada ko zazzagewa zai iya haɓaka ikon kiyayewa. Yi la'akari da batutuwan ɗa'a.
learnUni_psychology_f2_desc: Ilimin halin ɗabi'a na ɗabi'a yana amfani da kimiyyar tunani don ƙima, ganowa, da kuma kula da yanayin lafiyar hankali. Ƙwararrun ilimin halin ɗan adam yana nazarin yanayi, haddasawa, da kuma yanayin rashin lafiyar tunani. Ya haɗu da zurfin fahimtar ilimin halin ɗan adam tare da abubuwan da suka dogara da shaida kamar CBT, DBT, da kuma ilimin halin ɗan adam.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp0: Ma'anar rashin daidaituwa: ƙarancin ƙididdiga, karkata daga ƙa'idodin zamantakewa, rashin yin aiki yadda ya kamata (Rosenhan), da ma'auni na lafiyar hankali (Jahoda). DSM-5 (APA) da ICD-11 (WHO) suna ba da ma'auni na bincike don rikice-rikice na tunani - tsarin ƙididdiga tare da iyakokin da aka sani.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp1: Babban rashin damuwa: triad fahimi (Beck - ra'ayi mara kyau na kai, duniya, gaba), koyan rashin taimako (Seligman), hasashe na monoamine (rage serotonin da noradrenaline). Jiyya: SSRIs (pharmacotherapy na farko), CBT (sake fasalin fahimi, kunna ɗabi'a), haɓakar haɗin gwiwa mafi girma.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp2: Schizophrenia: tabbatacce bayyanar cututtuka (hallucinations, delusions, disorganized magana), korau bayyanar cututtuka (lebur tasiri, alogia, avolition). Hasashen Dopamine (yawan aikin mai karɓar D2 a cikin hanyar mesolimbic). Antipsychotics: D2 antagonists. Halin gado ~80% (MZ concordance 48%).
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp3: Halayen Halayen Fahimi (CBT): Aaron Beck - tunani na atomatik mara kyau da tsare-tsare suna kula da cuta. Samfurin ABC: Kunna taron → Imani → Sakamako. Matsaloli: bayanan tunani, gwaje-gwajen ɗabi'a, fallasa da rigakafin amsawa (ERP don OCD). Tushen shaida: goyon bayan RCT mai ƙarfi don damuwa, damuwa, OCD, PTSD.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp4: Samfurin biopsychosocial (Engel): rikice-rikice na tunani sun taso ne daga abubuwan halitta (genes, chemistry na kwakwalwa), tunani (fahimi, hali, tarihin ilmantarwa), da zamantakewa (rauni, talauci, dangantaka, al'adu). Ya bayyana dalilin da ya sa babu magani guda ɗaya da ke aiki ga kowa da kuma dalilin da yasa ƙima mai mahimmanci ke da mahimmanci.
learnUni_psychology_f2_task: Mace mai shekaru 28 tana gabatar da ƙarancin yanayi, asarar nauyi 6kg, farkawa da sassafe, rashin iya tattarawa, da jin rashin amfani har tsawon watanni 3. Ba ta da alamun tunani. (a) Samar da ganewar asali ta amfani da DSM-5. (b) Bayyana alamunta ta amfani da samfurin fahimi na Beck. (c) Zayyana zaman 4 na farko na CBT da abin da kuke son cimmawa a kowane. (d) Yin amfani da samfurin biopsychosocial, gano nau'in halitta guda ɗaya, ɗaya na tunani, da kuma abin kiyaye zamantakewa ɗaya.
learnUni_psychology_f3_desc: Ilimin tunani yana nazarin hanyoyin tunani - hankali, fahimta, ƙwaƙwalwa, harshe, tunani, da warware matsalolin - ta amfani da misalin sarrafa bayanai. Yana dogara ne akan ilimin halin mutum na ilimi (yadda ake koyarwa yadda ya kamata) da aikace-aikacen asibiti (me yasa ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya ta ɓace, yadda hankali ya kasa a cikin ADHD, yadda tunanin ke yin kuskure a cikin ciki).
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp0: Samfuran ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya: Samfurin kantin sayar da kayayyaki da yawa na Atkinson-Shiffrin (hankali → STM → LTM ta hanyar maimaitawa). Samfurin ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya mai aiki (Baddeley & Hitch): madauki na phonological, sketchpad na gani, buffer episodic, babban zartarwa. Matakan sarrafawa (Craik & Lockhart): zurfi, ƙarin fa'idar ɓoyewa → mafi kyawun riƙewa.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp1: Kurakurai na ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya: ƙayyadaddun ɓoye bayanan (Thomson & Tulving - abubuwan da za a dawo da su dole ne su dace da mahallin ɓoye). Tasirin ɓarna (Loftus): bayanin bayan aukuwa yana canza ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya. Shaidar gani da ido ba abin dogaro ba ne - kwarin gwiwa baya hasashen daidaito. Ana iya dasa tunanin karya.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp2: Hankali: zaɓaɓɓen hankali (tasirin jam'iyyar Cherry's cocktail party, Treisman's attenuation model). Rarraba hankali: Ayyukan ɗawainiya biyu iyakance ta hanyar sarrafa tashoshi ɗaya a matakan fahimta. Makanta na rashin hankali (Simons & Chabris - gwajin gorilla). Tsayawa da hankali da raguwar faɗakarwa.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp3: Harshe: nahawu na duniya na Chomsky - na'urar sayan harshe na asali (LAD). Hasashen lokaci mai mahimmanci: dole ne a sami harshe kafin balaga don cikakkiyar ƙwarewa (Binciken shari'ar Genie). Dangantakar harshe (Sapir-Whorf): harshe yana rinjayar tunani - sigar da aka ƙi, sigar rauni mai ƙarfi.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp4: Matsalolin warwarewa da tunani: heuristics (samuwa - alkali yuwuwar ta yadda sauƙin misalai ke zuwa a zuciya; wakilci - alkali ta kamanni da samfur; anchoring). Tabbatar da son zuciya (yanayin neman tabbataccen shaida). Ka'idar tsari guda biyu (Kahneman): Tsarin 1 (mai sauri, atomatik, heuristic) vs. Tsarin 2 (jinkirin, ganganci, nazari).
learnUni_psychology_f3_task: Loftus & Palmer (1974) ya nuna cewa kalmar da aka yi amfani da ita lokacin tambaya game da hatsarin mota ('smashed', 'bumped', 'bumped') ya shafi kiyasin gudu da kuma rahotannin fashewar gilashi. (a) Bayyana sakamakon ta amfani da ka'idar tsarawa da tasirin rashin fahimta. (b) Zana kwafi tare da ingantawa guda biyu zuwa ingancin ciki. (c) Tattauna abubuwan da ke faruwa ga hirar 'yan sanda da shaidar gani da ido a kotu. (d) Ƙimar ingancin ingancin binciken ƙwaƙwalwar dakin gwaje-gwaje.
learnUni_psychology_f3_tp1: Kurakurai na ƙwaƙwalwa da shaidar gani da ido
learnUni_psychology_f4_desc: Ilimin halin halitta yana nazarin jijiyoyi, hormonal, da tushe na dabi'a da hanyoyin tunani. Yana haɓaka ilimin halin ɗan adam da ilimin neuroscience - yana bayanin yadda kwakwalwa ke haifar da hankali, yadda hormones ke tsara yanayi da ɗabi'a, da kuma yadda bambancin ƙwayoyin cuta ke shafar mutumci da lafiyar hankali.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp0: Hormones da hali: cortisol (amsar damuwa - axis HPA: hypothalamus → CRH → pituitary → ACTH → adrenal cortex → cortisol). Damuwa na yau da kullun: raguwar ƙarar hippocampal (cortisol mai guba zuwa neurons), ƙarancin ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya da aikin rigakafi. Testosterone: ƙaddamar da haɗin kai mai sauƙi da mahallin dogara.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp1: Genetics of behaviour: heritability = rabon bambance-bambancen saboda bambancin jinsi. Nazarin tagwaye: MZ (daidai) vs. DZ (yan'uwa). Karatun karatu. Gadon hankali ~ 50-80% (dogaran yanayi). Schizophrenia: h²≈80%, babu kwayar halitta guda daya - polygenic, babban nau'in kwayoyin halitta. GWAS yana gano bambance-bambancen gama gari da yawa tare da ƙananan tasiri.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp2: Juyin Halitta da Halaye: Fitness Inclusive (Hamilton), zaɓin dangi, altruism reciprocal (Trivers). Ilimin Juyin Halitta: nau'ikan don gane fuska, gano maguɗi, zaɓin abokin aure, koyon harshe. Critique: labarun daidaitawa sau da yawa ba su da tushe - suna buƙatar shaidar ci gaba.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp3: Hankali: Matsala mai wuya (Chalmers - me yasa ake samun kwarewa ta zahiri kwata-kwata?) vs. matsaloli masu sauƙi (daidaita sani da jihohin kwakwalwa). Abubuwan da ke da alaƙa da hankali (NCC): ka'idar sararin aiki ta duniya (Baars / Dehaene), ka'idar haɗakarwa (Tononi). Binciken Raba-kwakwalwa (Sperry): hemispheres guda biyu na iya samun wayewar kai.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp4: Barci da mafarki: matakan barci: Matakan NREM 1-3 (hasken N1 → N3 jinkirin motsi, maidowa) da REM (motsin ido mai sauri - mafarki, ƙarfafa ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya). Rashin barci: yana lalata hankali, ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya, aikin rigakafi, yanayi. Kimiyyar jijiyoyi na mafarki: dorsolateral prefrontal cortex ya ƙare (rage tunani mai mahimmanci - ya bayyana rashin jin daɗin mafarki).
learnUni_psychology_f4_task: Tattauna tushen ilimin halitta na damuwa. (a) Bayyana ma'aunin SAM (mai tausayi-adrenal medullary - adrenaline, azumi) da kuma HPA axis (cortisol, jinkirin) martani ga mai tsanani damuwa. (b) Menene sakamakon dogon lokaci na damuwa na yau da kullun akan hippocampus da tsarin rigakafi? (c) Bayyana ƙirar binciken tagwaye don raba gudummawar kwayoyin halitta da na muhalli don raunin damuwa. (d) Ƙimar bayanin nazarin halittu na PTSD (cututtukan damuwa na baya-bayan nan) da abubuwan da ke faruwa a asibiti.
learnUni_sociology_f0_desc: Ilimin zamantakewa yana nazarin al'umma gaba ɗaya - tsarinta, cibiyoyinta, rashin daidaito, da kuma ƙarfin hali. Masu ra'ayin kafuwar - Marx, Weber, da Durkheim - sun ba da bayanai dabam-dabam na yadda al'ummar zamani ke aiki. Ka'idodin zamani suna ginawa da ƙalubalantar waɗannan tushe. Karatun ka'idar yana da mahimmanci don yin ma'anar shaidar zamantakewa.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp0: Durkheim: al'umma ita ce hakikanin sui generis - mafi girma fiye da jimlar daidaikun mutane. Bayanan zamantakewa (cibiyoyi, ka'idoji, dabi'u) suna tauye hali. Anomie: rugujewar al'ada a cikin saurin canji na zamantakewa → haɓaka karkatar da ƙimar kashe kansa. Hadin kan injina (kungiyoyin gargajiya) vs. haɗin kai na kwayoyin halitta (na zamani, dogaro na musamman).
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp1: Marx: jari-hujja na tarihi - ginshikin al'umma (dangantakar tattalin arziki, dakaru/dangantakar samarwa) sun tsara babban tsari (doka, al'adu, addini, siyasa). Jari-hujja: Burgeoisie ya mallaki hanyoyin samarwa; proletariat sayar da ikon aiki, ana amfani da su (ragi darajar), da gwaninta nisantar. Akida tana haifar da rashin daidaito.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp2: Weber: aikin zamantakewa - fahimtar ma'anar hali (Verstehen). Nau'ukan iko guda uku: gargajiya, kwarjini, mai hankali-doka. Bureaucracy: manufa nau'in - matsayi, dokoki, gwaninta - duka masu inganci da kuma wulakanta mutane ('ƙarfen ƙarfe'). Da'a na Furotesta da ruhun jari-hujja: ra'ayoyi na iya haifar da canjin kayan aiki.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp3: Ayyukan aiki (Parsons, Merton): al'umma tsarin tsarin kai ne; cibiyoyi suna cika ayyuka don kiyaye tsarin. Critique: yayi watsi da rikici, tushen yarda sosai, ilimin zamani. Ka'idodin rikice-rikice (Dahrendorf): rikici na al'ada ne kuma tushen canjin zamantakewa, ba ilimin cututtuka ba.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp4: Ka'idar zamani: Giddens (tsari - tsarin da hukuma suna da haɗin kai), Bourdieu (babban birnin: tattalin arziki, al'adu, zamantakewa, alama; al'ada; filin), Habermas (aikin sadarwa vs. dabarun aiki - lifeworld mulkin mallaka ta tsarin). Postmodernism (Baudrillard, Lyoard): manyan labaran sun ruguje; gaskiya ita ce kwaikwayo.
learnUni_sociology_f0_task: Yin amfani da aƙalla mahallin mahanga guda uku, bincika abubuwan da ke haifar da rashin daidaiton ilimi. Ga kowane hangen nesa: bayyana mahimmin da'awar ka'idar, gano hanyar samar da rashin daidaituwa, buga bincike mai fa'ida guda ɗaya, da kimanta tasirin manufofin. Ƙarshe ta hanyar tantance wane hangen nesa ya ba da cikakken bayani.
learnUni_sociology_f0_tp0: Durkheim, Marx, and Weber || Aiki da ka'idar rikici
learnUni_sociology_f1_name: Tsarin zamantakewa shine tsarin zamantakewar zamantakewar zamantakewa da cibiyoyi waɗanda ke tsara halayen mutum da damar rayuwa. Iyali, ilimi, addini, tattalin arziki, yada labarai, da jiha sune manyan cibiyoyi. Masana ilimin zamantakewa suna nazarin yadda waɗannan sifofi ke haifar da rashin daidaituwa da kuma yadda suke canzawa akan lokaci.
learnUni_sociology_f1_desc: The iyali: functionalist view (Murdock - duniya, nukiliya iyali da hudu ayyuka: jima'i, haihuwa, tattalin arziki, ilimi). Marxist view (Engels — iyali reproduces da jari-hujja ajin tsarin da patriarchy). Critique na mata (Oakley - aikin gida ba a biya ba, rabon jinsi). Postmodern: bambancin nau'ikan iyali.
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp0: Ilimi: mai aiki (Durkheim - haɗin kai da basirar zamantakewa; Davis/Moore - daidaitawar cancanta). Marxist (Bowles & Gintis - ɓoyayyiyar manhaja tana haifar da alaƙar aji; ƙa'idar wasiƙa - madubin makaranta wurin aiki). Cultural haifuwa (Bourdieu - al'adu babban birnin kasar kayyade ilimi nasara).
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp1: Addini: Durkheim - addini yana tsarkake dabi'un gama gari na al'umma; yana yin aikin haɗin kai. Marx - addini shine 'opium na mutane' - akidar da ta halatta rashin daidaito. Weber - addini na iya zama wani karfi na canji na zamantakewa (Calvinism da jari-hujja). Rubutun Secularisation: Addini yana raguwa da mahimmanci a cikin al'ummomin zamani (an takara).
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp2: Jiha da iko: Ra'ayin jama'a (yawan ƙungiyoyin sha'awa masu fafatawa). Ka'idar Elite (Mills, Pareto) - ikon da aka mayar da hankali a cikin ƙaramin elite. Ra'ayin Markisanci - jihar tana biyan bukatun masu mulki. Gramscian hegemony - ajin mulki yana kula da mulki ta hanyar amincewar akida, ba kawai tilastawa ba.
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp3: Kafofin watsa labaru da al'umma: ka'idar saiti na ajanda (McCombs & Shaw - kafofin watsa labarai sun ƙayyade abin da jama'a ke tunani akai, ba abin da za su yi tunani ba). Samfurin allura na Hypodermic (kafofin watsa labarai suna allurar saƙon a hankali) vs. amfani da ka'idar gamsuwa (masu sauraro suna zabar kafofin watsa labarai don bukatunsu). Kafofin watsa labaru na dijital: tace kumfa, algorithmic curation, rashin fahimta.
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp4: Aiwatar da mabanbantan ra'ayoyin zamantakewa guda biyu (misali aikin aiki da Marxism) don nazarin tsarin ilimi a ƙasarku. Ga kowane hangen nesa: bayyana matsayin ilimi a cikin al'umma, gano wanda ke amfana da wanda ba shi da lahani, buga wani nazari mai ma'ana guda ɗaya, da kuma ba da shawarar manufar siyasa. Sannan tantance wane hangen nesa ya ba da isasshen lissafin sakamakon ilimi ga ɗalibai masu aiki.
learnUni_sociology_f1_task: Iyali da addini || Ilimi da haifuwar zamantakewa
learnUni_sociology_f1_tp0: Jiha, mulki, da kuma kafofin watsa labarai || Rashin daidaituwar zamantakewa
learnUni_sociology_f1_tp1: Rashin daidaituwar zamantakewa - rashin daidaito na rarraba albarkatu, dama, da iko - shine babban abin da ya shafi ilimin zamantakewa. Aji, jinsi, kabilanci/kabila, da shekaru sune manyan ma'auni na daidaitawa. Intersectionality yana bayyana cewa waɗannan ma'auni suna haɗuwa kuma suna hulɗa. Fahimtar rashin daidaituwa yana buƙatar duka nazarin tsari da kulawa ga ƙwarewar rayuwa.
learnUni_sociology_f1_tp2: Ajin zamantakewa: Ra'ayi iri-iri na Weber (aji + matsayi + ƙungiya). Tsarin aji na Goldthorpe (NS-SEC): dangane da dangantakar aiki. Savage et al.'s Great British Class Survey (2013): azuzuwan bakwai ciki har da 'elite' da 'precariat'. Aji yana shafar lafiya, ilimi, shari'ar aikata laifuka, da shiga siyasa.
learnUni_sociology_f2_name: Rashin daidaiton jinsi: magabata - tsarin mulkin mazaje na cibiyoyin zamantakewa, tattalin arziki, da siyasa. Tazarar albashin jinsi: mata suna samun ~80% na albashin sa'o'i na maza a Burtaniya (2023). Gilashin gilashi (shingayen da ba a iya gani ga manyan mukamai) da dutsen gilashi (matan da aka nada su jagoranci a cikin yanayin rikici). Ilimin zamantakewa na namiji: Connell's hegemonic namiji.
learnUni_sociology_f2_desc: Kabilanci da kabilanci: primordialism (asali na kabilanci kamar na halitta, tsayayyen) vs. gine-gine (kabilanci / kabilanci kamar yadda aka gina zamantakewa - jinsi daban-daban da aka bayyana daban-daban a cikin al'ummomi da lokuta daban-daban). Wariyar launin fata na hukumomi (Rahoton Macpherson - Babban 'Yan Sanda): hanyoyin nuna wariya da ke cikin ƙungiyoyi, ba kawai son zuciya ba.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp0: Social class: Weber's multidimensional view (class + status + party). Goldthorpe's class schema (NS-SEC): based on employment relations. Savage et al.'s Great British Class Survey (2013): seven classes including 'elite' and 'precariat'. Class affects health, education, criminal justice, and political participation.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp1: Gender inequality: patriarchy — systematic male domination of social, economic, and political institutions. Gender pay gap: women earn ~80% of men's hourly earnings in UK (2023). Glass ceiling (invisible barriers to senior roles) and glass cliff (women appointed to leadership in crisis situations). Sociology of masculinity: Connell's hegemonic masculinity.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp2: Race and ethnicity: primordialism (ethnic identity as natural, fixed) vs. constructionism (race/ethnicity as socially constructed — different races defined differently in different societies and times). Institutional racism (Macpherson Report — Metropolitan Police): discriminatory processes embedded in organisations, not just individual prejudice.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp3: Intersectionality (Kimberlé Crenshaw): Ma'auni na ainihi da yawa (aji, jinsi, launin fata, nakasa, jima'i) suna hulɗa da yawa, ba ƙari ba. Kwarewar wata Bakar fata ta nuna wariya ba wai kawai 'wariyar launin fata + jima'i' bane - mahaɗin yana haifar da nau'ikan lahani na musamman waɗanda ba shi kaɗai ke kamawa ba.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp4: Motsi na zamantakewa: intergenerational (ajin yara dangane da iyaye) da kuma intragenerational (hanyoyin sana'a na mutum). Motsi na zamantakewar Burtaniya: yana da alaƙa sosai tare da ajin iyaye / samun kudin shiga. Cikakkiyar motsi (motsi mai fa'ida na al'umma) vs. motsin dangi (matsayi a cikin rarraba). Buɗe vs. rufaffiyar tsarin daidaitawa.
learnUni_sociology_f2_task: Yin amfani da tsaka-tsaki azaman tsarin nazarin ku, bincika matsayin nakasassu mata baƙar fata a cikin kasuwar ƙwadago ta Burtaniya. Zana: shaida na tasirin kowane nau'i daban, shaidar yadda suke mu'amala, lissafi guda ɗaya, da abubuwan da ke haifar da manufar hana wariya. Ƙarshe ta hanyar ƙididdigewa ko haɗin kai ya fi amfani da nazari fiye da nazarin axis guda ɗaya.
learnUni_sociology_f3_desc: Binciken zamantakewa yana amfani da kewayon hanyoyin ƙididdigewa da ƙididdiga don bincika abubuwan al'amuran zamantakewa. Zaɓin hanyar yana nuna ƙaƙƙarfan ƙaƙƙarfan ƙaƙƙarfan ƙaƙƙarfan alƙawari - game da abin da ya fi dacewa da ingantaccen ilimin zamantakewa. Reflexivity - sanin masu bincike game da matsayinsu a cikin bincike - wani abu ne na musamman na kimiyyar zamantakewa.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp0: Hanyoyin ƙididdigewa: nazarin zamantakewa (tambayoyin da aka tsara, manyan samfurori, wakilai, masu dacewa), ƙididdiga na hukuma (bayanan gwamnati - laifuffuka, haihuwa, samun kudin shiga - amma suna nuna ayyukan rikodi, ba 'gaskiyar zamantakewa'), nazarin abun ciki (tsari na rubutun rubutu ko kafofin watsa labaru). Ilimin halin kirki: ana iya nazarin duniyar zamantakewa da gaske tare da hanyoyin kimiyya.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp1: Hanyoyi masu inganci: tambayoyi masu zurfi (tsari-tsari ko rashin tsari - masu arziki, bayanan mahallin), ƙungiyoyin mayar da hankali (tsarin rukuni, ma'anar ma'anar gama kai), ethnography (lura da mahalarta - mai bincike nutsewa cikin yanayin zamantakewa, sau da yawa na watanni ko shekaru). Fassarar Epistemology: an gina ma'ana, ba a aunawa ba.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp2: Samfura: yuwuwar (bazuwar, rarrabuwa, cluster — generalisable) vs. m (ka'idar, ƙwallon dusar ƙanƙara - wanda aka zaɓa don zurfin da dacewa, ba wakilci ba). Girman samfurin vs. zurfin: ƙididdige buƙatun manyan n; qualitative ya cimma jikewar ka'idar.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp3: Amincewa (sakamako guda ɗaya idan aka maimaita - ƙarfin ƙididdigar ƙididdiga), inganci (yana auna abin da yake iƙirarin - ƙarfin qualitative). Sanarwa izini, ɓoyewa, kariya daga cutarwa. Mai bincike reflexivity: yarda da yadda ainihin mai binciken ke shafar tattara bayanai da fassarar.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp4: Hanyoyi masu gauraya: na jeri (mai inganci sannan ƙididdigewa, ko akasin haka), na lokaci ɗaya (duka ɗaya, sakamakon hadedde). Triangulation: ta yin amfani da hanyoyi da yawa don haɗuwa akan ƙarshe ɗaya. Misali: bincike mai ƙididdigewa yana gano tazarar nasara; tambayoyi masu inganci suna bayyana hanyoyin.
learnUni_sociology_f3_task: Kuna son yin nazarin dalilin da yasa ba a ba wa ɗaliban masu aiki ba a manyan jami'o'i. Ƙirƙirar nazarin hanyoyin haɗaɗɗiyar: (a) lokaci mai ƙididdigewa ta amfani da bincike da bayanan hukuma - ƙididdige tambayar bincikenku, samfurin, ma'auni, da bincike. (b) Wani lokaci mai inganci ta amfani da tambayoyi - dabarun samfur, jagorar hira (tambayoyi 8), da tsarin nazari. (c) Ta yaya za ku haɗa bangarorin biyu? (d) Gano ƙalubalen ɗabi'a guda biyu musamman don binciken matasa masu rauni.
learnUni_history_f0_desc: Tarihi shine nazarin yadda aka rubuta tarihi - ka'idoji, hanyoyi, da fassarorin da masana tarihi ke amfani da su. Yana tambaya: shin ilimin tarihi na haƙiƙa zai yiwu? Ta yaya ainihin mawallafin tarihi, hangen nesa, da lokacinsa a lokaci ke tsara tarihin da suka rubuta? Kwarewar tarihin tarihi yana da mahimmanci don kimanta kowane gardama na tarihi.
learnUni_history_f0_kp0: Madogararsa na tarihi: na farko (wanda aka halicce shi a lokacin - takardu, kayan tarihi, shaidar baka, hotuna), sakandare (bincike na tushen farko ta masana tarihi), manyan makarantu (kira - litattafai, encyclopaedias). Tushen zargi: marubuci, kwanan wata, masu sauraro, manufa, son zuciya, tabbatarwa.
learnUni_history_f0_kp1: Tarihin Rankean: Tarihi 'kamar yadda yake a zahiri' (wie es eigentlich gewesen) - haƙiƙanin dawo da abubuwan da suka gabata ta hanyar tushe na farko. Ƙwarewar tarihi na ƙarni na 19. Critique: ba zai yiwu a zama cikakken haƙiƙa ba; kafofin da kansu bangare ne.
learnUni_history_f0_kp2: Makarantar Annales (Braudel, Bloch, Febvre): canzawa daga abubuwan da suka faru da manyan mutane zuwa tsarin dogon lokaci (longue durée - labarin kasa, tattalin arziki, tunani). Jimlar tarihi - haɗa dukkan bangarorin kwarewar ɗan adam. Mai matukar tasiri a tarihin zamantakewa.
learnUni_history_f0_kp3: Postmodernism da 'juyin harshe': Fari (Metahistory) - an tsara labaran tarihi kamar nau'ikan adabi (comedy, tragedy, romance, satire) - masana tarihi suna ginawa maimakon gano abubuwan da suka gabata. Derrida: rushe rubutun. Ma'anoni: Dangantaka, 'Tarihin' masu inganci masu yawa.
learnUni_history_f0_kp4: Identity da tarihi: tarihin waye? Masu mulkin mallaka ne suka rubuta tarihin mulkin mallaka - nazarin subaltern (Spivak, Guha) ya dawo da ra'ayoyin waɗanda aka yi wa mulkin mallaka. Tarihin mata, tarihin baƙar fata, tarihin aiki - duk sun ƙalubalanci labarin 'babban mutum' na gargajiya. Karatun ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya: yadda al'umma ke tunawa da manta abubuwan da suka gabata.
learnUni_history_f0_task: Kwatanta hanyoyin tarihi guda uku (Rankean positivism, Annales, postmodernism) a cikin jiyya iri ɗaya - misali. juyin juya halin Faransa. Ga kowace hanya: bayyana ainihin hanyarta, menene tambayoyin da yake yi, wadanne tushe/hanyoyin da yake amfani da su, da abin da zai ƙare. Ƙimar: shin ingantaccen ilimin tarihi zai yiwu?
learnUni_history_f0_tp0: Tushen suka da tushe na farko
learnUni_history_f1_name: Wayewar Da Dadewa || Tsohuwar duniyar ta haifar da tushen wayewar Yammacin Turai da Asiya: polis na Girka, jamhuriyar Romawa da daular, daular Sinawa, biranen Mesofotamiya, da daular Masar. Fahimtar tsarinsu na siyasa, tattalin arzikinsu, da nasarorin al'adu yana bayyana tushen cibiyoyi da suke wanzuwa a yau - doka, dimokuradiyya, falsafa, addini, da birni.
learnUni_history_f1_desc: Ancient Girka: polis (birni-jihar) a matsayin tushen siyasa naúrar. Dimokradiyyar Athens (karni na 5 KZ): taro (ekklesia), majalisa (boule), kotunan shari'a. Sparta: soja oligarchy. Yaƙin Farisa (490-479 KZ). Yaƙin Peloponnesia (431-404 KZ - Binciken Haƙiƙanin Thucydides). Yaƙin Macedonia da duniyar Hellenistic.
learnUni_history_f1_kp0: Ancient Roma: Jamhuriyar (509-27 KZ) - SPQR (Senate da Roman People), tribunes, consuls, populares vs. optimates. Julius Kaisar, faduwar Jamhuriyar, Augustus da Principate. Dokar Romawa, injiniyanci (magudanar ruwa, hanyoyi), da gudanarwar lardi. Ragewa da faɗuwa - Gibbon, muhawarar Pirenne.
learnUni_history_f1_kp1: Mesofotamiya da Masar: Jihohin birnin Sumerian (rubutu, ziggurats, Code na Ur-Nammu c.2100 KZ). Lambar Hammurabi (c.1754 KZ) - Dokoki 282, 'ido don ido'. Masar pharaonic jihar - allahntaka sarauta, monumental gine. Sabuwar Mulki (1550-1070 KZ) - Tutankhamun, Ramesses II.
learnUni_history_f1_kp2: Han China (206 KZ-220 CE): tsarin mulki na tsakiya (Maganin Confucian ta hanyar gwajin aikin farar hula), kasuwancin siliki, sabbin abubuwa (takarda, kamfas, seismograph). Kwatanta da Daular Roma - wayewar 'na al'ada' lokaci guda a gaba da ƙarshen hanyar sadarwar kasuwanci.
learnUni_history_f1_kp3: Tsohuwar tattalin arziƙin: galibi agrarian, tare da aikin bawa tsakiyar samar da Girkanci da Roman. Ciniki mai nisa (Titin siliki, Rum): kayan alatu, hatsi, karafa. Muhawara: Finley's 'primitivist' ra'ayi (tsohon tattalin arziki daban-daban - babu ci gaban fuskantarwa) vs. Scheidel's comparative quantitative approach.
learnUni_history_f1_kp4: Kwatanta tsarin siyasa na Athens na gargajiya da Jamhuriyar Roma. Ga kowa da kowa: bayyana kundin tsarin mulki, gano wanda ke da yancin siyasa, bayyana yadda aka rarraba iko da duba, da tantance yadda 'dimokradiyya' ko 'oligarchic' kowanne ya kasance. Sannan bincika dalilin da ya sa duka tsarin biyu suka ba da damar yin mulkin kama-karya - menene wannan ya gaya mana game da yanayin da ake bukata don dimokuradiyya?
learnUni_history_f1_task: Tsohon Girka da polis || Tsohon Roma: Jamhuriyar da Daular || Mesopotamiya, Misira, da Han China || Tarihin Farkon Zamani (1450-1800)
learnUni_history_f2_desc: Zamanin farko na zamani ya canza duniya: Renaissance sake yin fasaha da koyo, gyare-gyare ya raba Kiristendam, fadada Turai ya kaddamar da daulolin duniya da cinikin bayi, kuma juyin juya halin Kimiyya ya canza yadda mutane ke fahimtar yanayi. Haskakawa ta haifar da ra'ayoyin siyasa - 'yanci, 'yanci, dalili - wanda ya jagoranci juyin juya halin Amurka da Faransanci.
learnUni_history_f2_kp0: The Renaissance (14th-17th c.): Tarurrukan na gargajiya koyo, humanism (Erasmus, More - mayar da hankali a kan m m maimakon allahntaka ikon), sabon art (Leonardo, Michelangelo, Raphael - hangen zaman gaba, naturalism), buga latsa (Gutenberg c.1440 - canza bayanai yada).
learnUni_history_f2_kp1: Gyarawa (1517): Litattafan 95 na Luther - ya ƙalubalanci indulgences, ikon papal, da sulhun firist. Sola scriptura, sola fide. Yaƙin Ƙauye, Majalisar Trent, Yaƙe-yaƙe na Addini (Faransanci: 1562-98, Yaƙin Shekaru Talatin: 1618-48 - Aminci na Westphalia 1648 → ka'idar ikon mallakar jiha).
learnUni_history_f2_kp2: Ƙaddamarwar Turai da mulkin mallaka: Binciken Portuguese da Mutanen Espanya (1490s-1500s), Colombian Exchange ( amfanin gona, cututtuka, bayin bayi), cin nasara na Amurka (Cortés, Pizarro - bala'i na al'umma ga 'yan asalin). Cinikin bayi na Transatlantic: 'Yan Afirka miliyan 12 sun zama bayi, miliyan 2 sun mutu suna tsallakawa.
learnUni_history_f2_kp3: Juyin Juyin Kimiyya (16-17th c.): Copernicus (heliocentrism, 1543), Galileo (makanikanci da na'urar hangen nesa), Kepler (dokokin duniya), Newton (Principia Mathematica 1687 - gravitation duniya, dokokin motsi). Sabuwar hanya: gwaji, lissafi, shakku na tsohuwar iko.
learnUni_history_f2_kp4: Haskakawa (18th c.): dalili, 'yanci, da ci gaba. Locke (haƙƙin halitta, gwamnati ta yarda), Voltaire (haƙuri na addini, 'yancin faɗar albarkacin baki), Rousseau (gabaɗaya wasiyya), Montesquieu (raɓawar iko). Juyin Juyin Juya Halin Amurka (1776 - Tasirin Locke akan ayyana 'Yancin kai), juyin juya halin Faransa (1789 - Liberté, Égalité, Fraternité).
learnUni_history_f2_task: Yi nazarin abubuwan da suka haifar da juyin juya halin Faransa na 1789. Yi amfani da bincike mai yawa: (a) abubuwan da suka faru na dogon lokaci (rikicin kudi, rashin daidaituwa na zamantakewa a karkashin tsarin Estates, ra'ayoyin haske), (b) abubuwan da ke haifar da gajeren lokaci (rashin girbi, rikicin Estates-General), (c) rawar ra'ayoyin vs. yanayin abu. Yi la'akari da wane abu guda ɗaya da kuke ɗauka mafi mahimmanci, kuma ku kare amsar ku akan madadin fassarar.
learnUni_history_f2_tp0: Zamantakewa da Gyarawa || Fadada Turawa da mulkin mallaka || Juyin Halitta da Fadakarwa
learnUni_history_f2_tp2: Karni na 20 da na 21 ya kawo halaka da ba a taba ganin irinsa ba (yakin duniya biyu, kisan kare dangi, makaman nukiliya) tare da ci gaba mai ban mamaki (sarkin mulkin mallaka, 'yancin ɗan adam, juyin fasaha). Fahimtar wannan lokacin yana buƙatar yin aiki tare da tushe na farko, fassarori masu gasa, da gadojin da ba a warware su ba waɗanda ke siffanta mu yanzu.
learnUni_history_f3_name: Yaƙin Duniya na ɗaya (1914-1918): yana haifar da muhawara - Rigimar Fischer (manufin Jamusanci da manufar yaƙi) vs. Albertini (miscalculation da haɗin kai). Yakin Trench, lalata fasaha (~ 17 miliyan sun mutu). Yarjejeniyar Versailles (1919): jumlar laifin yaki, ramuwa - rubutun 'tsarin WWII'.
learnUni_history_f3_desc: Totalitarianism: Nazi Jamus (Hitler - launin fata akidar, Führerprinzip, kisan kiyashi - Holocaust, 6 miliyan Yahudawa; jimlar yaki da Holocaust a matsayin intentionalist vs. functionalist historiographical muhawara). Tarayyar Soviet (Stalin - tattarawa, gulags, Babban Terror). Hannah Arendt's 'Asalin Totalitarianism'.
learnUni_history_f3_kp0: Decolonization (1945-1975): Ƙungiyoyin 'yancin kai a fadin Asiya, Afirka, da Caribbean. 'Yancin Indiya da rabuwa (1947 - tashin hankali, ~ 1 miliyan ya mutu). Yakin Aljeriya (1954-62). Rikicin Kongo. Yanayin Yakin Cold: Amurka da USSR duka anti-colonial a cikin maganganun maganganu amma suna goyon bayan abokan adawa. Neo-colonialism: 'yancin kai na siyasa ba tare da 'yancin kai na tattalin arziki ba.
learnUni_history_f3_kp1: Cold War (1947-1991): gwagwarmayar akida, tattalin arziki, da siyasa tsakanin Amurka da USSR. Koyarwar ƙullawa (Kennan), Yaƙin Koriya, Rikicin Makami mai linzami na Cuba (1962 - mafi kusa da yaƙin nukiliya), Yaƙin Vietnam, Détente, tseren makamai na Reagan. Rushewar USSR (1991): Gorbachev's glasnost/perestroika, faduwar bangon Berlin (1989).
learnUni_history_f3_kp2: Bayan-1991 duniya: unipolarity (Fukuyama's 'Ƙarshen Tarihi' vs. Huntington's 'Clash of Civilisations'), 9/11 da kuma yakin da ta'addanci, 2008 rikicin kudi, Larabawa Spring, Yunƙurin na China, COVID-19 annoba, rikicin yanayi. Haɗin duniya da rashin jin daɗin sa - yawan jama'a, rashin daidaito, da koma baya ga kishin ƙasa mai sassaucin ra'ayi.
learnUni_history_f3_kp3: Ku tantance musabbabin Holocaust. Marubucin ku ya kamata: (a) shiga tare da niyya / aiki na muhawarar tarihi, (b) nazarin yanayin tsarin (antisemitism, ikon jiha, yaƙi) tare da hukuma (Matsayin Hitler, SS, masu kallo), (c) yi amfani da aƙalla tushe guda uku na farko ko na sakandare, (d) kimanta ko Holocaust ya kasance wani yanayi na musamman na zamani da Basarake. Holocaust') ko kuma da farko sakamakon matsananciyar akidar Nazi.
learnUni_history_f3_kp4: Yakin Duniya da mulkin kama-karya || Decolonization da Cold War
learnUni_history_f3_task: Assess the causes of the Holocaust. Your essay should: (a) engage with the intentionalism/functionalism historiographical debate, (b) analyse the structural conditions (antisemitism, state power, war) alongside agency (Hitler's role, the SS, bystanders), (c) use at least three primary or secondary sources, (d) evaluate whether the Holocaust was a uniquely modern phenomenon (Bauman's 'Modernity and the Holocaust') or primarily a result of extreme Nazi ideology.
learnUni_history_f3_tp2: Bayan-1991 duniya da kalubale na zamani
learnUni_philosophy_f0_name: Epistemology || Epistemology reshe ne na falsafar da ya shafi ilimi - yanayinsa, tushensa, iyakarsa, da iyaka. Menene ma'anar sanin wani abu? Ta yaya za mu bambanta ilimi daga imani kawai? Menene tushen ilimi (dalili, kwarewa, shaida)? Waɗannan tambayoyin sun haɗu da shakku, kimiyya, da al'amuran yau da kullun.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_desc: Nazarin al'ada na ilimi: mutum S ya san cewa P iff (i) P gaskiya ne, (ii) S ya gaskanta P, (iii) S ya ba da gaskiya ga P. The baratacce gaskiya imani (JTB) lissafi. Gettier (1963): misalan misalan sun nuna JTB bai wadatar da ilimi ba - matsalar Gettier ta haifar da martani na shekaru 60.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp0: Tushen ilimi: empiricism (Locke, Hume, Berkley) - duk ilimi daga gwaninta; babu ra'ayoyi na asali. Rationalism (Descartes, Leibniz, Kant) - wasu ilimi shine fifiko (kafin kwarewa), tushen dalili. Haɗin Kant: hankali yana sanya nau'ikan (sarari, lokaci, sanadi) akan ƙwarewa.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp1: Shakka: Hanyar Descartes na shakku - Mugunyar Shaidan - kawai 'cogito ergo sum' yana tsira daga shakka. Shakkun Pyrrhonia: dakatar da hukunci akan duk wasu al'amura marasa tushe. Na yau da kullun: Kwakwalwar Putnam a cikin vat, Moore's 'nan hannun' amsa hankalin gama gari, mahallin mahallin.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp2: Ilimin kimiya: Karya ta Popper - kimiyya tana ci gaba ta hanyar zato mai tsauri da yunƙuri na karya, ba ta hanyar ƙaddamarwa ba. Juyin juya halin Kuhn - kimiyya na yau da kullun wanda juyin juya hali ya bayyana. Lakatos: shirye-shiryen bincike (hard core + bel mai karewa). Feyerabend: 'komai yana tafiya' - anarchism epistemological.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp3: Ilimin zamantakewa da shaida: yawancin abin da muka sani sun fito daga wasu. Shaida ita ce tushen ilimin asali (anti-raguwa - Coady). Amma son zuciya, tace kumfa, da rashin jituwar ƙwararru suna haifar da ƙalubale na al'ada. Rashin adalci na Epistemic (Fricker): rashin adalci na shaida (ba da ƙarancin gaskiya saboda son zuciya), rashin adalcin nasa (rashin ra'ayi don fahimtar kwarewar kansa).
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp4: A takaice tantance da'awar cewa ba za a iya karyata shubuhohi masu tsattsauran ra'ayi ba. A cikin amsar ku: (a) jihar Descartes' muhawara masu shakku (mafarki, mugun aljani) da amsawar cogito, (b) gabatar da ma'anar Moore da kuma martanin 'On Tabbaci' na Wittgenstein, (c) bayyana ma'anar al'ada da tantance ko ya narke ko ya guje wa matsalar, (d) la'akari da ko ƙin yarda da al'amuran yau da kullun.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_name: Da'a na nazarin yanayin ɗabi'a da yadda ya kamata mu yi aiki. Manyan ka'idodin ɗabi'a guda uku - sakamako, deontology, da ɗa'a na kirki - suna ba da amsoshi daban-daban. Metaethics yana tambaya ko maganganun ɗabi'a gaskiya ne ko ƙarya, kuma idan haka ne, ta wace hanya ce. Ayyukan ɗabi'a suna amfani da ka'idar don magance matsalolin ɗabi'a na gaske a cikin magani, siyasa, da muhalli.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_desc: Utilitarianism (Bentham, Mill): aikin da ya dace yana ƙara yawan farin ciki/mai amfani (mafi girma ga mafi girman lamba). Dokar utilitarianism (kowane aikin da aka yi hukunci da sakamako) vs. mulki utilitarianism (bi ƙa'idodin da ke ƙara yawan amfani). Abubuwan da ke gaba: adalci (girbi gabobin jiki), mutunci, buƙata.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp0: Kantian deontology: darajar halin kirki daga dalili (aiki, ba sakamako ba). Mahimman Mahimmanci: (1) Yi aiki bisa ga ma'auni kawai da za ku iya ɗaukaka duniya, (2) ɗaukan mutane ko da yaushe a matsayin manufa a cikin kansu, ba kawai a matsayin hanya ba, (3) aiki a matsayin memba na mulkin ƙarshe. Cikakkun ayyuka (misali. Kada a taɓa yin ƙarya) vs. ayyuka marasa kamala (ku kasance masu yin sadaka idan zai yiwu).
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp1: Da'a na nagarta (Aristotle): mayar da hankali kan hali maimakon dokoki ko sakamako. Kyawawan dabi'u (ƙarfin zuciya, adalci, halin ɗabi'a, hikima) tsayayyen hali ne don yin aiki da kyau, wanda aka samu ta hanyar aiki (eudaimonia - ɗan adam yana bunƙasa a matsayin manufa). Koyarwar ma'ana: kyawawan halaye suna tsakanin wuce gona da iri da rashi.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp2: Metaethics: hakikanin halin kirki (haƙiƙa na halin kirki sun kasance - Moore's non-naturalism, Cornell realism), dabi'un anti-realism (ka'idar kuskure: Mackie - duk da'awar dabi'a karya ne; expressivism: Ayer, Blackburn - dabi'un dabi'a suna bayyana halaye; dangantaka: halin kirki ya bambanta tsakanin al'adu). Matsalar da ya kamata (Hume): ba zai iya samun 'komai' daga 'shi' ba.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp3: Applied xa'a: zubar da ciki (mutum, jiki cin gashin kansa - Thomson's violinist), euthanasia ('yancin kai vs. tsarki na rayuwa, m gangara), duniya adalci (Singer - wadata mutane wajibi ne don ba da su don rage talauci na duniya; Rawls - duniya bambancin ka'ida), dabba xa'a ('yancin mawaƙa ra'ayi; Retitaran' ra'ayi util).
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp4: Matsalar trolley: trolley runaway zai kashe mutane 5 sai dai idan kun karkatar da shi zuwa hanya ta gefe inda zai kashe 1. (a) Menene kowanne cikin manyan ka'idodin ɗabi'a uku suka ce ya kamata ku yi, kuma me ya sa? (b) A cikin bambance-bambancen 'footbridge', zaku iya dakatar da trolley ɗin ta hanyar tura wani babban mutum daga kan gada. Shin wannan ya canza amsar ku? Me yasa ko me yasa? (c) Menene gaskiyar gaskiyar cewa yawancin mutane suna canzawa a yanayin farko amma ba na biyu ba ya gaya mana game da tushen ɗabi'a na hankali (maimakon hankali)?
learnUni_philosophy_f1_task: The trolley problem: a runaway trolley will kill 5 people unless you divert it to a side track where it will kill 1. (a) What does each of the three major ethical theories say you should do, and why? (b) In the 'footbridge' variant, you can stop the trolley by pushing a large man off a bridge. Does this change your answer? Why or why not? (c) What does the empirical fact that most people switch in the first case but not the second tell us about the psychological (rather than rational) basis of morality?
learnUni_philosophy_f2_name: Falsafar Hankali || Falsafa na hankali yana nazarin yanayin yanayin tunanin tunani - sani, niyya, da dangantakar tunani da jiki. Matsala mai wuyar fahimta tana tambayar dalilin da yasa ake samun kwarewa ta zahiri kwata-kwata. Ayyukan aiki, motsa jiki, da dualism suna ba da lissafin gasa. Waɗannan muhawara suna da alaƙa kai tsaye ga hankali na wucin gadi da kimiyyar fahimi.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_desc: Matsalolin jiki-jiki: dualism abu (Descartes - hankali da jiki sune abubuwa daban-daban; matsalar hulɗa), dualism dukiya (kayan tunani ba su ne abubuwan da ba na jiki na kwakwalwa ba), ilimin jiki / jari-hujja (jihohin tunani suna kama da ko gane ta jihohin kwakwalwa ta jiki). Kawar jari-hujja (Churchland) - jama'a ilimin halin dan Adam karya ne; neuroscience zai maye gurbinsa.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp0: Ayyukan aiki (Putnam, Fodor): jihohin tunani ana bayyana su ta hanyar ayyukansu (dangantakar shigarwa-fitarwa), ba kayan aikinsu na zahiri ba. Haqiqanin gaskiya da yawa: yanayin tunani iri ɗaya na iya gane shi ta hanyar tsarin jiki daban-daban (siliki da ƙananan ƙwayoyin cuta). Rashin amincewa: Ned Block's inverted qualia, rashin qualia.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp1: Hankali da qualia: qualia sune abubuwan da suka dace, abubuwan ban mamaki na kwarewa ('abin da yake kama' don ganin ja, jin zafi). Matsala mai wuya (Chalmers): ko da cikakken lissafin jiki na kwakwalwa ba zai bayyana dalilin da yasa ake samun gogewa ta zahiri ba. Gwajin tunanin falsafa na aljanu: zama kama da ni a zahiri amma ba tare da sani ba.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp2: Niyya: 'game da' jihohin tunani - imani da sha'awa game da abubuwa ne. Brentano: niyya ita ce alamar tunani. Muhawarar dakin Sinawa ta Searle a kan AI mai ƙarfi: kwamfuta mai sarrafa alamomi ba ta fahimta - ba ta da niyya. Martanin Dennett: Matsayin niyya.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp3: Siffar sirri: menene ya sa ku zama mutum ɗaya akan lokaci? Ci gaba da ilimin halin ɗan adam (Locke - ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya; Parfit - haɗin kai na tunani da ci gaba, babu zurfin gaskiya game da ainihi), ci gaba da ilimin halitta (kwakwalwa), asalin labari (Ricoeur). Parfit's 'rarrabuwar mu tsaya': shari'o'in fission sun nuna ainihin mutum ba shine abin da ke da mahimmanci ba - rayuwa shine abin da ke da mahimmanci.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp4: Bayyana matsala mai wuyar fahimta da dalilin da yasa motsa jiki ke gwagwarmaya da shi. (a) Bayyana matsalar daidai (Chalmers). (b) Gabatar da martani guda biyu na jiki (misali nau'in ka'idar asali, ka'idodin sani mafi girma) da ƙin yarda. (c) Yi la'akari ko aljanu na falsafa suna iya tunani da abin da zai biyo baya idan sun kasance. (d) Tattauna abubuwan da ke haifar da matsananciyar matsala don fahimtar wucin gadi - shin AI zai iya kasancewa da gaske?
learnUni_philosophy_f3_name: Falsafar siyasa tana nazarin ginshiƙan ginshiƙan cibiyoyin siyasa - me ke tabbatar da ikon gwamnati, menene adalci, ta yaya za a rarraba ikon siyasa? Daga Falsafa-Sarakunan Plato zuwa labulen jahilci na Rawls zuwa 'yancin kai na Nozick, waɗannan tsare-tsare suna haifar da mabambantan asusun gwamnati da adalci.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_desc: Tabbatar da jihar: al'adar kwangilar zamantakewa. Hobbes (Leviathan, 1651): ba tare da jihar ba, rayuwa ita ce 'kaɗaici, matalauci, maras kyau, mara hankali, gajarta'; wakilai masu ma'ana sun yi kwangila don ba da 'yanci na halitta don tsaro. Locke: yanayin yanayi na zaman lafiya; jihar da aka kafa don kare haƙƙin halitta (rayuwa, yanci, dukiya); gwamnati bisa yarda, juyin juya hali ya halasta idan ya keta hakki.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp0: Rousseau (Kungiyoyin Jama'a, 1762): gabaɗaya nufin - abin da 'yan ƙasa za su so don amfanin gama gari, bamban da nufin kowa (jimlar buƙatu masu zaman kansu). Iko na halal yana buƙatar dimokraɗiyya ta tarayya. Waje: mallakar dukiya yana haifar da rashin daidaituwa kuma yana lalata kyawawan dabi'u.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp1: Rawls (Ka'idar Adalci, 1971): matsayi na asali + mayafin jahilci - wakilai masu hankali suna zaɓar ka'idodi ba tare da sanin matsayinsu na zamantakewa ba. Ka'idoji guda biyu: (1) daidaitaccen 'yanci na asali, (2) ka'idar bambancin - rashin daidaituwa da aka yarda kawai idan sun amfana mafi ƙarancin fa'ida. Falsafar siyasa mai sassaucin ra'ayi mafi tasiri a cikin karni na 20.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp2: Nozick (Anarchy, Jiha, da Utopia, 1974): Martan 'yanci ga Rawls. Entitlement theory: just distribution = acquired through just transfer or original acquisition. Karancin jihar ita ce mafi fa'ida mafi fa'ida. Ƙa'idodin rarrabawa (kamar Rawls') suna buƙatar ci gaba da keta haƙƙin mutum ɗaya.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp3: Nozick (Anarchy, State, and Utopia, 1974): libertarian response to Rawls. Entitlement theory: just distribution = acquired through just transfer or original acquisition. The minimal state is the most extensive justified state. Patterned principles of distribution (like Rawls') require continuous violation of individual rights.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp4: Kalubale na zamani: tsarin tarayya (MacIntyre, Sandel, Taylor) - ɗabi'a mai sassaucin ra'ayi ya yi watsi da tsarin mulkin zamantakewa na ainihi; al'ummomi, al'adu, da kayayyakin da aka raba suna da mahimmanci. Feminism: Wollstonecraft, Beauvoir ('jima'i na biyu'), Okin - ka'idar sassaucin ra'ayi ta yi watsi da tsarin jinsi na 'masu zaman kansu'. Bayan mulkin mallaka: Fanon - falsafar siyasar yammacin duniya ta yi watsi da tashin hankalin mulkin mallaka.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_task: Rawls da Nozick suna wakiltar biyu daga cikin mahimman falsafar siyasa na ƙarni na 20. (a) Bayyana matsayin Rawls na asali da ka'idodin adalci guda biyu. (b) Bayyana ka'idar haƙƙin Nozick da hujjar Wilt Chamberlain. (c) Gano ainihin sabani a tsakaninsu game da yanayin adalci. (d) Yin amfani da takamaiman misali (misali sake rarraba dukiya ta hanyar haraji), nuna yadda kowane masanin falsafa zai yi tunani. Ƙarshe da matsayin ku na gaskiya.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_tp1: Rawls da Nozick || Kwaminisanci, Feminism, da bayan mulkin mallaka
learnUni_philosophy_f3_tp2: Metaphysics & Ontology || Metaphysics yana bincika mafi mahimmancin fasali na gaskiya: menene yake wanzu, menene ainihin nau'ikan kasancewa, akwai yancin zaɓi, menene lokaci, shin akwai abubuwa masu ƙima? Ontology shine nazarin zama kamar haka. Waɗannan su ne mafi ƙanƙanta tambayoyi a falsafa, amma duk da haka amsoshinsu suna da sakamako ga kimiyya, xa'a, da rayuwar yau da kullum.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_name: Kasancewa da ilimin kimiyya: Ma'aunin Quine - zama shine ya zama darajar ma'auni mai ɗaure. Wadanne nau'ikan ontological akwai? Musamman (kayan mutum ɗaya) vs. na duniya (kayayyaki, alaƙa - haƙiƙanci: abubuwan duniya suna wanzuwa da kansu; nominalism: cikakkun bayanai sun wanzu).
learnUni_philosophy_f4_desc: Ƙimar yanci da ƙaddara: ƙayyadaddun ƙayyadaddun ƙayyadaddun ƙayyadaddun (duk abubuwan da suka faru da aka ƙaddara → ba kyauta ba), dacewa (free will is dace da determinism - free action = uncoerced by external dalilai, ko da an ƙaddara, Frankfurt hierarchical mesh theory), libertarian free will (agent causation, indeterminism). Kalubalen kimiyyar jijiya: Gwaje-gwajen Libet sun nuna ayyukan jijiyoyi suna gaba da niyya ta hankali.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp0: Yanayin lokaci: A-jerin (tensed - baya, yanzu, nan gaba) vs. B-jerin (tseless - a baya / daga baya / lokaci guda). Presentism (kawai akwai wanzu), madawwami/hudu-girma ra'ayi (da, yanzu, da kuma gaba su ne daidai da gaske - 'the block universe'). Dangantakar ƙalubalen daidaitawa.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp1: Modality da yuwuwar duniyoyi: yuwuwar ilimin tauhidi na duniya (Lewis) - maganganun modal suna yin gaskiya ta abin da ke faruwa a cikin yuwuwar halittu. Haƙiƙanin gaskiya na gaskiya: duk duniya mai yiwuwa ta wanzu. Gaskiya: ainihin duniya ce kawai; yuwuwar duniyoyin su ne abstract (Plantinga). An yi amfani da shi don nazarin abubuwan da ba su dace ba, larura, da jigo.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp2: Dalili: Humean na yau da kullun (dalilin = haɗin kai akai-akai - babu haɗin da ya dace). Ƙididdigar ƙididdiga (Lewis): C ya haifar da E idan a cikin duniya mafi kusa inda C ba ya faruwa, E ba ya faruwa. Ka'idar shiga tsakani (Woodward): C yana haifar da E idan shiga tsakani akan C zai canza E. Ƙarfin ƙarfi (Armstrong, Tsuntsaye): ra'ayi na kantologically na farko.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp3: Shin 'yancin zaɓe ya dace da ƙaddara? Rubuta maƙalar falsafar da aka tsara: (a) ayyana ƙaddara da gano rashin daidaituwa na zahiri tare da son rai, (b) gabatar da amsa mai dacewa - bambanta kasancewa 'ƙaddara' daga kasancewa 'tilastawa', ambaton Frankfurt ko Dennett, (c) gabatar da ƙin yarda da rashin daidaituwa (sakamakon hujja - van Inwagen) tare da kimantawa (d) kimantawa naku. na muhawara. Nufin madaidaicin hujjar falsafar gaba ɗaya.
